title: Analytics Engineer
full_description: <p>At Rockstar Games, we create world-class entertainment experiences.&nbsp;</p> <p>Become part of a team working on some of the most rewarding, large-scale creative projects to be found in any entertainment medium - all within an inclusive, highly-motivated environment where you can learn and collaborate with some of the most talented people in the industry.&nbsp;</p> <p><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW60888960 BCX0">Rockstar Games is on the lookout for a skilled</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW60888960 BCX0">&nbsp;Analytics Engineer </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW60888960 BCX0">with strong software development skills who is passionate about</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW60888960 BCX0">&nbsp;games and big data.</span></p> <p>This is a full-time, permanent and in-office position based in Rockstar’s unique game development studio in the heart of Leeds, England.&nbsp;</p> <h4><strong>WHAT WE DO</strong></h4> <ul> <li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="9" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;multilevel&quot;}" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">The Rockstar Games Analytics team provides insights and actionable results to a wide variety of stakeholders across the organization in support of their decision making.</span></li> <li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="9" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;multilevel&quot;}" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1">We partner with multiple departments across the company, leveraging analytics to measure and improve on the success and health of our games.</li> <li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="9" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;multilevel&quot;}" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1">We collaborate as a distributed team to develop innovative data pipelines, data products, data models, reports, analyses, and machine learning applications.</li> <li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="9" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;multilevel&quot;}" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1">The Analytics Architecture vertical within the Analytics team is tasked with building out high impact data models and internal tooling to support the wider Analytics team.</li> </ul> <h4><strong>RESPONSIBILITIES</strong></h4> <ul> <li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="1" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;multilevel&quot;}" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">Partner with Data Scientists and business stakeholders to understand analytical needs and translate them into robust data infrastructure and workflows for the global Analytics team to leverage for deriving insights. Collaborate with the Data Engineering team to design data models and data pipelines.&nbsp;</span></li> <li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="1" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;multilevel&quot;}" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1">Design, develop and maintain scalable data pipelines. Monitor performance and optimize data systems for high performance and reliability.</li> <li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="1" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;multilevel&quot;}" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1">Collaborate with the Data Integrity team to build a Data Quality Framework that ensures production data meets SLAs for key stakeholders and business processes. </li> <li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="1" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;multilevel&quot;}" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1">Perform timely Root Cause Analysis to troubleshoot data-related issues; assist in implementation of code and process fixes.</li> <li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="1" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;multilevel&quot;}" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1">Provide thought leadership and collaborate with other team members to continue to scale our architecture to evolve for the needs of tomorrow. Contribute to the establishment of best practices including code standards, version control, documentation, testing, and review processes.</li> <li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="1" APPLY</strong></h4> <p>Please apply with a CV and cover letter demonstrating how you meet the skills above. If we would like to move forward with your application, a Rockstar recruiter will reach out to you to explain next steps and guide you through the process.</p> <p>Rockstar is committed to creating a work environment that promotes equal opportunity, dignity and respect. In line with this commitment, Rockstar will provide reasonable accommodations to qualified job applicants with disabilities during the recruitment process in order for such applicants to be considered for the position for which they are applying, as well as to qualified employees to enable them to perform the essential functions of their roles. If you need more information about Rockstar’s reasonable accommodation policies or process, or need to request an accommodation, please notify your recruiter during the interview process.&nbsp;</p> <p>If you’ve got the right skills for the job, we want to hear from you. We encourage applications from all suitable candidates regardless of age, disability, gender identity, sexual orientation, religion, belief, race, or any other protected category.</p> <p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-size: 8pt;">#LI-CG1</span></p>

title: Senior Software Engineer, Data Engineering
full_description: <p>At Rockstar Games, we create world-class entertainment experiences.&nbsp;</p> <p>Become part of a team working on some of the most rewarding, large-scale creative projects to be found in any entertainment medium - all within an inclusive, highly-motivated environment where you can learn and collaborate with some of the most talented people in the industry.</p> <p>Rockstar Games is seeking a Senior Software Engineer in Data Engineering to join a team focused on building a cutting-edge game analytics platform and tools to better understand our players and enhance their experience in our games. &nbsp;&nbsp;</p> <p>The ideal candidate will be skilled in developing complex ingestion and transformation processes with an emphasis on reliability and performance. In collaboration with Data Engineers, Machine Learning Engineers, and other Software Engineers, the candidate will empower the team of Analysts and Data Scientists to deliver data driven insights and applications to company stakeholders. &nbsp;</p> <p>This is a full-time, in-office position based out of Rockstar’s newly renovated game development studio in Andover, MA.</p> <h4><strong>WHAT WE DO</strong></h4> <ul> <li>The Rockstar Games Online Services team builds the technology foundation that powers our games and delivers world-class player experiences. &nbsp;</li> <li>Our Data Engineering group manages petabyte-scale data, integrating dozens of streaming and batch sources with strict requirements for reliability, compliance, and low-latency processing.&nbsp;</li> <li>We approach data engineering with the rigor of software engineering by applying modern practices such as clean architecture, modular design, and automated testing. Our focus is on building scalable, reusable platforms and frameworks that enable our partners in Data Science and Game Development to deliver insights and unlock new possibilities for players.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <h4><strong>RESPONSIBILITIES</strong></h4> <ul> <li>Design, build, and maintain high-throughput streaming and batch data processing services, with a primary focus on raw and bronze-level ingestion.&nbsp;</li> <li>Develop and operate stream–based applications responsible for real-time data transformation, enrichment, validation, and routing.&nbsp;</li> <li>Own and evolve event schemas and data contracts, including Avro schemas and Schema Registry governance.&nbsp;</li> <li>Ensure scalability, fault tolerance, and performance of streaming and ingestion pipelines under heavy load.&nbsp;</li> <li>Contribute to platform-level concerns such as deployment automation, observability, operational tooling, and CI/CD.&nbsp;</li> <li>Participate in the design and implementation of cloud-native data infrastructure supporting real-time and batch workloads.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <h4><strong>REQUIREMENTS</strong></h4> <ul> <li>5+ years of professional experience building production software systems, preferably in a distributed or data-intensive environment.&nbsp;</li> <li>Strong experience with Java (and/or Scala) as well as Python, in backend or data processing applications.&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience designing and operating streaming systems using Kafka or Kafka Streams (or similar).&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience working with event-driven architectures, including schema evolution and compatibility.&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience building real-time and/or near-real-time data pipelines at scale.&nbsp;</li> <li>Solid understanding of distributed systems concepts (partitioning, fault tolerance, backpressure, exactly-once/at-least-once semantics).&nbsp;</li> <li>Familiarity with Avro, Protobuf, or similar serialization formats and schema governance practices.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <h4><strong>PLUSES</strong></h4> <p>Please note that these are desirable skills and are not required to apply for the position.</p> <ul> <li>Experience with Databricks, particularly for ingestion, bronze-layer processing, or structured streaming.&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience deploying and scaling applications in containerized environments (e.g., Kubernetes, AKS).&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience working with artifact repositories (e.g., Artifactory, ProGet, Maven repositories).&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience with Infrastructure-as-Code (e.g., Terraform, Databricks Asset Bundles).&nbsp;</li> <li>Familiarity with the Microsoft Azure cloud ecosystem.&nbsp;</li> <li>Familiarity with Apache Spark.&nbsp;</li> <li>Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and deployment workflows.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <h4><strong>HOW TO APPLY</strong></h4> <p>Please apply with a resume and cover letter demonstrating how you meet the skills above. If we would like to move forward with your application, a Rockstar recruiter will reach out to you to explain next steps and guide you through the process.</p> <p>Rockstar is committed to creating a work environment that promotes equal opportunity, dignity and respect. In line with this commitment, Rockstar will provide reasonable accommodations to qualified job applicants with disabilities during the recruitment process in order for such applicants to be considered for the position for which they are applying, as well as to qualified employees to enable them to perform the essential functions of their roles. If you need more information about Rockstar’s reasonable accommodation policies or process, or need to request an accommodation, please notify your recruiter during the interview process.&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;</p> <p>If you’ve got the right skills for the job, we want to hear from you. We encourage applications from all suitable candidates regardless of age, disability, gender identity, sexual orientation, religion, belief, race, or any other protected category.</p> <p><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-size: 8pt;">#LI-BB1</span></p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>The pay range for this position in Andover, Massachusetts at the start of employment is expected to be between the range below* per year. However, base pay offered is based on market location, and may vary further depending on individualized factors for job candidates, such as job-related knowledge, skills, experience, and other objective business considerations. &nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Subject to those same considerations, the total compensation package for this position may also include other elements, including a bonus and/or equity awards, in addition to a full range of medical, financial, and/or other benefits. &nbsp;Details of participation in these benefit plans will be provided if an employee receives an offer of employment. If hired, employee will be in an "at-will position" and the company reserves the right to modify base salary (as well as any other discretionary payment or compensation or benefit program) at any time, including for reasons related to individual performance, company or individual department/team performance, and market factors.</p></div><div class="title">NE Base Pay Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$130,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$150,000 USD</span></div></div></div>

title: Data Engineer
full_description: <p>Working at CreateFuture<br><br><a href="https://createfuture.com/">CreateFuture</a> is an AI-native consulting partner where people do work that matters and are supported to do it well. We work alongside organisations such as PayPal, adidas, NatWest, FanDuel and Money Saving Expert, building digital products and services that make a difference&nbsp; while always putting people first.</p> <p>We’re a team of creators. We write code, shape delivery, build go-to-market strategies, develop AI solutions and create the practices that support our people. We work side by side with our clients, challenging what’s not working and helping them to build the future. Our commitment to craft, quality, and culture has helped us scale to over 600 people in just a few years.</p> <p>Our UK Benefits&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li> <p>35 days leave (including bank holidays).&nbsp;</p> </li> <li> <p>Private medical insurance.</p> </li> <li> <p>Enhanced parental and adoption leave.&nbsp;</p> </li> <li> <p>Financial coaching + 5% pension match.</p> </li> <li> <p>40 hours of paid learning and development.</p> </li> </ul> <p><a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1-uZ_KOuW1SI-xoZ0Sd0WJCisULzkYox4/view?usp=sharing">&nbsp;View our full list of UK benefits.&nbsp; <br><br></a>CreateFuture is a<a href="https://www.greatplacetowork.co.uk/certified-company/1572759"> Great Place to Work-Certified™ company</a> and has won Best Workplaces UK multiple years in a row.</p> <p>Join us on our journey. Let’s create tomorrow, together, today.<br><br></p> <h3>About the role and team:</h3> <p>Role: Data Engineer&nbsp;</p> <p>Hands-on delivery engineers working under the Architect to execute the migration. Responsible for building and fixing data pipelines, resolving technical debt, and getting the platform to a stable, production-ready state.</p> <h3><strong>What you’ll be doing:</strong></h3> <ul> <li> <p>Design, build, and optimise data pipelines on the AWS stack</p> </li> <li> <p>Identify and resolve existing technical debt in the migration</p> </li> <li> <p>Work collaboratively with the client's engineering team to transfer knowledge</p> </li> <li> <p>Contribute to stabilising the platform and hitting delivery milestones</p> </li> <li> <p>Support the Architect in defining and implementing the target state</p> </li> </ul> <h3><strong>We’d love to talk to you if you:&nbsp;&nbsp;</strong></h3> <ul> <li> <p>AWS data stack: S3, Glue, Redshift, Lake Formation</p> </li> <li> <p>Lakehouse patterns and architecture</p> </li> <li> <p>Python and SQL — strong proficiency</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience in regulated or high-volume data environments</p> </li> <li> <p>Betting and gaming domain knowledge <strong>required</strong></p> </li> </ul> <p>This role is Hybrid and would require 2-3 days onsite in Manchester</p> <p>&nbsp;</p><div class="content-conclusion"><h3 id="What-we’ll-offer-you:" data-renderer-start-pos="8044"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">What we’ll offer you:</strong></h3> <p>We trust people to do their best work. That means flexibility over rigid rules, impact over activity, and real investment in your growth both professionally and personally. You’ll be part of a supportive, and friendly culture, surrounded by smart, curious people who care deeply about what they do.<br><br>We offer flexible working, including hybrid and remote options. Our office hubs are located in Edinburgh, Leeds, Manchester, London and Bulgaria, with occasional travel to client sites or CreateFuture offices when needed.</p> <p>We trust you to manage your time balancing collaboration with client time and focused work. What matters is the impact you have, not how busy you look.</p> <h3><strong>Our hiring process</strong></h3> <p>We try to keep our hiring process clear, fair and respectful of your time. We aim to get back to everyone who applies and we will be upfront about where you are in the process.</p> <p>It usually looks like this:</p> <ul> <li>Call with our Talent Acquisition Team&nbsp;</li> <li>Role specific capability interview&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p>Depending on the role, we might also ask you to do a short presentation, a practical or technical task or have a values focused conversation. We will explain what is involved before anything happens.</p> <h3><strong>Inclusion at CreateFuture&nbsp;</strong></h3> <p>We believe diverse teams build better workplaces and better products. We want CreateFuture to be a place where people feel able to be themselves and do their best work.</p> <p>If you need any adjustments or support during the application process, just. We will do what we can to help.</p> <p>We look forward to your application!</p></div>

title: Lead Data Engineer
full_description: <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Who we are</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">CreateFuture is fast becoming the UK’s most recognisable digital consultancy, with years of experience building digital products and services for major organisations whilst putting our people first. We have offices in the centre of Edinburgh, Leeds, Manchester, and London as well as remote employees located throughout the country.&nbsp;</span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">We are a team of creators - whether that’s code, project plans, go to market strategies, culture initiatives, marketing campaigns, large language models or people policies. And together, with our clients, we create the future. This has seen us collaborate and partner across a multitude of industries and sectors, with the likes of PayPal, adidas, Natwest, FanDuel and Money Saving Expert, to name just a few.</span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Our reputation as a partner determined to deliver high-quality, robust and thoughtful products has enabled us to scale to over 500 people in the last couple of years, and it is our amazing people - along with the safe, supportive and friendly culture we have built - that makes CreateFuture a great place to work. Don’t just take our word for it though, we have been recognised by Best Workplaces UK multiple years in a row - across a number of categories - and our employee exit rate is astonishingly low.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Join us on our journey… Let’s create something awesome, together, today.</strong></span></p> <p><br><br></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>About the role and team:</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">We're looking for an experienced Lead Data Engineer to join our growing Data Practice, specialising in iGaming. You'll work as part of a multidisciplinary team delivering data solutions for some of the world's largest betting and gaming operators — organisations processing millions of events per day across sportsbook, casino, and exchange platforms.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">This is a role for someone who understands the pressures of the iGaming data landscape: sub-second odds feeds, high-stakes data integrity requirements, complex regulatory reporting, and large-scale platform migrations from legacy on-premises estates to cloud-native architectures on AWS.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">As a Lead, you'll shape technical direction, mentor engineers, and act as a trusted partner to client data and engineering teams.</span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h1><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>What you'll be doing</strong></span></h1> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Leading large-scale data migrations from on-premises or legacy platforms to cloud-native architectures on AWS — including Lakehouse designs using Databricks or Snowflake</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Designing and building low-latency data pipelines that process real-time betting events, odds updates, and market data at high throughput</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Implementing robust data integrity controls — validation, reconciliation, and auditability — across betting, trading, and customer data domains</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Architecting streaming and micro-batch solutions using AWS Kinesis, Apache Kafka, or MSK for real-time sportsbook and in-play data feeds</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Working with AWS platform services including S3, Glue, Lambda, Athena, Redshift, Lake Formation, Step Functions, and MWAA</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Supporting regulatory and compliance reporting — ensuring data pipelines meet the auditability and lineage requirements of the UK Gambling Commission and international regulators</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Leading and mentoring a team of data engineers, setting standards for code quality, testing, and documentation</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Contributing to technical proposals, pre-sales scoping, and architecture reviews with iGaming clients</span></li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h1><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>We'd love to talk to you if...</strong></span></h1> <h2><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>You know the iGaming data landscape</strong></span></h2> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You've worked in or closely with sportsbook, exchange, or casino platforms — and understand the data models behind markets, selections, bets, and settlements</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You've built or maintained low-latency data feeds — odds ingestion, in-play event streams, price change feeds — where milliseconds matter</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You understand the data integrity challenges specific to betting: reconciliation between trading and settlement systems, detection of data drift, and auditability for regulatory purposes</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You've delivered or contributed to large-scale data migrations — moving high-volume transactional or event data from legacy estates to the cloud without losing fidelity or uptime</span></li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h2><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>You're strong on AWS data engineering</strong></span></h2> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AWS is your primary cloud — you're confident across Glue, Lambda, Athena, S3, Redshift, RDS, Kinesis, MSK, and Step Functions</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You've built real-time or near-real-time pipelines using streaming frameworks — Kinesis Data Streams, Kafka, Flink, or Spark Streaming</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You understand AWS cost models and how to optimise high-throughput workloads — Spot compute, reserved capacity, and right-sizing for event-driven architectures</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AWS certifications are a bonus — Solutions Architect or Data Analytics Specialty</span></li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h2><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>You know your tools</strong></span></h2> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Solid experience with Python, SQL, and Spark — and pipeline tools such as dbt or Airflow</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Comfortable with data quality frameworks and testing — Great Expectations, dbt tests, or custom validation layers</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Experience with infrastructure-as-code (Terraform, AWS CDK) is a plus</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Familiar with broader cloud platforms — Azure (Data Factory, Synapse) or GCP (Dataflow, BigQuery) — is beneficial but not essential</span></li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h2><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>You thrive in a consultancy setting</strong></span></h2> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You've led or mentored data engineers and are comfortable owning technical direction on a complex engagement</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You can navigate the politics of a large operator — multiple bookmaker scale, and the data foundations that keep operators compliant with gambling regulators globally.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You'll influence the shape of engagements from pre-sales through to delivery, grow the engineering talent around you, and be a recognisable voice for Create Future in the iGaming market.</span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h1><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>What you'll be doing</strong></span></h1> <h2><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Technical leadership</strong></span></h2> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Defining and owning the data engineering architecture patterns Create Future uses across iGaming engagements — migration frameworks, streaming architectures, data integrity standards, and Lakehouse design</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Acting as the most senior technical authority on client engagements — making critical architecture decisions, Senior engineers across active engagements</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Identifying and driving the adoption of new tooling, patterns, and AWS services that improve delivery outcomes across the iGaming practice</span></li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h2><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Delivery</strong></span></h2> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span without loss of fidelity or operational continuity</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Architecting real-time and near-real-time data pipelines for sportsbook and in-play use cases — odds feeds, market events, bet placement streams, and settlement pipelines — where latency and correctness are non-negotiable</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Designing and enforcing data integrity frameworks across betting, trading, and customer data domains — including reconciliation between source and target systems, anomaly detection, and audit trail requirements</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Overseeing the implementation of regulatory and compliance reporting pipelines that meet the requirements of the UK Gambling Commission and international licensing bodies</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Working with AWS services including S3, Glue, Lambda, Athena, Redshift, RDS, Kinesis, MSK, Lake Formation, Step Functions, and MWAA — selecting the right tool for each problem rather than defaulting to a stack</span></li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h2><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Practice and people</strong></span></h2> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Mentoring and growing Lead and Senior Data Create Future externally — at industry events, in technical blog posts, and in client-facing settings — as a credible voice on iGaming data engineering</span></li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h2><span scoping complex engagements, writing architecture proposals, and presenting to senior client stakeholders</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Identifying expansion opportunities within existing client relationships — spotting data engineering problems we can help solve and framing them as propositions</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Partnering with AWS on joint go-to-market activity where relevant, leveraging Create Future's Advanced Partner status</span></li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h1><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>What we're looking for</strong></span></h1> <h2><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Deep iGaming domain expertise</strong></span></h2> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Extensive experience working in or closely with sportsbook, exchange, or casino platforms — you understand the data models, operational pressures, and regulatory constraints from the inside</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You've led or made decisive contributions to large-scale data migrations in iGaming — moving live betting, customer, or trading data at scale while maintaining integrity and uptime</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You've designed or owned low-latency data pipelines where correctness and throughput are both critical — odds ingestion, in-play event streams, bet settlement, or equivalent</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You understand what data integrity means in a regulated gambling context: reconciliation, audit trails, lineage, and the consequences of getting it wrong</span></li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h2><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>AWS data engineering mastery</strong></span></h2> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AWS is your primary cloud and you can design across the full data engineering stack — from ingestion and streaming through to warehousing, serving, and cost optimisation</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You have deep experience with streaming architectures — Kinesis, Kafka/MSK, Flink, or Spark Streaming — and know when each is the right choice</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You can model the cost implications of architecture decisions and advise clients on trade-offs between throughput, latency, durability, and spend</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AWS certification at professional or specialty level is strongly preferred</span></li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h2><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Engineering excellence</strong></span></h2> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Mastery of Python, SQL, and Spark — and strong opinions on how they should This has seen us collaborate and partner across a multitude of industries and sectors, with the likes of PayPal, adidas, Natwest, FanDuel and Money Saving Expert, to name just a few.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Our reputation as a partner determined to deliver high-quality, robust and thoughtful products has enabled us to scale to over 500 people in the last couple of years, and it is our amazing people - along with the safe, supportive and friendly culture we have built - that makes CreateFuture a great place to work. Don’t just take our word for it though, we have been recognised by Best Workplaces UK multiple years in a row - across a number of categories - and our employee exit rate is astonishingly low.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Join us on our journey… Let’s create something awesome, together, today.</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>About the role and team:</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">We're looking for an experienced Senior Data Engineer to join our growing Data Practice, specialising in iGaming. You'll work as part of a multidisciplinary team delivering data solutions for some of the world's largest betting and gaming operators — organisations processing millions of events per day across sportsbook, casino, and exchange platforms.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">This is a role for someone who understands the pressures of the iGaming data landscape: sub-second odds feeds, high-stakes data integrity requirements, complex regulatory reporting, and large-scale platform migrations from legacy on-premises estates to cloud-native architectures on AWS.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>What you'll be doing</strong></span></p> <ul> <li>Deliver large-scale data migrations from on-premises or legacy platforms to cloud-native AWS architectures, including Lakehouse implementations using Databricks or Snowflake.</li> <li>Design, build, and optimise low-latency data pipelines that process real-time betting events, odds updates, and market data at scale.</li> <li>Implement robust data quality, validation, reconciliation, and audit controls across betting, trading, and customer data domains.</li> <li>Develop streaming and micro-batch data solutions using AWS Kinesis, Apache Kafka, or Amazon MSK to support real-time sportsbook and in-play data feeds.</li> <li>Build and maintain data solutions using AWS services including S3, Glue, Lambda, Athena, Redshift, Lake Formation, Step Functions, and MWAA.</li> <li>Support regulatory and compliance reporting by ensuring data pipelines are reliable, traceable, and meet audit and lineage requirements for the UK Gambling Commission and other international regulators.</li> <li>Collaborate with architects, platform engineers, and cross-functional teams to design scalable, resilient, and high-performing data platforms.</li> <li>Champion engineering best practices through high-quality code, automated testing, documentation, and peer code reviews, while mentoring junior engineers where appropriate.</li> <li>Contribute technical expertise during solution design sessions, architecture discussions, and client workshops, providing input into delivery approaches and technical decisions.</li> </ul> <h1><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>We'd love to talk to you if...</strong></span></h1> <h2><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>You know the iGaming data landscape</strong></span></h2> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You've worked in or closely with sportsbook, exchange, or casino platforms — and understand the data models behind markets, selections, bets, and settlements</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You've built or maintained low-latency data feeds — odds ingestion, in-play event streams, price change feeds — where milliseconds matter</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You understand the data integrity challenges specific to betting: reconciliation between trading and settlement systems, detection of data drift, and auditability for regulatory purposes</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You've delivered or contributed to large-scale data migrations — moving high-volume transactional or event data from legacy estates to the cloud without losing fidelity or uptime</span></li> </ul> <h2><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>You're strong on AWS data engineering</strong></span></h2> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AWS is your primary cloud — you're confident across Glue, Lambda, Athena, S3, Redshift, RDS, Kinesis, MSK, and Step Functions</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You've built real-time or near-real-time pipelines using streaming frameworks — Kinesis Data Streams, Kafka, Flink, or Spark Streaming</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You understand AWS cost models and how to optimise high-throughput workloads — Spot compute, reserved capacity, and right-sizing for event-driven architectures</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AWS certifications are a bonus&nbsp;</span></li> </ul> <h2><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>You know your tools</strong></span></h2> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Solid experience with Python, SQL, and Spark — and pipeline tools such as dbt or Airflow</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Comfortable with data quality frameworks and testing — Great Expectations, dbt tests, or custom validation layers</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Experience with infrastructure-as-code (Terraform, AWS CDK) is a plus</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Familiar with broader cloud platforms — Azure (Data Factory, Synapse) or GCP (Dataflow, BigQuery) — is beneficial but not essential</span></li> </ul> <h1><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Tech snapshot</strong></span></h1> <table> <tbody> <tr> <td> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Primary cloud</strong></span></p> </td> <td> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AWS — Glue, Lambda, Athena, S3, Redshift, RDS, Kinesis, MSK, Lake Formation, Step Functions, MWAA</span></p> </td> </tr> <tr> <td> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Streaming</strong></span></p> </td> <td> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AWS Kinesis, Apache Kafka / MSK, Apache Flink, Spark Streaming</span></p> </td> </tr> <tr> <td> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Languages</strong></span></p> </td> <td> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Python, SQL, Spark</span></p> </td> </tr> <tr> <td> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Pipeline tools</strong></span></p> </td> <td> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">dbt, Airflow / AWS MWAA, AWS Glue</span></p> </td> </tr> <tr> <td> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Platforms</strong></span></p> </td> <td> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Databricks, Snowflake, Amazon Redshift</span></p> </td> </tr> <tr> <td> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Data quality</strong></span></p> </td> <td> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Great Expectations, dbt tests, custom reconciliation frameworks</span></p> </td> </tr> <tr> <td> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>IaC / DevOps</strong></span></p> </td> <td> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Terraform, AWS CDK (desirable)</span></p> </td> </tr> </tbody> </table> <p>&nbsp;</p><div class="content-conclusion"><h3 id="What-we’ll-offer-you:" data-renderer-start-pos="8044"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">What we’ll offer you:</strong></h3> <p>We trust people to do their best work. That means flexibility over rigid rules, impact over activity, and real investment in your growth both professionally and personally. You’ll be part of a supportive, and friendly culture, surrounded by smart, curious people who care deeply about what they do.<br><br>We offer flexible working, including hybrid and remote options. Our office hubs are located in Edinburgh, Leeds, Manchester, London and Bulgaria, with occasional travel to client sites or CreateFuture offices when needed.</p> <p>We trust you to manage your time balancing collaboration with client time and focused work. What matters is the impact you have, not how busy you look.</p> <h3><strong>Our hiring process</strong></h3> <p>We try to keep our hiring process clear, fair and respectful of your time. We aim to get back to everyone who applies and we will be upfront about where you are in the process.</p> <p>It usually looks like this:</p> <ul> <li>Call with our Talent Acquisition Team&nbsp;</li> <li>Role specific capability interview&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p>Depending on the role, we might also ask you to do a short presentation, a practical or technical task or have a values focused conversation. We will explain what is involved before anything happens.</p> <h3><strong>Inclusion at CreateFuture&nbsp;</strong></h3> <p>We believe diverse teams build better workplaces and better products. We want CreateFuture to be a place where people feel able to be themselves and do their best work.</p> <p>If you need any adjustments or support during the application process, just. We will do what we can to help.</p> <p>We look forward to your application!</p></div>

title: Data Engineer (Remote, US)
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><h2><strong>About Sayari:&nbsp;</strong></h2> <div> <p>Sayari is the judgment infrastructure for trustworthy AI in economic security and commercial risk. The Sayari Commercial World Model resolves 11.7B+ primary-source records from 250+ jurisdictions forming the ground truth of global commerce. A Judgment Ontology, encoding over a decade of investigative tradecraft, and Superconductor, an agentic orchestration platform, deliver AI that reasons like an expert analyst, shows its work, and traces every finding to its source. Trusted by U.S. Customs and Border Protection, HM Revenue &amp; Customs, and Fortune 500 enterprises, Sayari is used by thousands of professionals across 35+ countries to secure supply chains and dismantle illicit networks. Headquartered in Washington, D.C., with offices in London, Singapore, Tokyo, and Tel Aviv.</p> </div></div><h3><strong>POSITION DESCRIPTION</strong></h3> <p>As a Data Engineer at Sayari, you will be the engine behind the world’s most comprehensive commercial world model. You will join a high-autonomy team responsible for building and scaling the complex orchestration systems that transform billions of primary-source records into actionable intelligence. This is a role for a "builder" who respects the complexity of large-scale ETL and graph databases and is "PhD-curious" about the future of AI-native data products and modern orchestration.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h4><strong>JOB RESPONSIBILITIES</strong></h4> <ul> <li>Design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines using Python, Spark, and Airflow to support our core data acquisition and entity resolution engines.</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Collaborate cross-functionally with AI/ML and Product teams to implement new features and AI-native products.</li> <li>Proactively identify and resolve bottlenecks in our complex ETL processes, bringing a fresh perspective to refine and optimize our existing codebase.</li> <li>Contribute to a robust engineering culture through rigorous code reviews, unit testing, and clear communication of design decisions.</li> <li>Own the end-to-end delivery of roadmap tasks within two-week sprints, ensuring work meets high standards for quality, documentation, and performance.</li> <li>Participate in roadmap planning and story refinement, eventually taking ownership of major epics that drive our long-term product defensibility.</li> </ul> <h4>SKILLS &amp; EXPERIENCE</h4> <p><strong>Required</strong></p> <ul> <li>Professional proficiency in Python and experience contributing to shared codebases using Git (branching, PRs, code reviews).</li> <li>3+ years of experience working in Data Engineering&nbsp;</li> <li>Demonstrated experience working with relational databases (PostgreSQL/BigQuery) and an interest in or familiarity with graph databases.</li> <li>Familiarity with distributed computing (Spark) or a strong desire to master it.</li> <li>Strong collaborative skills and the ability to work effectively in an Agile, sprint-based environment.</li> <li>A "self-directed" orientation: ability to move tasks from "assigned" to "complete" with high autonomy and clear communication.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Preferred</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience with Django, Scala, or Scrapy.</li> <li>Hands-on experience with workflow orchestration tools like Airflow.</li> <li>Experience or strong interest in LLM tuning, deployment, and AI engineering best practices.</li> <li>Experience working with international or non-English datasets.</li> <li>Prior experience working with high-scale, complex data pipelines.</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>The target base salary for this position is $90,000-$120,000 plus company bonus and equity. Final offer amounts are determined by multiple factors including location, local market variances, candidate experience and expertise, internal peer equity, and may vary from the amounts listed above.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h3><strong>Benefits:&nbsp;</strong></h3> <div> <ul> <li>100% fully paid medical, vision, and dental for employees and their dependents</li> <li>Generous time off; we observe all US federal holidays, close our office for a winter break (12/24-12/31), in addition to granting 18 PTO days and 10 sick days</li> <li>Outstanding compensation package; competitive commissions for revenue roles and bonuses for non-revenue positions</li> <li>A strong commitment to diversity, equity, and inclusion</li> <li>Eligibility to participate in additional benefits such as 401k match up to 5%, 100% paid life insurance (up to $100,000 coverage),, and parental leave</li> <li>A collaborative and positive culture - your team will be as smart and driven as you</li> <li>Limitless growth and learning opportunities</li> </ul> </div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><em>Sayari is an equal opportunity employer and strongly encourages diverse candidates to apply. We believe diversity and inclusion mean our team members should reflect the diversity of the United States. No employee or applicant will face discrimination or harassment based on race, color, ethnicity, religion, age, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, disability status, veteran status, genetics, or political affiliation. We strongly encourage applicants of all backgrounds to apply.</em></div><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">Pay Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$90,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$120,000 USD</span></div></div></div>

title: Forward Deployed Engineer, CE (Evergreen)
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><h2><strong>About Sayari:&nbsp;</strong></h2> <div> <p>Sayari is the judgment infrastructure for trustworthy AI in economic security and commercial risk. The Sayari Commercial World Model resolves 11.7B+ primary-source records from 250+ jurisdictions forming the ground truth of global commerce. A Judgment Ontology, encoding over a decade of investigative tradecraft, and Superconductor, an agentic orchestration platform, deliver AI that reasons like an expert analyst, shows its work, and traces every finding to its source. Trusted by U.S. Customs and Border Protection, HM Revenue &amp; Customs, and Fortune 500 enterprises, Sayari is used by thousands of professionals across 35+ countries to secure supply chains and dismantle illicit networks. Headquartered in Washington, D.C., with offices in London, Singapore, Tokyo, and Tel Aviv.</p> </div></div><h3><strong>POSITION DESCRIPTION</strong></h3> <p><strong>At Sayari, we’re always looking for great talent to join our team. This is a proactive hiring post for future Forward Deployed Engineer, CE roles, allowing us to connect with amazing candidates like you before a specific seat opens up.</strong></p> <p>This is not a traditional sales engineering role. As a Forward Deployed Engineer (FDE), you are at the critical intersection of our code, our clients, and their most critical missions. You will be deployed to our most strategic partners, embedding within their environments to solve high-stakes problems that have no textbook answers.</p> <p>You own the "last mile" of our product's impact , ensuring our technology fundamentally transforms how our users confront challenges such as financial crime, supply chain disruption, and threats to national security.</p> <p>You are equal parts engineer, strategist, and operator. One day you might be architecting a data pipeline within a client's cloud environment ; the next, you'll be writing production Python to integrate our API into a proprietary analytics platform ; and by the end of the week, you could be briefing a C-level executive, intelligence analyst, or mission director on the outcomes your work has enabled.</p> <p>You thrive on ambiguity, operate with extreme ownership, and are relentless in your pursuit of delivering real-world value. You will act as a vital conduit between the front lines and our core engineering teams, turning your bespoke solutions into scalable, platform-wide features of Sayari’s product suite.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h4><strong>JOB RESPONSIBILITIES</strong></h4> <ul> <li><strong>Embed and Build:</strong> Deploy directly into our clients' technical ecosystems and work with key stakeholders to understand their unique workflows, technical environments, and mission challenges. Design, build, and ship production-grade code. You will write robust Python applications, advanced SQL, and leverage our APIs to solve bespoke challenges at the edge.</li> <li><strong>Own the Outcome:</strong> Lead the entire technical lifecycle of our most strategic deployments, from initial discovery and architectural design to implementation and operationalization. You are responsible for ensuring our platform delivers tangible, mission-critical value.</li> <li><strong>Be the Tip of the Spear:</strong> Serve as the primary technical authority for our clients. You'll lead deep-dive technical workshops, debug complex systems, and act as a trusted, hands-on advisor on how to best leverage Sayari's platform to achieve their objectives in real-world investigations and missions.</li> <li><strong>Engineer Solutions for the Mission:</strong> Deconstruct ambiguous, high-level mission requirements into concrete technical solutions. Architect and implement scalable data models and workflows, ranging from building robust data pipelines into client persistence layers (Snowflake, Databricks, etc.) to developing custom Python scripts and prototyping AI/ML models.</li> <li><strong>Shape Our Product:</strong> Act as the vital conduit between the front lines and our core engineering teams. You will translate complex, real-world operational needs and feedback into the next generation of Sayari's platform.</li> </ul> <h4>SKILLS &amp; EXPERIENCE</h4> <p><em>Required:</em></p> <ul> <li>5+ years of experience in a client-facing, technical role (Forward Deployed Engineer, Sales Engineering, Solutions Architecture, Technical Consulting, etc.).</li> <li>Demonstrated ability to write clean, production-ready code, with strong proficiency in programming languages (preferably Python) and its data manipulation ecosystem (Pandas, etc.).</li> <li>Deep fluency in writing and optimizing complex SQL queries.</li> <li>Hands-on, practical experience consuming, integrating, and reasoning about RESTful APIs.</li> <li>Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to bridge the gap between code and mission. You can articulate highly technical concepts with clarity and conviction to engineers, analysts, and senior leaders alike.</li> <li>Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to navigate ambiguous, complex scenarios.</li> <li>A relentless drive and intellectual curiosity. You are comfortable parachuting into new environments and learning new technologies on the fly.</li> <li>Bachelor's or Master's degree in a technical field strongly preferred</li> </ul> <p><em>Desired:</em></p> <ul> <li>Practical experience leveraging AI, including prompting Large Language Models (LLMs) or using their APIs to build analytical solutions.</li> <li>Experience building and deploying solutions on cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) and familiarity with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).</li> <li>Familiarity with the modern data stack (e.g., Snowflake, Databricks) and workflow orchestrators (e.g., Airflow, Prefect).</li> <li>Knowledge of graph data technologies (Neo4j, TigerGraph) and their corresponding query languages.</li> <li>Exposure to machine learning applications, particularly in NLP or entity resolution.</li> <li>Experience in, or a demonstrated passion for, high-stakes domains such as AML/Financial Crime, Supply Chain Risk, or National Security.</li> <li>Ability to travel up to 30%</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><em>The target base salary for this position is $160,000-$180,000 plus commission and equity. Final offer amounts are determined by multiple factors including location, local market variances, candidate experience and expertise, internal peer equity, and may vary from the amounts listed above.</em></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h3><strong>Benefits:&nbsp;</strong></h3> <div> <ul> <li>100% fully paid medical, vision, and dental for employees and their dependents</li> <li>Generous time off; we observe all US federal holidays, close our office for a winter break (12/24-12/31), in addition to granting 18 PTO days and 10 sick days</li> <li>Outstanding compensation package; competitive commissions for revenue roles and bonuses for non-revenue positions</li> <li>A strong commitment to diversity, equity, and inclusion</li> <li>Eligibility to participate in additional benefits such as 401k match up to 5%, 100% paid life insurance (up to $100,000 coverage),, and parental leave</li> <li>A collaborative and positive culture - your team will be as smart and driven as you</li> <li>Limitless growth and learning opportunities</li> </ul> </div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><em>Sayari is an equal opportunity employer and strongly encourages diverse candidates to apply. We believe diversity and inclusion mean our team members should reflect the diversity of the United States. No employee or applicant will face discrimination or harassment based on race, color, ethnicity, religion, age, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, disability status, veteran status, genetics, or political affiliation. We strongly encourage applicants of all backgrounds to apply.</em></div><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">Pay Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$160,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$180,000 USD</span></div></div></div>
