Beyond technical delivery, we're looking for someone genuinely curious about the business problems behind the data — someone who can apply common sense thinking, detailed analysis, and experience-based recommendations to help derive and shape business requirements, not just implement them as given.</p> <p>You will work on scalable batch, streaming, and near-real-time pipelines, enabling high-quality, curated datasets while ensuring robust data governance, security, and observability across the data ecosystem. You will also play a key role in supporting AI and GenAI systems, enabling pipelines for machine learning, causal modeling, and LLM-powered applications such as RAG and agent-based systems.</p> <p>Our preferred platforms are Microsoft Azure / Fabric (primary), GCP, AWS, Databricks, and Snowflake, with Azure experience being highly transferable to Fabric. You will collaborate closely with data scientists, ML engineers, and platform teams to ensure the data foundation supports production-grade, decision-oriented AI systems.</p> <p><strong style="font-size: 14px;"><span data-contrast="auto">Role responsibilities</span></strong></p> <p><em>Build &amp; Data Platform Engineering</em></p> <p>Design and implement scalable data platforms and pipelines across cloud environments (Azure/Fabric, AWS, GCP, Databricks, Snowflake). This includes developing reliable batch, streaming, and near-real-time pipelines using technologies such as Spark and Delta Lake, and building ingestion, transformation, and curation workflows for both structured and unstructured data.</p> <p>You will implement modern data architectures including lakehouse patterns and medallion layering (bronze, silver, gold), ensuring systems are reusable, scalable, and aligned with enterprise needs.</p> <p><em>Enable AI, GenAI &amp; Data Products</em></p> <p>Deliver high-quality datasets that support analytics, machine learning, causal modeling, and optimization systems. You will enable data pipelines for GenAI use cases (including LLMs, RAG pipelines, and vector-based data flows), as well as agent-based architectures and intelligent workflows, ensuring that data is model-ready and production-grade.</p> <p><em>Data Modeling, Orchestration &amp; Automation</em></p> <p>Design scalable logical and physical data models for analytical and operational use cases, ensuring consistency across domains. Orchestrate workflows using tools such as Airflow, dbt, Lakeflow, or equivalents, with strong focus on automation, reliability, and maintainability of end-to-end pipelines.</p> <p><em>Architecture, Governance &amp; Observability</em></p> <p>Apply modern architecture patterns including event-driven and streaming architectures, and ensure adherence to best practices in data governance, lineage, quality, and access control (RBAC/ABAC).</p> <p>Establish strong data observability, including monitoring of data freshness, pipeline reliability, and SLA adherence, ensuring systems remain trustworthy and production-ready.</p> <p><em>Data Serving, Integration &amp; Optimization</em></p> <p>Enable data serving layers (APIs, feature inputs, analytical endpoints) to support downstream systems, including ML and AI platforms. Continuously monitor and optimize pipelines and infrastructure for performance, scalability, and cost efficiency.</p> <p><em>Requirements Discovery &amp; Business Partnership</em></p> <p>Bring genuine curiosity to every engagement — ask the right questions to understand not just what stakeholders are asking for, but why. Apply common sense thinking, detailed analysis, and experience-based recommendations to help derive and refine business requirements, surfacing gaps or better alternatives where they exist rather than simply executing a brief as written.</p> <p><em>Collaboration</em></p> <p>Work closely with data scientists, ML engineers, analysts, and business stakeholders to translate requirements into robust data solutions. Support adoption of data products and contribute to best practices across the data and AI ecosystem.</p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Must have qualifications</span></strong></p> <p><em>Technical skills</em></p> <p>Strong hands-on experience with Apache Spark and Delta Lake, and strong programming skills in Python and SQL. Proven experience building batch and streaming data pipelines and production-grade data platforms, with solid understanding of data modeling, data quality, and governance principles.</p> <p><em>Cloud &amp; Platforms (Key Requirement)</em></p> <p>Experience with one or more major cloud platforms, with preference for Microsoft Azure / Fabric, as well as AWS or GCP. Familiarity with modern data platforms such as Databricks and Snowflake is expected.</p> <p><em>Architecture &amp; Systems Thinking</em></p> <p>Experience with lakehouse architectures and distributed data systems, and strong understanding of scalability, reliability, and performance considerations in data pipelines.</p> <p><em>Mindset</em></p> <p>Naturally curious, with strong problem-solving skills focused on scalability and reliability, and a collaborative approach to working in cross-functional teams. Comfortable applying common sense thinking, detailed analysis, and experience-based recommendations to help derive and challenge business requirements rather than taking them at face value. Experience in Agile or consulting environments is beneficial.</p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Nice to have qualifications&nbsp;</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Experience with&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">GenAI and AI data systems</span><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;(e.g., RAG pipelines, vector databases, LLM data preparation), as well as CI/CD for data pipelines and infrastructure-as-code tools such as Terraform, ARM, or CloudFormation.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Additional&nbsp;exposure to&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">streaming technologies (e.g., Kafka)</span><span data-contrast="auto">, Spark optimization, or advanced analytics and ML workloads (including causal or experimentation platforms) is valuable. Experience building&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">data products or large-scale analytics platforms</span><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;is also beneficial.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Commitment to reaching all kinds of people</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">We design experiences that work for all kinds of people - and that starts with our own teams. At Valtech, we’re intentional about building an inclusive culture where everyone feels supported to grow, thrive and achieve their goals. No matter your background, you belong here. </span><a href="https://www.valtech.com/about/diversity-inclusion/" target="_blank"><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-charstyle="Hyperlink">Explore our Diversity &amp; Inclusion site</span></span></a><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;to see how we’re creating a more equitable Valtech for all.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong style="font-size: 14px;"><span data-contrast="auto">The benefits&nbsp;</span></strong><span style="font-size: 14px;" data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">This is a Full time position based in <strong>Kosovo</strong>.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Beyond a competitive compensation package, we offer:&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:false,&quot;134233118&quot;:false,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:240,&quot;335559739&quot;:240}">&nbsp;<br></span></p> <ul> <li>Health insurance that guarantees fast access to contracted health services</li> <li>Vacation Plan</li> <li>Subsidy for study materials, trainings, conferences and events that will contribute to your development</li> <li>Hybrid Working model</li> <li>Performance Evaluation Process that paves the roadmap for a personal and professional career development</li> <li>Refreshments and fruit in the office</li> <li>Team gatherings and parties organized and subsidized by the company</li> </ul> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Your application process</span></strong></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Once you apply, our Talent Acquisition team will review your application. Your CV should cover key information on relevant experiences and expertise. We do not require information such as age, gender, marital status, or a headshot in your application. We review all candidates based on skills, experience, and potential.</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">⚠️ Beware of recruitment fraud!</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">We are committed to inclusion and accessibility. If you need reasonable accommodations during the interview process, please either indicate it in your application or let your Talent Partner know.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">About Valtech</span></strong></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Valtech is the experience innovation company that exists to unlock a better way to experience the world. By blending crafts, categories, and cultures, we help brands unlock new value in an increasingly digital world.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">At the intersection of data, AI, creativity, and technology, we drive transformation for leading organizations, including L’Oréal, Mars, Audi, P&amp;G, Volkswagen Dolby, and more.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">At Valtech, we don’t just talk about transformation. We make it happen. Our people are the heart of our success, and we foster a workplace where everyone has the support to thrive, grow and innovate.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Are you ready to create what’s next? Join us.</span></p>

You will also play a key role in supporting AI and GenAI systems, enabling pipelines for machine learning, causal modeling, and LLM-powered applications such as RAG and agent-based systems.</p> <p>Our preferred platforms are Microsoft Azure / Fabric (primary), GCP, AWS, Databricks, and Snowflake, with Azure experience being highly transferable to Fabric. You will collaborate closely with data scientists, ML engineers, and platform teams to ensure the data foundation supports production-grade, decision-oriented AI systems.</p> <p><strong style="font-size: 14px;"><span data-contrast="auto">Role responsibilities</span></strong></p> <p><em>Build &amp; Data Platform Engineering</em></p> <p>Design and implement scalable data platforms and pipelines across cloud environments (Azure/Fabric, AWS, GCP, Databricks, Snowflake). This includes developing reliable batch, streaming, and near-real-time pipelines using technologies such as Spark and Delta Lake, and building ingestion, transformation, and curation workflows for both structured and unstructured data.</p> <p>You will implement modern data architectures including lakehouse patterns and medallion layering (bronze, silver, gold), ensuring systems are reusable, scalable, and aligned with enterprise needs.</p> <p><em>Enable AI, GenAI &amp; Data Products</em></p> <p>Deliver high-quality datasets that support analytics, machine learning, causal modeling, and optimization systems. You will enable data pipelines for GenAI use cases (including LLMs, RAG pipelines, and vector-based data flows), as well as agent-based architectures and intelligent workflows, ensuring that data is model-ready and production-grade.</p> <p><em>Data Modeling, Orchestration &amp; Automation</em></p> <p>Design scalable logical and physical data models for analytical and operational use cases, ensuring consistency across domains. Orchestrate workflows using tools such as Airflow, dbt, Lakeflow, or equivalents, with strong focus on automation, reliability, and maintainability of end-to-end pipelines.</p> <p><em>Architecture, Governance &amp; Observability</em></p> <p>Apply modern architecture patterns including event-driven and streaming architectures, and ensure adherence to best practices in data governance, lineage, quality, and access control (RBAC/ABAC).</p> <p>Establish strong data observability, including monitoring of data freshness, pipeline reliability, and SLA adherence, ensuring systems remain trustworthy and production-ready.</p> <p><em>Data Serving, Integration &amp; Optimization</em></p> <p>Enable data serving layers (APIs, feature inputs, analytical endpoints) to support downstream systems, including ML and AI platforms. Continuously monitor and optimize pipelines and infrastructure for performance, scalability, and cost efficiency.</p> <p><em>Requirements Discovery &amp; Business Partnership</em></p> <p>Bring genuine curiosity to every engagement — ask the right questions to understand not just what stakeholders are asking for, but why. Apply common sense thinking, detailed analysis, and experience-based recommendations to help derive and refine business requirements, surfacing gaps or better alternatives where they exist rather than simply executing a brief as written.</p> <p><em>Collaboration</em></p> <p>Work closely with data scientists, ML engineers, analysts, and business stakeholders to translate requirements into robust data solutions. Support adoption of data products and contribute to best practices across the data and AI ecosystem.</p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Must have qualifications</span></strong></p> <p><em>Technical skills</em></p> <p>Strong hands-on experience with Apache Spark and Delta Lake, and strong programming skills in Python and SQL. Proven experience building batch and streaming data pipelines and production-grade data platforms, with solid understanding of data modeling, data quality, and governance principles.</p> <p><em>Cloud &amp; Platforms (Key Requirement)</em></p> <p>Experience with one or more major cloud platforms, with preference for Microsoft Azure / Fabric, as well as AWS or GCP. Familiarity with modern data platforms such as Databricks and Snowflake is expected.</p> <p><em>Architecture &amp; Systems Thinking</em></p> <p>Experience with lakehouse architectures and distributed data systems, and strong understanding of scalability, reliability, and performance considerations in data pipelines.</p> <p><em>Mindset</em></p> <p>Naturally curious, with strong problem-solving skills focused on scalability and reliability, and a collaborative approach to working in cross-functional teams. Comfortable applying common sense thinking, detailed analysis, and experience-based recommendations to help derive and challenge business requirements rather than taking them at face value. Experience in Agile or consulting environments is beneficial.</p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Nice to have qualifications&nbsp;</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Experience with&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">GenAI and AI data systems</span><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;(e.g., RAG pipelines, vector databases, LLM data preparation), as well as CI/CD for data pipelines and infrastructure-as-code tools such as Terraform, ARM, or CloudFormation.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Additional&nbsp;exposure to&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">streaming technologies (e.g., Kafka)</span><span data-contrast="auto">, Spark optimization, or advanced analytics and ML workloads (including causal or experimentation platforms) is valuable. Experience building&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">data products or large-scale analytics platforms</span><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;is also beneficial.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Commitment to reaching all kinds of people</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">We design experiences that work for all kinds of people - and that starts with our own teams. At Valtech, we’re intentional about building an inclusive culture where everyone feels supported to grow, thrive and achieve their goals. No matter your background, you belong here. </span><a href="https://www.valtech.com/about/diversity-inclusion/" target="_blank"><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-charstyle="Hyperlink">Explore our Diversity &amp; Inclusion site</span></span></a><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;to see how we’re creating a more equitable Valtech for all.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong style="font-size: 14px;"><span data-contrast="auto">The benefits&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></strong></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Beyond a competitive compensation package, we offer:</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <ul> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Flexibility, with hybrid work options and 25 vacation days&nbsp;</span>for a healthy work-life balance.</li> <li>Co-subsidized transportation &amp; Multisport cards.</li> <li>Premium health insurance for fast and easy access to top healthcare services.</li> <li>Training policy for technical and other skills-related events, courses and certifications.</li> <li>Personal career development roadmap guided by performance evaluations.</li> <li>Self-care program offering psychological consultations &amp; discussions for you and the team.</li> <li>Cozy office space designed for comfort and productivity.</li> <li>Exciting team events and company gatherings.</li> </ul> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Your application process</span></strong></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Once you apply, our Talent Acquisition team will review your application. Your CV should cover key information on relevant experiences and expertise. We do not require information such as age, gender, marital status, or a headshot in your application. We review all candidates based on skills, experience, and potential.</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">⚠️ Beware of recruitment fraud!</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">We are committed to inclusion and accessibility. If you need reasonable accommodations during the interview process, please either indicate it in your application or let your Talent Partner know.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">About Valtech</span></strong></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Valtech is the experience innovation company that exists to unlock a better way to experience the world. By blending crafts, categories, and cultures, we help brands unlock new value in an increasingly digital world.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">At the intersection of data, AI, creativity, and technology, we drive transformation for leading organizations, including L’Oréal, Mars, Audi, P&amp;G, Volkswagen Dolby, and more.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">At Valtech, we don’t just talk about transformation. We make it happen. Our people are the heart of our success, and we foster a workplace where everyone has the support to thrive, grow and innovate.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Are you ready to create what’s next? Join us.</span></p>

This includes developing reliable batch, streaming, and near-real-time pipelines using technologies such as Spark and Delta Lake, and building ingestion, transformation, and curation workflows for both structured and unstructured data.</p> <p>You will implement modern data architectures including lakehouse patterns and medallion layering (bronze, silver, gold), ensuring systems are reusable, scalable, and aligned with enterprise needs.</p> <p><em>Enable AI, GenAI &amp; Data Products</em></p> <p>Deliver high-quality datasets that support analytics, machine learning, causal modeling, and optimization systems. You will enable data pipelines for GenAI use cases (including LLMs, RAG pipelines, and vector-based data flows), as well as agent-based architectures and intelligent workflows, ensuring that data is model-ready and production-grade.</p> <p><em>Data Modeling, Orchestration &amp; Automation</em></p> <p>Design scalable logical and physical data models for analytical and operational use cases, ensuring consistency across domains. Orchestrate workflows using tools such as Airflow, dbt, Lakeflow, or equivalents, with strong focus on automation, reliability, and maintainability of end-to-end pipelines.</p> <p><em>Architecture, Governance &amp; Observability</em></p> <p>Apply modern architecture patterns including event-driven and streaming architectures, and ensure adherence to best practices in data governance, lineage, quality, and access control (RBAC/ABAC).</p> <p>Establish strong data observability, including monitoring of data freshness, pipeline reliability, and SLA adherence, ensuring systems remain trustworthy and production-ready.</p> <p><em>Data Serving, Integration &amp; Optimization</em></p> <p>Enable data serving layers (APIs, feature inputs, analytical endpoints) to support downstream systems, including ML and AI platforms. Continuously monitor and optimize pipelines and infrastructure for performance, scalability, and cost efficiency.</p> <p><em>Requirements Discovery &amp; Business Partnership</em></p> <p>Bring genuine curiosity to every engagement — ask the right questions to understand not just what stakeholders are asking for, but why. Apply common sense thinking, detailed analysis, and experience-based recommendations to help derive and refine business requirements, surfacing gaps or better alternatives where they exist rather than simply executing a brief as written.</p> <p><em>Collaboration</em></p> <p>Work closely with data scientists, ML engineers, analysts, and business stakeholders to translate requirements into robust data solutions. Support adoption of data products and contribute to best practices across the data and AI ecosystem.</p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Must have qualifications</span></strong></p> <p><em>Technical skills</em></p> <p>Strong hands-on experience with Apache Spark and Delta Lake, and strong programming skills in Python and SQL. Proven experience building batch and streaming data pipelines and production-grade data platforms, with solid understanding of data modeling, data quality, and governance principles.</p> <p><em>Cloud &amp; Platforms (Key Requirement)</em></p> <p>Experience with one or more major cloud platforms, with preference for Microsoft Azure / Fabric, as well as AWS or GCP. Familiarity with modern data platforms such as Databricks and Snowflake is expected.</p> <p><em>Architecture &amp; Systems Thinking</em></p> <p>Experience with lakehouse architectures and distributed data systems, and strong understanding of scalability, reliability, and performance considerations in data pipelines.</p> <p><em>Mindset</em></p> <p>Naturally curious, with strong problem-solving skills focused on scalability and reliability, and a collaborative approach to working in cross-functional teams. Comfortable applying common sense thinking, detailed analysis, and experience-based recommendations to help derive and challenge business requirements rather than taking them at face value. Experience in Agile or consulting environments is beneficial.</p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Nice to have qualifications&nbsp;</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Experience with&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">GenAI and AI data systems</span><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;(e.g., RAG pipelines, vector databases, LLM data preparation), as well as CI/CD for data pipelines and infrastructure-as-code tools such as Terraform, ARM, or CloudFormation.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Additional&nbsp;exposure to&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">streaming technologies (e.g., Kafka)</span><span data-contrast="auto">, Spark optimization, or advanced analytics and ML workloads (including causal or experimentation platforms) is valuable. Experience building&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">data products or large-scale analytics platforms</span><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;is also beneficial.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Commitment to reaching all kinds of people</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">We design experiences that work for all kinds of people - and that starts with our own teams. At Valtech, we’re intentional about building an inclusive culture where everyone feels supported to grow, thrive and achieve their goals. No matter your background, you belong here. </span><a href="https://www.valtech.com/about/diversity-inclusion/" target="_blank"><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-charstyle="Hyperlink">Explore our Diversity &amp; Inclusion site</span></span></a><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;to see how we’re creating a more equitable Valtech for all.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">The benefits </span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></strong></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">This is a position based in&nbsp;<strong>Poland</strong>.&nbsp;</span></p> <h4>Mental and physical health:</h4> <ul> <li>24 working days of paid vacation</li> <li>National holidays covered</li> <li>Sick leave (up to 20/year)</li> <li>Unpaid leave (up to 20/year)</li> <li>Medical insurance</li> <li>Multisport card OR Multikafeteria</li> <li>Maternity &amp; paternity leave support</li> </ul> <h4><strong>Personal and professional development:</strong></h4> <ul> <li>Internal workshops &amp; learning initiatives</li> <li>Professional certifications reimbursement</li> <li>Participation in professional local &amp; global communities</li> <li>Growth Framework to manage expectations and define the steps to move towards the selected career</li> <li>Mentoring program with the ability to become a mentor or a mentee to grow to a higher position</li> </ul> <p>Valtech Poland has a system of progressive benefit packages –&nbsp;<strong>the longer you stay with the company, the more benefits you get!</strong></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Beyond a competitive compensation p</span><span data-contrast="auto">ackage, we offer:</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <ul> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Flexibility, with remote and hybrid work options (country-dependent)</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Career advancement, with international mobility and professional development programs</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Learning and development, with access to cutting-edge tools, training and industry experts</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></li> </ul> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Your application process</span></strong></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Once you apply, our Talent Acquisition team will review your application. Your CV should cover key information on relevant experiences and expertise. We do not require information such as age, gender, marital status, or a headshot in your application. We review all candidates based on skills, experience, and potential.</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">⚠️ Beware of recruitment fraud!</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">We are committed to inclusion and accessibility. If you need reasonable accommodations during the interview process, please either indicate it in your application or let your Talent Partner know.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">About Valtech</span></strong></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Valtech is the experience innovation company that exists to unlock a better way to experience the world. By blending crafts, categories, and cultures, we help brands unlock new value in an increasingly digital world.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">At the intersection of data, AI, creativity, and technology, we drive transformation for leading organizations, including L’Oréal, Mars, Audi, P&amp;G, Volkswagen Dolby, and more.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">At Valtech, we don’t just talk about transformation. We make it happen. Our people are the heart of our success, and we foster a workplace where everyone has the support to thrive, grow and innovate.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Are you ready to create what’s next? Join us.</span></p>

By blending crafts, categories, and cultures, we help brands unlock new value in an increasingly digital world.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">At the intersection of data, AI, creativity, and technology, we drive transformation for leading organizations, including L’Oréal, Mars, Audi, P&amp;G, Volkswagen Dolby, and more.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">At Valtech, we don’t just talk about transformation. We make it happen. Our people are the heart of our success, and we foster a workplace where everyone has the support to thrive, grow and innovate.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Are you ready to create what’s next? Join us.</span></p>

title: Senior Data Analytics Engineer
full_description: <p><strong>Why us?&nbsp;</strong></p> <p><em data-stringify-type="italic">Insurify is one of the America’s fastest-growing MIT FinTech startups and has been recognized as one of Inc. 5,000’s fastest-growing private companies in America in 2025, 2024, 2023, 2022 and 2021, Forbes Fintech 50 List for 2023, 2022, and 2021, Forbes Next Billion Dollar Startups of 2022 global and Top 100 InsurTech company. We’re changing the way millions of people compare, buy and manage insurance with artificial intelligence, technology, and superior product design.<br><br></em><em data-stringify-type="italic">Our company vision is to be recognized as the preeminent and most trusted digital agent for insurance comparison, purchase, and management. Our team is critical to achieving our vision and fostering the right culture is essential to our team’s success.</em></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>How you will make an impact:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Lead cross-functional projects from ideation to execution with a high degree of independence and maximum impact</li> <li>Solve high velocity, high impact analytics problems</li> <li>Scale the business using data</li> <li>Work on a mix of analytics engineering, business analytics, and data science using SQL and Python</li> <li>Build scalable data infrastructure that solves real problems</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Sample projects:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Operate and improve a data product to serve evolving business needs</li> <li>Refactor data system to scale with increased volume and new requirements</li> <li>Build new data pipelines to support tracking of new business initiatives&nbsp;</li> <li>Champion usage of new tools and systems to improve team processes</li> <li>Improve the prediction accuracy of our customer acquisition machine-learning bidding algorithms</li> <li>Perform customer segmentation analysis to discover where to improve Insurify products</li> <li>Improve alerting systems to help us triage data quality issues at scale</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Key Skills + Background</strong></p> <ul> <li>3-4 years of experience, record of impact and success in a similar role (Analytics or Data Engineering, Data Science, Data Analysis)</li> <li>Expertise in and real-world experience with SQL</li> <li>Exposure to data warehousing and ETL concepts&nbsp;</li> <li>Strong quantitative and programming skills - Python (preferred) R, Rust, Go, Ruby, C++ also good</li> <li>Bachelors / Masters in Mathematics, Engineering, CS, Economics, or other technical major</li> <li>Quick learning ability and a drive suitable for the startup hustle.</li> <li>A positive team player with a solid work ethic who is ready to pivot between projects, learn from mistakes, always move forward, and help build the next big thing in insurance!</li> </ul> <p><strong><br>Benefits</strong></p> <ul> <li>Employee stock options</li> <li>25 days annual leave</li> <li>Enhanced private medical, dental and vision insurance plans</li> <li>Yearly wellbeing budget or Multisport card</li> <li>Personal budget for learning and books</li> <li>Employee Assistance Program and other wellbeing perks</li> <li>Office kitchen and fun area with snacks and beverages</li> <li>Regular social events</li> <li>Friendly office culture</li> <li>Hybrid office</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><div><em>We are proud to be </em><strong><em>an Equal Employment Opportunity and Affirmative Action employer.</em></strong></div></div>

title: Analytics Engineer
full_description: <div class="ace-line"> <div class="ace-line" data-node-type="line"> <div class="page" data-page-number="1" data-loaded="true"> <div class="textLayer">&nbsp;</div> </div> </div> </div> <p><strong>WHAT IS BOX?</strong></p> <p>Box (NYSE:BOX) is the leader in Intelligent Content Management. Our platform enables organizations to fuel collaboration, manage the entire content lifecycle, secure critical content, and transform business workflows with enterprise AI. We help companies thrive in the new AI-first era of business. Founded in 2005, Box simplifies work for leading global organizations, including JLL, Morgan Stanley, and Nationwide. Box is headquartered in Redwood City, CA, with offices across the United States, Europe, and Asia.</p> <p>By joining Box, you will have the unique opportunity to continue driving our platform forward. Content powers how we work. It’s the billions of files and information flowing across teams, departments, and key business processes every single day: contracts, invoices, employee records, financials, product specs, marketing assets, and more. Our mission is to bring intelligence to the world of content management and empower our customers to completely transform workflows across their organizations. With the combination of AI and enterprise content, the opportunity has never been greater to transform how the world works together and at Box you will be on the front lines of this massive shift.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>WHY BOX NEEDS YOU</strong></p> <p>Business Analytics at Box is growing, and with it the need for a consistent and trusted data foundation for decision-making at scale. As an Analytics Engineer you will develop and own that foundation: well-designed data models and pipelines, governed metric definitions, systematic testing and quality monitoring, and standards that enable the team to build on it consistently. You will also build workflows and automations that let our data products meet our stakeholders where they are, from Slack to Salesforce.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>WHAT YOU'LL DO</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>Evolve our dbt project toward modular, documented and tested data models organized in clear layers, from raw sources to marts</p> </li> <li> <p>Shape our semantic layer from its early stages: define how metrics are modeled and governed, and drive its adoption</p> </li> <li> <p>Shape the data modeling standards and conventions for the Business Analytics team, and uphold them through code review, pairing, and documentation</p> </li> <li> <p>Partner with Data Scientists and Data Analysts to design the datasets their analyses, dashboards, and ML models are built on</p> </li> <li> <p>Build out our data testing practices and enforce them in CI, implement observability over our data</p> </li> <li> <p>Diagnose upstream data issues and drive them to resolution by partnering with Data Engineering and Enterprise Systems teams</p> </li> <li> <p>Build and maintain the Prefect workflows that put our data and models to work</p> </li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>WHO YOU ARE</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>3+ years of experience in analytics engineering, data engineering or a comparable data role, working with large amounts of data</p> </li> <li> <p>Expert in SQL - able to write and review complex queries with confidence</p> </li> <li> <p>Solid understanding of data modeling principles and hands-on experience with dbt or a comparable transformation framework</p> </li> <li> <p>Engineering discipline applied to analytics code: version control, code review, testing, and CI are your defaults, and you can bring a team along to work the same way</p> </li> <li> <p>Comfortable with Python, with experience in a workflow orchestration tool (Prefect, Airflow, Dagster)</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with a cloud data warehouse; BigQuery is a plus</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience supporting and working with cross-functional teams in a dynamic environment</p> </li> <li> <p>A proactive mindset - you look for improvements before anyone asks, and you challenge the status quo when you see a better way</p> </li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>BENEFITS</strong><br>Check out the <a href="https://careers.box.com/en/life-at-box/" target="_blank" data-attrib-id="link-5bdab7d9-385c-4446-83cf-46c01577c385"><u>overview of Life at Box</u></a> which include general perks and benefits.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Box lives its values, with community and in-person collaboration being a core part of our culture. Boxers are expected to work from their assigned office a minimum of 3 days per week. Your Recruiter will share more about how we work and company culture during the hiring process.</p> <p>At Box, we believe unique and diverse experiences benefit our culture, our products, our customers, our company, and our world. We aim to recruit a passionate, high-performing workforce that reflects the world we live in.<strong> </strong>If you are head-over-heels about this role but unsure if you meet all the requirements, we encourage you to apply!</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>EQUAL OPPORTUNITY</strong></p> <p>We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability, and any other protected ground of discrimination under applicable human rights legislation.</p> <p>For details on how we protect your information when you apply, please see our <a href="https://cloud.app.box.com/v/BoxPersonnelPrivacyNotice" target="_blank" data-attrib-id="link-0a851a0c-ace5-49d6-85f3-26e3848831ae"><u>Personnel Privacy Notice</u></a>.</p> <p>For more details on how Box Poland protects your information, please see our <a href="https://cloud.box.com/s/tyclibn73pmofpdub2x65639ykknbiwj" target="_blank" data-attrib-id="link-f6301c2f-1637-4faa-9199-0feaad11ec67"><u>Supplemental Personnel and Candidate Privacy Notice</u></a>.&nbsp;</p> <p>#LI-Hybrid</p> <p class="p3">&nbsp;</p>

title: Data Engineer III
full_description: <div class="ace-line"> <div class="ace-line" data-node-type="line"> <div class="page" data-page-number="1" data-loaded="true"> <div class="textLayer"> <p data-pm-slice="1 1 []"><strong>WHAT IS BOX?</strong></p> <p>Box (NYSE:BOX) is the leader in Intelligent Content Management. Our platform enables organizations to fuel collaboration, manage the entire content lifecycle, secure critical content, and transform business workflows with enterprise AI. We help companies thrive in the new AI-first era of business. Founded in 2005, Box simplifies work for leading global organizations, including JLL, Morgan Stanley, and Nationwide. Box is headquartered in Redwood City, CA, with offices across the United States, Europe, and Asia.</p> <p>By joining Box, you will have the unique opportunity to continue driving our platform forward. Content powers how we work. It’s the billions of files and information flowing across teams, departments, and key business processes every single day: contracts, invoices, employee records, financials, product specs, marketing assets, and more. Our mission is to bring intelligence to the world of content management and empower our customers to completely transform workflows across their organizations. With the combination of AI and enterprise content, the opportunity has never been greater to transform how the world works together and at Box you will be on the front lines of this massive shift.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>WHY BOX NEEDS YOU</strong></p> <p>Data Engineering initiative inside box is expanding and this role will help build the data platform engineering features and capabilities of the cloud cost management platform.&nbsp;</p> <p>In this role you will be working alongside our team building data pipelines, support our product and analytics team members, data analysts and data scientists on data initiatives and will ensure optimal data delivery architecture is consistent throughout ongoing projects.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>WHAT YOU'LL DO</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>Work with a team of high-performing data engineers and analysts to identify business opportunities, design and build scalable data solutions</p> </li> </ul> <ul> <li> <p>Build and own data pipelines that clean, transform, and aggregate data from disparate sources</p> </li> <li> <p>Create and maintain optimal data pipeline architecture</p> </li> <li> <p>Assemble large, complex data sets that meet functional / non-functional business requirements</p> </li> <li> <p>Identify, design, and implement internal process improvements: automating manual processes, optimizing data delivery, re-designing infrastructure for greater scalability</p> </li> <li> <p>Build the infrastructure required for optimal extraction, transformation, and loading of data from a wide variety of data sources using GCP BigQuery and Spark</p> </li> <li> <p>Build analytics tools that utilize the data pipeline to provide actionable insights into operational efficiency and other key business performance metrics</p> </li> <li> <p>Work with stakeholders including the Executive, Product, Data and Design teams to assist with data-related technical issues and support their data infrastructure needs</p> </li> <li> <p>Create data tools for analytics and data scientist team members that assist them in building and optimizing our product into an innovative industry leader</p> </li> </ul> <ul> <li> <p>Influence across teams and other functions, build best practices across the organization&nbsp;</p> </li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>WHO YOU ARE</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>3+ Years of relevant industry or relevant academia experience working with large amounts of data</p> </li> </ul> <ul> <li> <p>Experience building and optimizing scalable data pipelines, architectures and data sets</p> </li> <li> <p>Be cognizant of emerging technology trends and find adoption opportunities to improve existing development processes</p> </li> <li> <p>Expert in SQL</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with scripting language: Python or NodeJS</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with GCP (BigQuery, Dataproc, Dataflow/Fusion)</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with big data tools like: Hadoop, Spark, Kafka, etc</p> </li> <li> <p>Strong analytic skills related to working with structured and unstructured datasets</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience supporting and working with cross-functional teams in a dynamic environment</p> </li> <li> <p>Familiarity with Virtualization/container abstractions and orchestration (Kubernetes or Docker, etc.)</p> </li> <li> <p>Familiarity with Visualization software: Tableau</p> </li> <li>Familiarity with frontend web framework: React</li> <li>Preferred skills<br> <ul> <li>Experience with at least one of the programming languages: Scala, Java</li> </ul> </li> </ul> <p><strong>BENEFITS</strong><br>Check out the <a href="https://careers.box.com/en/life-at-box/" target="_blank" data-attrib-id="link-b61f0db5-0548-4250-a484-76420896de86">overview of Life at Box</a> which include general perks and benefits.</p> <p>Box lives its values, with community and in-person collaboration being a core part of our culture. Boxers are expected to work from their assigned office a minimum of 3 days per week. Your Recruiter will share more about how we work and company culture during the hiring process.</p> <p>At Box, we believe unique and diverse experiences benefit our culture, our products, our customers, our company, and our world. We aim to recruit a passionate, high-performing workforce that reflects the world we live in.<strong> </strong>If you are head-over-heels about this role but unsure if you meet all the requirements, we encourage you to apply!</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>EQUAL OPPORTUNITY</strong></p> <p>We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability, and any other protected ground of discrimination under applicable human rights legislation.</p> <p>For details on how we protect your information when you apply, please see our <a href="https://cloud.app.box.com/v/BoxPersonnelPrivacyNotice" target="_blank" data-attrib-id="link-4df2d2d2-8ee8-48cc-94c4-0df1bdf563cd">Personnel Privacy Notice</a>.</p> <p>For more details on how Box Poland protects your information, please see our <a href="https://cloud.box.com/s/tyclibn73pmofpdub2x65639ykknbiwj" target="_blank" data-attrib-id="link-a5d559af-6b3d-4790-8f28-beeb6c09338f">Supplemental Personnel and Candidate Privacy Notice</a>.&nbsp;</p> <p>#LI-Hybrid</p> <p>#LI-KS2</p> </div> </div> </div> </div>

title: Principal Data Engineer
full_description: <p>We are building the Data Hub, a centralized data platform responsible for consolidating legacy data infrastructure, establishing enterprise-grade data foundations, and enabling advanced analytics and AI capabilities across Precision AQ.</p> <p>The Principal Data Engineer is a senior technical leader and hands-on contributor responsible for the design, implementation, optimization, and operation of the Data Hub’s core platform capabilities. This role sits at the intersection of data engineering, platform engineering, DevOps, architecture, and data governance. You will help define the technical direction of the platform while remaining actively involved in designing solutions, building infrastructure, reviewing code, troubleshooting production issues, and improving engineering practices.</p> <p>This is not a management role. While you will mentor and guide junior engineers, analytics engineers, and platform contributors, you will not have direct reports. We are looking for an experienced practitioner who enjoys solving complex technical challenges, setting high engineering standards, and leading through expertise and influence rather than organizational hierarchy.</p> <p>As a member of the Data Hub leadership team, you will contribute to technology strategy, roadmap prioritization, architecture governance, vendor evaluation, and executive reporting while remaining deeply engaged in day-to-day engineering activities.</p> <p><strong>Main duties and responsibilities&nbsp;</strong></p> <p><strong>Infrastructure and Platform Engineering</strong></p> <ul> <li>Design, build, and maintain scalable, secure, and reliable cloud-native data platform infrastructure.</li> <li>Develop infrastructure-as-code, CI/CD pipelines, deployment automation, and environment management processes.</li> <li>Partner with Corporate IT, Security, and platform vendors to ensure compliance, reliability, and operational excellence.</li> <li>Improve platform observability through monitoring, alerting, logging, and performance tracking.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Data Architecture and Modelling</strong></p> <ul> <li>Design scalable data models supporting analytics, reporting, AI/ML, and operational use cases.</li> <li>Define and evolve data architecture standards, patterns, and best practices across the Data Hub ecosystem.</li> <li>Ensure data solutions align with governance, lineage, security, and regulatory requirements.</li> <li>Guide engineering teams in implementing maintainable and extensible data structures.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Data Engineering and Solution Delivery</strong></p> <ul> <li>Build and optimize data ingestion, transformation, and delivery pipelines across multiple business domains.</li> <li>Lead technical design reviews and contribute directly to implementation of complex data engineering initiatives.</li> <li>Collaborate with Product, Analytics, AI/ML, and business stakeholders to translate requirements into scalable technical solutions.</li> <li>Provide hands-on support for critical platform initiatives, migrations, and modernization programs.</li> </ul> <p><strong>DevOps and Engineering Excellence</strong></p> <ul> <li>Establish and enforce software engineering, GitOps, DevOps, testing, and deployment standards.</li> <li>Drive automation across development, deployment, monitoring, and operational processes.</li> <li>Promote best practices for code quality, documentation, technical debt management, and release management.</li> <li>Conduct architecture reviews and code reviews to ensure consistency and maintainability.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Quality, Performance, and Reliability Optimization</strong></p> <ul> <li>Identify and resolve performance bottlenecks across pipelines, databases, and infrastructure.</li> <li>Define and implement data quality frameworks, automated validation processes, and operational controls.</li> <li>Optimize platform cost, scalability, reliability, and processing efficiency.</li> <li>Lead root-cause analysis and remediation efforts for production incidents and operational challenges.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Technical Leadership and Mentorship</strong></p> <ul> <li>Mentor Data Engineers, Analytics Engineers, and other technical contributors through coaching, code reviews, pair programming, and design guidance.</li> <li>Act as a trusted technical advisor across multiple teams and business units.</li> <li>Share knowledge, develop engineering standards, and promote continuous improvement across the Data Hub organization.</li> <li>Help elevate the technical capabilities of the broader engineering team.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Strategic Planning and Cross-Functional Collaboration</strong></p> <ul> <li>Participate in Data Hub leadership activities, including roadmap planning, prioritization discussions, technology evaluations, and executive reporting.</li> <li>Provide technical recommendations on platform investments, vendor selection, architecture direction, and engineering standards.</li> <li>Collaborate closely with Data Product Management, AI/ML teams, business stakeholders, and Corporate IT to ensure alignment between business priorities and technical execution.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Education and Experience</strong></p> <p><strong>Education: </strong>Bachelor’s degree in computer science, engineering, Information Systems, or related field. Equivalent experience considered. Advance degree preferred but not required.</p> <p><strong>Required:</strong></p> <ul> <li>8+ years of experience in Data Engineering, Platform Engineering, Infrastructure Engineering, or related technical disciplines.</li> <li>Demonstrated expertise designing and implementing modern cloud-based data platforms.</li> <li>Strong hands-on experience with data warehousing, orchestration, transformation, and DevOps technologies.</li> <li>Experience building and optimizing large-scale data pipelines and data models.</li> <li>Deep understanding of software engineering principles, infrastructure automation, and production operations.</li> <li>Experience operating in highly regulated, compliance-sensitive, or enterprise environments.</li> <li>Proven track record of leading technical initiatives through influence rather than direct authority.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Preferred:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience within healthcare, life sciences, pharmaceutical, or analytics organizations.</li> <li>Experience supporting AI/ML platforms, MLOps capabilities, feature stores, or model deployment frameworks.</li> <li>Familiarity with claims, formulary, commercial, or real-world evidence datasets.</li> <li>Experience leading enterprise-scale data migrations, modernization programs, or platform consolidations.</li> <li>Exposure to global engineering teams and distributed delivery models.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Knowledge, Skills and Competencies</strong></p> <p><strong>Technical Expertise</strong></p> <ul> <li>Advanced knowledge of cloud data platforms, modern data architecture, and platform engineering.</li> <li>Deep expertise in data modelling, query optimization, and analytical data design.</li> <li>Ability to evaluate and select appropriate technologies, frameworks, and architectural approaches.</li> <li>Expert-level SQL and strong Python skills.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Infrastructure and DevOps</strong></p> <ul> <li>Strong understanding of CI/CD, GitOps, Infrastructure-as-Code, containerization, and deployment automation.</li> <li>Experience implementing operational monitoring, incident management, alerting, and observability solutions.</li> <li>Knowledge of security, access management, and platform governance best practices.</li> <li>Strong understanding of scalability, resilience, and performance engineering.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Leadership and Influence</strong></p> <ul> <li>Leads through credibility, expertise, and collaboration rather than formal authority.&nbsp;Strong mentoring and coaching capabilities.</li> <li>Comfortable facilitating technical discussions and driving consensus among diverse stakeholders and ability to influence architecture and technology decisions across teams.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Communication and Collaboration</strong></p> <ul> <li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills and able to communicate complex technical concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences.</li> <li>Effective stakeholder management across engineering, product, business, and executive teams.&nbsp;Strong decision-making and prioritization skills in ambiguous environments.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Technical Environment</strong></p> <p>You will work across a modern data and AI ecosystem that may include:</p> <ul> <li>Data Platforms: Snowflake, AWS Redshift, S3</li> <li>Transformation: dbt, Matillion</li> <li>Orchestration: Airflow, Dagster</li> <li>Data Governance: Snowflake Horizon</li> <li>Data Quality: dbt tests, Elementary</li> <li>Infrastructure &amp; DevOps: Terraform, GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps</li> <li>AI/ML: Snowpark ML, MLflow, Snowflake Feature Store, LangChain</li> <li>Languages: SQL, Python</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p><div title: Senior Clinical Data Engineer (LATAM)
location: Remote, Argentina; Remote, Brazil; Remote, Chile; Remote, Colombia; Remote, Mexico; Remote, Peru
full_description: <p>We’re expanding our data engineering capabilities across <strong>Mexico, Brazil, Argentina, Colombia, Chile, and Peru</strong>, and we’re hiring a Senior Clinical Data Engineer to help build the foundation of this new regional function. In this role, you’ll lead the development and optimization of clinical data systems, drive data standardization, build validation frameworks, and design high‑performance databases and pipelines across global trials.</p> <p>The Senior Clinical Data Engineer leads the strategic development and optimization of clinical data systems to support regulatory compliance, advanced analytics, and operational excellence across global trials.</p> <p>This role drives enterprise-level data standardization initiatives, and architects scalable validation frameworks to proactively address systemic data issues. With deep expertise in Python, R, SQL, and SAS, the engineer builds and maintains modular codebases, sets coding standards, and mentors junior engineers. The role also oversees regulatory alignment with GCP and FDA 21 CFR Part 11, establishing robust documentation and audit trail protocols. Through dynamic dashboards and analytics tools, the engineer delivers actionable insights into trial performance and data quality. As a strategic liaison across Biostatistics, Clinical Operations, and Regulatory Affairs, the engineer translates clinical requirements into scalable technical solutions and leads the design of secure, high-performance databases and ETL pipelines integrating data from diverse clinical systems.</p> <p><strong>Essential functions of the job include but are not limited to:</strong><br><br><strong>Data Standardization &amp; Mapping:</strong> Spearhead the development of enterprise-level data mapping strategies that transform raw clinical data into standardized formats for high-impact analytics. Lead the adoption and governance of data standards across programs to ensure regulatory alignment and consistency.</p> <p><strong>Data Quality Assurance:</strong> Design and implement robust, scalable validation frameworks that proactively detect and resolve systemic data issues. Serve as a strategic partner to Clinical Data Managers and cross-functional teams, driving continuous improvement in data integrity across global trials</p> <p><strong>Programming &amp; Scripting:</strong> Architect and maintain advanced, modular codebases using Python, R, SQL, and SAS to support complex data engineering workflows. Establish coding standards and mentor junior engineers in automation, reproducibility, and performance optimization. Example use cases includes edit checks, reconciliations, exception listings, programmed protocol deviations, resource projections based on site data entry volume</p> <p><strong>Regulatory Compliance &amp; Documentation:</strong> Lead compliance initiatives to ensure all data systems and workflows meet GCP, FDA 21 CFR Part 11, and evolving global regulatory requirements. Define documentation protocols and oversee audit trail governance to support inspection readiness and transparency.<br>Reporting &amp; Visualization - Develop and operationalize dynamic dashboards and analytics tools that provide real-time insights into data quality, trial progress, and operational KPIs. Translate complex datasets into actionable intelligence for clinical and regulatory stakeholders.</p> <p><strong>Collaboration &amp; Cross-Functional Support:</strong> Act as a strategic liaison between Clinical Data Engineering and Biostatistics, Clinical Operations, and Regulatory Affairs. Translate clinical and scientific requirements into scalable technical solutions that support study execution and data delivery.</p> <p><strong>Database Design &amp; Optimization:</strong> Lead the design and optimization of secure, high-performance relational databases and data lakes. Ensure infrastructure scalability, query efficiency, and data governance for large-scale clinical datasets.</p> <p><strong>Qualifications:</strong></p> <p>Minimum Required:</p> <ul> <li>Bachelor’s Degree in a relevant field (life sciences, statistics, data management, clinical operations) or relevant/equivalent combination of education, training, and experience</li> <li>Minimum 6 years experience in clinical monitoring, clinical trial management or equivalent</li> <li>Advanced programming and automation skills; database design; dashboard development; CDISC governance</li> <li>Professional working proficiency in English</li> </ul> <p>Other Required:</p> <ul> <li>Highly effective oral and written communication skills with the ability to communicate effectively with project team members</li> <li>Excellent organizational and time management skills</li> <li>Ability to work in a team or independently as required</li> <li>Demonstrated ability to learn how to extract pertinent information from protocols, electronic study data systems and clinical systems</li> <li>Proficiency in statistical analysis and data monitoring tools.</li> <li>Detail-oriented with strong analytical and problem-solving skills</li> <li>Demonstrated experience with integrated risk planning &amp; management</li> <li>Ability to mentor junior team members</li> </ul> <p>Preferred:</p> <ul> <li>CRO experience as a Clinical Data Engineer or Programmer</li> </ul> <p>Skills:</p> <ul> <li>Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to data quality and integrity.</li> <li>Ability to work with large, complex datasets from multiple sources.</li> <li>Effective communication skills to collaborate with cross-functional teams.</li> <li>Knowledge of data governance, privacy, and security best practices in clinical research.</li> </ul> <p>Competencies:</p> <ul> <li><strong>Collaboration:</strong> Works effectively with clinical, statistical, and technical teams to align data strategies with study goals.</li> <li><strong>Accountability:</strong> Takes ownership of data engineering deliverables and ensures timely, high-quality outputs.</li> <li><strong>Adaptability:</strong> Thrives in a fast-paced, evolving environment with shifting priorities and timelines.</li> <li><strong>Compliance-Oriented:</strong> Maintains a strong focus on regulatory compliance and data traceability.</li> </ul> <p></p> <p style="margin: 0in; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt;">#LI-AG2 #LI-REMOTE</p> <p></p><div class="content-conclusion"><hr> <p>Any data provided as a part of this application will be stored in accordance with our&nbsp;<a href="https://nam12.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.precisionmedicinegrp.com%2Fprivacy-policy%2F&amp;data=05%7C01%7Czeta.larcon%40precisionmedicinegrp.com%7Cb58fe8b0c3ea4dd2e79d08db5bd09a25%7Cb71ff3f628164ca8a9b938f820f91ad1%7C0%7C0%7C638204723732367131%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C3000%7C%7C%7C&amp;sdata=9DgboiHTFPrNYVhdKhyfdwVyNYwUvZbP%2FroLdWIIfxw%3D&amp;reserved=0">Privacy Policy.</a>&nbsp;For CA applicants, please also refer to our&nbsp;<a href="https://nam12.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.precisionmedicinegrp.com%2Fca-applicants-privacy-notice%2F&amp;data=05%7C01%7Czeta.larcon%40precisionmedicinegrp.com%7Cb58fe8b0c3ea4dd2e79d08db5bd09a25%7Cb71ff3f628164ca8a9b938f820f91ad1%7C0%7C0%7C638204723732367131%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C3000%7C%7C%7C&amp;sdata=tfAqqMZsG%2B11IchL45HFFVbfECCkYqQpNr0PQxrMFJU%3D&amp;reserved=0">CA Privacy Notice</a>.</p> <p>Precision Medicine Group is an Equal Opportunity Employer. title: Data Engineer
full_description: <h3><strong>About Pedestal Health</strong></h3> <p>Pedestal Health (formerly Target RWE) combines deep health system partnerships, longitudinal data curation at scale, and modern study design to build continuous, high-quality evidence for life sciences organizations. The company partners with pharmaceutical and biotech companies, providers and payers to generate rigorous, multimodal evidence that supports clinical, regulatory and strategic decision-making across the full lifecycle of care. Pedestal Health is committed to advancing medical decision making to improve outcomes for patients. Pedestal Health is a Highlander Health company. Learn more at<a href="http://pedestalhealth.com/">&nbsp;pedestalhealth.com</a>.</p> <h3><strong>The Role</strong></h3> <p>We are seeking a talented <strong>Data Engineer </strong>to join our Technology team. In this role, you will develop, create, and modify computer application software and databases to drive operational efficiency and improve business processes. You will collaborate closely with stakeholders to analyze user needs, design custom software solutions, and implement scalable, reliable applications that support Pedestal Health’s mission.</p> <h3><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Design and implement data pipelines and software solutions that promote operational efficiency and scalability.</li> <li>Analyze business requirements and work with stakeholders to translate needs into technical solutions.</li> <li>Write clean, maintainable code primarily in Python, with a strong emphasis on SQL for data manipulation and transformation.</li> <li>Support and optimize cloud-based data infrastructure (AWS preferred).</li> <li>Develop and modify databases to support internal applications.</li> <li>Collaborate with operations and product teams to support deployment, testing, and maintenance.</li> <li>Help troubleshoot production issues and contribute to ongoing improvement efforts.</li> <li>Stay up to date on relevant tools, technologies, and best practices.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>What You’ll Bring</strong></h3> <ul> <li>3+ years of software development experience, ideally in data engineering, data platform development, or backend systems.</li> <li>Strong proficiency in SQL and Python.</li> <li>Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and working in cloud-native environments.</li> <li>Familiarity with version control and CI/CD tools (e.g., GitLab, GitHub Actions).</li> <li>Strong problem-solving and communication skills.</li> <li>Ability to work independently and manage tasks with moderate supervision.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Nice to Have&nbsp;</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Experience working with or developing machine learning pipelines or models.</li> <li>Exposure to Generative AI or LLM frameworks (e.g., Langchain, LangGraph).</li> <li>Knowledge of distributed computing concepts or tools (e.g., Spark, Dask).</li> <li>Background in healthcare, life sciences, or clinical data.</li> <li>Bachelor’s degree in computer science, engineering, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).</li> </ul> <p>If you are ready to be part of a team where your work truly matters - where your expertise is valued, your growth is supported and your contributions help shape the future of healthcare, Pedestal Health is the place for you. We’re building something meaningful together, and we’d love for you to be a part of it.&nbsp;</p> <h3><strong>What we offer you</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Hybrid work — 3 days/week in our brand-new office!</li> <li>Comprehensive health, dental, and vision for you and your family</li> <li>401(k) with company match</li> <li>Generous PTO and company holidays</li> <li>Paid parental leave<strong><em>&nbsp;</em></strong></li> </ul> <div class="job__description body"> <div> <p>Hybrid role: Located in Research Triangle Park, North Carolina</p> <p>If you are ready to be part of a team where your work truly matters—where your expertise is valued, your growth is supported, and your contributions help shape the future of healthcare—Pedestal Health is the place for you. We’re building something meaningful together, and we’d love for you to be a part of it.</p> <p><em>Pedestal Health is an equal opportunity employer and seeks candidates from diverse backgrounds and abilities.</em></p> </div> </div>

title: Forward Deployed AI Engineer
location: New York, New York, United States
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><h1><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong><span style="font-size: 24pt;">About Turing</span></strong></span></h1> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Based in San Francisco, California, Turing is the world’s leading research accelerator for frontier AI labs and a trusted partner for global enterprises looking to deploy advanced AI systems. Turing accelerates frontier research with high-quality data, specialized talent, and training pipelines that advance thinking, reasoning, coding, multimodality, and STEM. For enterprises, Turing builds proprietary intelligence systems that integrate AI into mission-critical workflows, unlock transformative outcomes, and drive lasting competitive advantage.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Recognized by Forbes, The Information, and Fast Company among the world’s top innovators, Turing’s leadership team includes AI technologists from Meta, Google, Microsoft, Apple, Amazon, McKinsey, Bain, Stanford, Caltech, and MIT. Learn more at<a class="c-link c-link--underline" href="http://www.turing.com/" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="http://www.turing.com" data-sk="tooltip_parent">&nbsp;www.turing.com</a></span></p></div><h2><strong>About the Role</strong></h2> <p>We’re seeking a highly skilled and motivated <strong>Forward Deployed Engineer (FDE)</strong> to work at the cutting edge of Generative AI deployments. In this role, you’ll partner directly with customers to design, build, and deploy intelligent applications using Python, Langchain/LangGraph, and large language models. You’ll bridge engineering excellence with customer empathy to solve high-impact real-world problems.</p> <p>This is a <strong>hands-on engineering role</strong> embedded within customer projects—ideal for engineers who enjoy ownership, love solving hard problems, and thrive in dynamic, technical environments.</p> <h2><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Lead the end-to-end deployment of GenAI applications for customers—from discovery to delivery.<br><br></li> <li>Architect and implement robust, scalable solutions using Python, Langchain/LangGraph, and LLM frameworks.<br><br></li> <li>Act as a trusted technical advisor to customers, understanding their needs and crafting tailored AI solutions.<br><br></li> <li>Collaborate closely with product, ML, and engineering teams to influence roadmap and core platform capabilities.<br><br></li> <li>Write clean, maintainable code and build reusable modules to streamline future deployments.<br><br></li> <li>Operate across cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) to ensure secure, performant infrastructure.<br><br></li> <li>Continuously improve deployment tools, pipelines, and methodologies to reduce time-to-value.<br><br></li> </ul> <h2><strong>Required Qualifications</strong></h2> <ul> <li><strong>5–8+ years</strong> of experience in software engineering or solutions engineering, ideally in a customer-facing capacity.<br><br></li> <li>Proven expertise in <strong>Python</strong>, <strong>Langchain</strong>, <strong>LangGraph</strong>, and <strong>SQL</strong>.<br><br></li> <li>Deep experience with <strong>engineering architecture</strong>, including APIs, microservices, and event-driven systems.<br><br></li> <li>Demonstrated success in <strong>designing and deploying GenAI applications</strong> into production environments.<br><br></li> <li>Strong proficiency with <strong>cloud services</strong> such as <strong>AWS</strong>, <strong>GCP</strong>, and/or <strong>Azure</strong>.<br><br></li> <li>Excellent communication skills, with the ability to translate technical complexity to customer-facing narratives.<br><br></li> <li>Comfortable working autonomously and managing multiple deployment tracks in parallel.<br><br></li> </ul> <h2><strong>Preferred Qualifications</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Familiarity with CI/CD, infrastructure-as-code (Terraform, Pulumi), and container orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes).<br><br></li> <li>Background in LLM fine-tuning, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), or AI/ML operations.<br><br></li> <li>Previous experience in a startup, consulting, or fast-paced customer-obsessed environment.<br><br></li> </ul> <h2><strong>Education</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Bachelor's, Master's, or Ph.D. in <strong>Computer Science</strong>, <strong>Engineering</strong>, or a related technical field.</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Compensation Details</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Salary Range: 180-230k+&nbsp;</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><h2><strong>Values</strong></h2> <ul> <li> <p><strong>We are client first</strong>: We put our clients at the center of everything we do, because their success is the ultimate measure of our value.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>We work at Start-Up Speed: </strong>We move fast, stay agile and favor action because momentum is the foundation of perfection</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>We are AI forward: </strong>We help our clients build the future of Al and implement it in our own roles and workflow to amplify productivity.</p> </li> </ul> <h2><strong>Advantages of joining Turing</strong></h2> <div> <ul> <li> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Amazing work culture (Super collaborative &amp; supportive work environment; 5 days a week)</span></p> </li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Awesome colleagues (Surround yourself with top talent from Meta, Google, LinkedIn etc. as well as people with deep startup experience)</span></p> </li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Competitive compensation</span></p> </li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Flexible working hours</span></p> </li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong data-stringify-type="bold">Don’t meet every single requirement?</strong>&nbsp;Studies have shown that women and people of color are less likely to apply to jobs unless they meet every single qualification.&nbsp;Turing is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, marital status, disability, protected veteran status, or any other legally protected characteristics.&nbsp;At Turing we are dedicated to building a diverse, inclusive and authentic workplace&nbsp;&nbsp;and celebrate authenticity, so if you’re excited about this role but your past experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyways. You may be just the right candidate for this or other roles.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">For applicants from the European Union, please review&nbsp;<a href="https://www.turing.com/policy" target="_blank">Turing's GDPR notice here</a>.</span></p> </div> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div></div>
