title: Data Engineer (Mid-level)
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About WPP Media</strong></p> <p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. With exceptional talent, trusted data and intelligence, and world-class partnerships – all united by our pioneering agentic marketing platform, WPP Open – we help clients navigate change, capture opportunity, and deliver transformational growth. </p> <p>WPP Media is WPP's AI-driven media operating unit, bringing together media, data, and partnerships to deliver creative personalisation at scale. Connected through WPP Open and powered by Open Intelligence, clients see exactly where, how, and why their media investment is working.</p> <p>For more information, visit <a href="wppmedia.com">wppmedia.com</a>.</p></div><p><strong>Job Title:</strong> Data Engineer (Mid-Level)<br><strong>Company:</strong> WPP Media South Africa<br><strong>Location:</strong> Johannesburg, South Africa<br><strong>Reports To:</strong> Senior Data Specialist</p> <p><strong>Key Responsibilites:</strong></p> <p><strong>Data Engineering:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Design, develop and maintain scalable ELT/ETL pipelines using modern cloud technologies.</li> <li>Build and optimise data ingestion frameworks from first-party, second-party and third-party data sources.</li> <li>Develop and maintain robust data models that support analytics and reporting.</li> <li>Build and manage integrations using REST APIs, SDKs and cloud services.</li> <li>Develop reusable data transformation frameworks using dbt or equivalent tooling.</li> <li>Implement incremental processing, partitioning and performance optimisation techniques.</li> <li>Design and maintain data warehouse structures within BigQuery and other cloud environments.</li> <li>Ensure pipeline reliability through monitoring, alerting and automated testing.</li> <li>Troubleshoot production data issues and implement long-term solutions.</li> </ul> <p><strong>&nbsp;</strong><strong>Cloud Platform Engineering</strong></p> <ul> <li>Develop scalable cloud-native data solutions on Google Cloud Platform.</li> <li>Optimise BigQuery performance and manage cloud infrastructure costs.</li> <li>Build solutions using Cloud Functions, Cloud Run, Cloud Storage and Pub/Sub where appropriate.</li> <li>Implement secure access controls using IAM principles.</li> <li>Support infrastructure automation using Infrastructure-as-Code where applicable.</li> <li>Monitor platform performance and recommend improvements.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Data Quality &amp; Governance:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Implement automated data validation and quality assurance processes.</li> <li>Develop and maintain metadata, documentation, and data lineage.</li> <li>Support data governance frameworks and taxonomy standards.</li> <li>Ensure compliance with data privacy, security, and governance policies.</li> <li>Establish monitoring for data freshness, completeness, and accuracy.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Analytics Enablement</strong></p> <ul> <li>Build curated datasets that enable self-service reporting and analytics.</li> <li>Partner with Analytics Engineers, BI Developers and Data Analysts to deliver trusted datasets.</li> <li>Support dashboard development by providing clean, scalable, and well-modelled data.</li> <li>Develop reusable business logic and transformation layers.</li> <li>Assist with complex data investigations and root cause analysis.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Engineering Best Practices</strong></p> <ul> <li>Maintain source control using Git.</li> <li>Participate in code reviews and technical design discussions.</li> <li>Develop technical documentation for pipelines, architecture, and integrations.</li> <li>Contribute to CI/CD deployment processes.</li> <li>Continuously improve engineering standards and platform reliability.</li> <li>Research and evaluate emerging cloud and data engineering technologies.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Collaboration</strong></p> <ul> <li>Work closely with Media, Analytics, Strategy and Technology teams.</li> <li>Collaborate with platform vendors and technology partners.</li> <li>Support junior engineers through knowledge sharing and mentoring.</li> <li>Contribute to continuous improvement initiatives across the data practice.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Minimum Requirements</strong></p> <p>Qualifications</p> <ul> <li>Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Engineering, Data Science or a related quantitative discipline.</li> <li>Google Cloud Professional Data Engineer certification (preferred).</li> <li>Additional cloud or data engineering certifications are advantageous.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Experience</strong></p> <ul> <li>3–5 years' experience in Data Engineering or Analytics Engineering.</li> <li>Experience developing cloud-based data platforms.</li> <li>Experience building scalable data pipelines.</li> <li>Experience integrating APIs and third-party platforms.</li> <li>Experience working with modern data warehouses.</li> <li>Experience supporting business intelligence and analytics platforms.</li> <li>Experience within media, marketing technology or digital analytics is advantageous.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Technical Skills</strong></p> <p><strong>Programming</strong></p> <ul> <li>SQL (Advanced)</li> <li>Python</li> <li>REST APIs</li> <li>JSON</li> <li>Git</li> </ul> <p><strong>Data Engineering</strong></p> <ul> <li>dbt</li> <li>ETL / ELT</li> <li>Data Modelling</li> <li>Data Warehousing</li> <li>Incremental Processing</li> <li>Pipeline Orchestration</li> <li>Data Quality Frameworks</li> <li>Identity Resolution concepts</li> </ul> <p><strong>Cloud Platforms</strong></p> <ul> <li>Google Cloud Platform</li> <li>BigQuery</li> <li>Cloud Storage</li> <li>Cloud Functions</li> <li>Cloud Run</li> <li>Pub/Sub</li> <li>Cloud Composer (Airflow)</li> <li>IAM</li> </ul> <p>Advantageous:</p> <ul> <li>Snowflake</li> <li>AWS</li> <li>Azure</li> <li>Terraform</li> <li>Docker</li> </ul> <p><strong>Analytics and BI</strong></p> <ul> <li>Looker</li> <li>Looker Studio</li> <li>Power BI</li> <li>Tableau</li> <li>Google Analytics 4</li> <li>Adobe Analytics (advantageous)</li> </ul> <p><strong>Marketing Technology (Advantageous)</strong></p> <p>Experience integrating or working with data from:</p> <ul> <li>Google Ads</li> <li>Campaign Manager 360</li> <li>DV360</li> <li>Meta Ads</li> <li>TikTok</li> <li>AppsFlyer</li> <li>SA360</li> <li>Adverity</li> </ul> <p><strong>Knowledge</strong></p> <ul> <li>Modern Data Architecture</li> <li>Cloud Computing</li> <li>Data Governance</li> <li>Data Privacy</li> <li>Data Modelling</li> <li>Data Quality</li> <li>Data Observability</li> <li>CI/CD Principles</li> <li>Version Control</li> <li>Cost Optimisation</li> <li>Digital Marketing Ecosystem</li> <li>AI-enabled Data Engineering</li> </ul> <p><strong>Success Measures</strong></p> <p>The successful candidate will:</p> <ul> <li>Deliver reliable, scalable and secure data pipelines.</li> <li>Maintain high levels of data quality and platform reliability.</li> <li>Improve pipeline performance and reduce processing costs.</li> <li>Enable trusted reporting through well-modelled datasets.</li> <li>Deliver production-ready engineering solutions using best practices.</li> <li>Contribute to continuous improvements in the data platform.</li> <li>Produce clear technical documentation and reusable engineering assets.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Behavioural Competencies</strong></p> <ul> <li>Strong analytical thinking</li> <li>Problem solving</li> <li>Attention to detail</li> <li>Curiosity and continuous learning</li> <li>Ownership and accountability</li> <li>Collaboration and communication</li> <li>Adaptability</li> <li>Innovation</li> <li>Mentoring and knowledge sharing</li> </ul> <p><strong>Ideal Candidate</strong></p> <p>The ideal candidate is passionate about building scalable cloud data platforms and solving complex data integration challenges. They have strong SQL and Python skills, experience working with modern cloud technologies, and enjoy developing reliable, maintainable data products that enable analytics across the organisation.</p> <p>They are comfortable working with large-scale datasets, APIs, orchestration tools and cloud infrastructure, while collaborating with analysts, strategists and stakeholders to deliver high-quality data solutions. Experience within marketing technology, digital media or advertising ecosystems is advantageous but not essential.</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p></p> <p><span class="TextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8" lang="EN-CA" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8">Please read our <a href="https://www.wppmedia.com/pages/privacy-policy#:~:text=WPP%20Media%20Privacy%20Notice%20for%20Recruitment">Privacy Notice</a></span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8" lang="EN-CA" data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;<span class="NormalTextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8">for more information on how we process the information you provide.</span></span><span class="EOP SCXW227196529 BCX8" data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:276}">&nbsp;</span></p></div>

title: Junior Data Engineer - GCP
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About WPP Media</strong></p> <p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. With exceptional talent, trusted data and intelligence, and world-class partnerships – all united by our pioneering agentic marketing platform, WPP Open – we help clients navigate change, capture opportunity, and deliver transformational growth. </p> <p>WPP Media is WPP's AI-driven media operating unit, bringing together media, data, and partnerships to deliver creative personalisation at scale. Connected through WPP Open and powered by Open Intelligence, clients see exactly where, how, and why their media investment is working.</p> <p>For more information, visit <a href="wppmedia.com">wppmedia.com</a>.</p></div><p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>1344 - Data Engineer</strong></p> <p><strong>Role Summary and Impact</strong></p> <p>This role forms part of a data engineering team&nbsp;assigned to&nbsp;one of WPP’s major global clients, who&nbsp;will be building and maintaining a global data warehouse, automated reports, and data provisioning applications to ensure that media and marketing stakeholders the&nbsp;world over&nbsp;will&nbsp;have access to the right data and insights to inform their marketing decisions. &nbsp;</p> <p>The team’s primary responsibility is to&nbsp;build and&nbsp;maintain&nbsp;a global Google Cloud based reporting solution, which automates the collection and transformation of disparate marketing data into&nbsp;a single source&nbsp;of truth. Not only does that mean running and&nbsp;maintaining&nbsp;the solution that already exists, but also continually improving it to incorporate new data sources, and to derive new insights, to support ever-evolving business demands.&nbsp;</p> <p>As a Data Engineer your primary responsibility will be to support campaign reporting by creating and maintaining infrastructure supporting timely, accurate and meaningful data deliverables &amp; reporting. You will serve as a leader and exemplar of data engineering best practices and thought. In doing so you will exhibit a foundational understanding of cloud technology and key data engineering skills and knowledge to help your team build their career in this fast evolving, and in demand, industry.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Some of the things&nbsp;we’d&nbsp;like you to do:</strong>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>Deploy data collectors in Adverity to gather data from media, agency system, and other sources&nbsp;</li> <li>Develop and expand on existing data “recipes” and transformations in SQL via DBT run on Google Cloud Platform&nbsp;</li> <li>Development and maintain data quality checks and procedures, helping stakeholders overcome data issues before they impact the quality of the reporting solution&nbsp;</li> <li>Support the translation of user requirements and business needs into technical specifications&nbsp;</li> <li>Be a proficient user of Google Cloud Platform and associated technologies, ensuring your work incorporates industry best practice</li> <li>Monitor automated jobs, troubleshooting data issues as-and-when they arise&nbsp;</li> <li>Support other members of the team responsible for “last mile” transformation and visualization of data within Google Data Studio reports and dashboards&nbsp;</li> <li>Serve as a technical and professional leader for junior staff&nbsp;</li> <li>Provide hands-on support to users of reporting solutions, helping the wider team triage and respond to user queries in a timely manner&nbsp;</li> <li>Attend internal stakeholder meetings, presenting your solutions and providing updates on your work.&nbsp;</li> <li>Support the development strong working relationships with third-party data providers that we rely on for access to necessary data&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><strong>Skills and Experience</strong></p> <p><strong>Required</strong><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience in data engineering, preferably handling advertising media or marketing data&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience in GCP</li> <li>Professional experience with SQL, preferably deployed via DBT&nbsp;</li> <li>Analytically minded, enabling you to understand and overcome technically complex challenges, and to tell compelling stories with data&nbsp;</li> <li>Strong organizational skills and attention to detail, including the ability to manage multiple tasks in a fairly autonomous way&nbsp;</li> <li>Strong spoken and written communication skills, ensuring your thoughts and needs are heard and understood&nbsp;</li> <li>An ability to demonstrate a passion for the digital marketing ecosystem, and an understanding of the role that data plays within it&nbsp;</li> <li>Delivers best results when working in a team environment, and an ability to partner effectively with people of varying degrees of technical capability&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><strong>Desirable</strong><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>Previous&nbsp;experience working with data and technology&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience with digital marketing platforms and the data they generate, in particular Google Marketing Platform, Facebook, Tiktok etc.</li> <li>An understanding of how data is tracked and exchanged in the process of digital advertising (e.g. role of ad servers and other third-party tech vendors)&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience using or building reports with business intelligence software, ideally Microsoft PowerBI&nbsp;</li> <li>Work experience within a marketing organization, preferably at a media agency or related company (e.g. publisher, ad tech, client marketing org)&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;<strong>Life at WPP Media &amp; Benefits</strong></p> <p>Our passion for shaping the next era of media is powered by our commitment to Be Extraordinary, investing in our employees to inspire transformational creativity. We also Lead Optimistically,&nbsp;firmly believing&nbsp;in and Championing Growth and Development for every individual. This commitment allows WPP Media employees to&nbsp;leverage&nbsp;the extensive global WPP Media &amp; WPP networks to pursue their passions, build vital professional connections, and learn at the&nbsp;cutting edge&nbsp;of marketing and advertising.&nbsp;</p> <p>We Create an Open environment built on trust and respect, where everyone feels they belong and has opportunities to progress. This inclusive culture is fostered through a variety of employee resource groups and frequent in-office events&nbsp;showcasing&nbsp;team wins, sharing thought leadership, and celebrating holidays and milestone events. Our comprehensive benefits package reflects this commitment, including competitive medical, group retirement plans, vision, and dental insurance, significant paid time off, preferential partner discounts, and employee mental health awareness days.&nbsp;</p> <p>WPP Media is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to characteristics. We believe the best work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection in this open and supportive environment. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach, with teams in the office around four days a week. If you&nbsp;require&nbsp;accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.&nbsp;</p> <p>Please read our Privacy Notice (<a href="https://www.wppmedia.com/pages/privacy-policy">https://www.wppmedia.com/pages/privacy-policy</a>) for more information on how we process the information you provide.&nbsp;</p> <p>While we appreciate all applications received, only those candidates selected for an interview will be contacted.&nbsp;</p> <p>#Li-Promoted</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p></p> <p><span class="TextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8" lang="EN-CA" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8">Please read our <a href="https://www.wppmedia.com/pages/privacy-policy#:~:text=WPP%20Media%20Privacy%20Notice%20for%20Recruitment">Privacy Notice</a></span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8" lang="EN-CA" data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;<span class="NormalTextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8">for more information on how we process the information you provide.</span></span><span class="EOP SCXW227196529 BCX8" data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:276}">&nbsp;</span></p></div>

title: Lead Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About WPP Media</strong></p> <p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. With exceptional talent, trusted data and intelligence, and world-class partnerships – all united by our pioneering agentic marketing platform, WPP Open – we help clients navigate change, capture opportunity, and deliver transformational growth. </p> <p>WPP Media is WPP's AI-driven media operating unit, bringing together media, data, and partnerships to deliver creative personalisation at scale. Connected through WPP Open and powered by Open Intelligence, clients see exactly where, how, and why their media investment is working.</p> <p>For more information, visit <a href="wppmedia.com">wppmedia.com</a>.</p></div><p></p> <p>Choreograph, part of WPP, is on a mission to transform marketing by building the fastest, most connected data platform that bridges marketing strategy to scaled activation. We work with agencies and clients to transform the value of data by bringing together technology, data and analytics capabilities. We deliver this through the Open Media Studio, an AI-enabled media and data platform for the next era of advertising. We're endlessly curious. Our team of thinkers, builders, creators and problem solvers are over 1,000 strong, across 20 markets around the world.</p> <hr> <p>Lead Data Engineer</p> <p>The Lead Data Engineer is a senior technical leadership role within Choreograph's Australia-based team, responsible for driving the strategic development of cloud engineering capabilities and building data infrastructure that delivers real, measurable outcomes for clients. Reporting to the General Manager of Tech and Data, this role sits at the heart of Choreograph's mission to transform the value of data for agencies and clients across the marketing ecosystem. The successful candidate will lead the design and delivery of advanced Google Cloud Platform solutions spanning Marketing Analytics, Data Analytics and Marketing Mix Modelling, setting the technical direction and standards that keep Choreograph at the cutting edge of the industry. Success in this role means scalable, resilient data infrastructure, a high-performing engineering team, and data solutions that consistently drive significant commercial value for clients.</p> <ul> <li>Leads the design and build of complex cloud engineering solutions across a range of media use cases, from digital analytics and data warehousing through to machine learning, generative AI and marketing mix modelling</li> <li>Collaborates across Business Intelligence, Marketing Science, architecture and project management teams to translate business needs into robust technical specifications and solutions</li> <li>Accountable for championing infrastructure as code, CI/CD best practices and cloud security standards across all data engineering initiatives in Australia</li> <li>Plays a central mentoring and coaching role within the data engineering team, guiding professional development and upholding high standards of collective output</li> <li>Contributes to the continuous evolution of Choreograph's engineering practice by evaluating emerging technologies, staying current with industry trends and advocating for innovation</li> </ul> <hr> <p>What You'll Bring</p> <ul> <li>Extensive experience designing and building Google Cloud Platform solutions, specifically within Marketing Analytics, Data Analytics and Machine Learning domains</li> <li>Deep expertise in data warehousing principles and ETL development using tools including BigQuery, Dataflow and Cloud Composer</li> <li>Strong proficiency in Python, including Apache Airflow and Apache Beam, and SQL, with a track record of delivering production-grade solutions</li> <li>Hands-on experience with GCP tools including BigQuery, Cloud Storage, Cloud Run, Cloud Functions and Cloud Composer</li> <li>Thorough knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and DevOps best practices, including Terraform and GitHub Actions</li> <li>Solid understanding of networking, security and performance optimisation within cloud environments</li> <li>Proven ability to communicate complex technical concepts clearly across cross-functional and matrixed teams, building consensus and managing stakeholder relationships effectively</li> <li>Experience defining and delivering Quality Assurance, User Acceptance Testing and data validation processes</li> </ul> <p>Bonus Points If You Have</p> <ul> <li>A Google Cloud Certification such as Professional Data Engineer, Professional ML Engineer or Professional Cloud Architect</li> <li>Knowledge of digital marketing and advertising concepts and tools</li> <li>Experience guiding teams through organisational change and technology adoption processes</li> <li>A background in Computer Science, Information Technology or a related technical discipline</li> </ul> <hr> <p>Life at WPP Media &amp; Benefits</p> <p>Our passion for shaping the next era of media is powered by our commitment to Be Extraordinary, investing in our employees to inspire transformational creativity. We also Lead Optimistically, firmly believing in and Championing Growth and Development for every individual. This commitment allows WPP Media employees to leverage the extensive global WPP Media &amp; WPP networks to pursue their passions, build vital professional connections, and learn at the cutting edge of marketing and advertising.</p> <p>We Create an Open environment built on trust and respect, where everyone feels they belong and has opportunities to progress. This inclusive culture is fostered through a variety of employee resource groups and frequent in-office events showcasing team wins, sharing thought leadership, and celebrating holidays and milestone events.</p> <p>WPP Media is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to characteristics. We believe the best work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection in this open and supportive environment. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.</p> <p>Please read our Privacy Notice (<a href="https://www.wppmedia.com/pages/privacy-policy" target="_blank">https://www.wppmedia.com/pages/privacy-policy</a>) for more information on how we process the information you provide.</p> <p>While we appreciate all applications received, only those candidates selected for an interview will be contacted.</p> <p>#LI-PROMOTED</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p></p> <p><span class="TextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8" lang="EN-CA" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8">Please read our <a href="https://www.wppmedia.com/pages/privacy-policy#:~:text=WPP%20Media%20Privacy%20Notice%20for%20Recruitment">Privacy Notice</a></span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8" lang="EN-CA" data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;<span class="NormalTextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8">for more information on how we process the information you provide.</span></span><span class="EOP SCXW227196529 BCX8" data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:276}">&nbsp;</span></p></div>

responsible for “last mile” transformation and visualization of data within Google Data Studio reports and dashboards</li> <li>Serve as a technical and professional leader for junior staff</li> <li>Provide hands-on support to users of reporting solutions, helping the wider team triage and respond to user queries in a timely manner</li> <li>Attending internal stakeholder meetings, presenting your solutions, and providing updates on your work.</li> <li>Support the development of strong working relationships with third-party data providers that we rely on for access to necessary data</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>A bit about yourself<em>:</em></strong></p> <p>Required</p> <ul> <li>Bachelor degree in Science or Engineering</li> <li>5+ years experience in data engineering, preferably handling advertising media or marketing data</li> <li>Professional experience with SQL, preferably deployed via DBT</li> <li>Analytically minded, enabling you to understand and overcome technically complex challenges, and to tell compelling stories with data</li> <li>Strong organizational skills and attention to detail, including the ability to manage multiple tasks in an autonomous way</li> <li>Strong spoken and written communication skills, ensuring your thoughts and needs are heard and understood</li> <li>An ability to demonstrate a passion for the digital marketing ecosystem, and an understanding of the role that data plays within it</li> <li>Delivers best results when working in a team environment, and an ability to partner effectively with people of varying degrees of technical capability</li> </ul> <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Life at WPP Media &amp; Benefits</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Our passion for shaping the next era of media includes investing in our employees to help them do their best work, and we’re just as committed to employee growth as we are to responsible media investment. WPP Media employees can tap into the global WPP Media &amp; WPP networks to pursue their passions, grow their networks, and learn at the cutting edge of marketing and advertising. We have a variety of employee resource groups and host frequent in-office events showcasing team wins, sharing thought leadership, and celebrating holidays and milestone events. Our benefits include competitive medical, group retirement plans, vision, and dental insurance, significant paid time off, preferential partner discounts, and employee mental health awareness days.</span><span data-contrast="auto"> </span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">WPP Media is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">We believe the best work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach, with teams in the office around four days a week. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p></p> <p><span class="TextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8" lang="EN-CA" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8">Please read our <a href="https://www.wppmedia.com/pages/privacy-policy#:~:text=WPP%20Media%20Privacy%20Notice%20for%20Recruitment">Privacy Notice</a></span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8" lang="EN-CA" data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;<span class="NormalTextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8">for more information on how we process the information you provide.</span></span><span class="EOP SCXW227196529 BCX8" data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:276}">&nbsp;</span></p></div>

title: Senior Autonomy Simulation & Data Engineer (Python / C++)
full_description: <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">About the Company</span></strong></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">At Torc, we have always believed that autonomous vehicle technology will transform how we travel, move freight, and do business.</span>&nbsp;</p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">A leader in autonomous driving since 2007, Torc has spent over a decade commercializing our solutions with experienced partners. </span><a href="https://torc.ai/daimler-testing-automated-trucks-public/"><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-charstyle="Hyperlink">Now a part of the Daimler family</span></span></a><span data-contrast="auto">, we are focused solely on developing software for automated trucks to transform how the world moves freight.</span>&nbsp;</p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Join us and catapult your career with the company that helped pioneer autonomous technology, and the first AV software company with the vision to partner directly with a truck manufacturer.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p data-section-id="1saqlln" data-start="4890" data-end="4913"><strong data-start="4894" data-end="4911">Meet the Team</strong></p> <p>Join our SW Systems and Safety - Behaviors &amp; Autonomy Team, where we build the data and software infrastructure that powers autonomy system evaluation and decision-making.</p> <p>We are seeking a Senior Autonomy Software Systems Engineer who thrives in a hands-on environment building data pipelines, processing large datasets, and developing tools that directly impact how autonomous systems are evaluated and improved.</p> <p>This role is focused on execution — writing production-quality Python (and some C++) code, working with cloud-based data, and building systems that enable large-scale analysis of autonomy data across mapping, simulation, and real-world environments.</p> <p data-section-id="wmsz6i" data-start="5578" data-end="5608"><strong data-start="5582" data-end="5606">What You’ll Be Doing</strong></p> <ul data-start="5610" data-end="6465"> <li data-section-id="1iyqvgr" data-start="5610" data-end="5722"> <p>Build and maintain Python-based data pipelines to ingest, process, and analyze large-scale autonomy datasets</p> </li> <li data-section-id="1ujqabp" data-start="5723" data-end="5821"> <p>Develop tools to extract and manipulate data from cloud-based storage systems (AWS, GCP, etc.)</p> </li> <li data-section-id="cg4mzi" data-start="5822" data-end="5923"> <p>Work with HD/SD map data, vehicle telemetry, and simulation outputs to support autonomy workflows</p> </li> <li data-section-id="uidn0m" data-start="5924" data-end="6012"> <p>Write performant and scalable code for data processing, transformation, and analysis</p> </li> <li data-section-id="uufdrh" data-start="6013" data-end="6106"> <p>Collaborate with systems, mapping, and AI/ML teams to support data-driven decision making</p> </li> <li data-section-id="1q24hh0" data-section-id="1hvsmai" data-start="6699" data-end="6775"> <p>Experience working with large-scale datasets and data processing systems</p> </li> <li data-section-id="7acvjo" data-start="6776" data-end="6861"> <p>Experience with cloud environments and distributed data systems (AWS, GCP, Azure)</p> </li> <li>Familiarity with SD/HD maps, geospatial data, or spatial data processing</li> <li data-section-id="18no761" data-start="6862" data-end="6923"> <p>Experience writing clean, maintainable, and scalable code</p> </li> <li data-section-id="1s9r09h" data-start="6924" data-end="6990"> <p>Strong debugging and problem-solving skills in complex systems</p> </li> <li data-section-id="qumcyb" data-start="6991" data-end="7058"> <p>Experience working in cross-functional engineering environments</p> </li> </ul> <p data-section-id="1jac1zw" data-start="7065" data-end="7087"><strong data-start="7069" data-end="7085">Bonus Points</strong></p> <ul data-start="7089" data-end="7479"> title: Forward Deployed Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Workstream is a mission-driven company building the all-in-one HR, payroll, and hiring platform for managing the hourly workforce. There are 2.7 billion hourly workers, making up 80% of the global workforce, but this market has been heavily underserved by technology and deserves better. Workstream has been purpose-built for the hourly workforce from day one so that these businesses and their employees can thrive.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Our customers include leading brands from multiple sectors, including Burger King, Carl's Jr./Hardee's, IHOP, KFC, and Culvers. We are a high growth series B company and quickly expanding our product portfolio to deliver on our vision. We are backed by legendary VCs and industry experts like Founders Fund, BOND, and Coatue.</span></p> <p class="isSelectedEnd"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">In addition to our core business, Workstream is home to a small, fast-moving Robotics team focused on advancing the next generation of artificial intelligence and robotics. We partner with a leading AI and robotics company to produce high-quality, large-scale egocentric (first-person) video datasets that help train advanced AI models.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Our Robotics team develops scalable data collection and annotation pipelines that enable the efficient creation of high-quality training datasets, helping AI systems better understand human actions, environments, and everyday interactions. We're also building a new category of connected hardware designed to operate reliably throughout the day in thousands of homes and businesses. By combining cutting-edge data collection, automation, and hardware innovation, this team is helping shape the future of intelligent systems and real-world AI applications.</span></p></div><p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Grow With Us</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">We are looking for a highly technical, customer-obsessed, and execution-driven Forward Deployed Engineer (FDE) to bridge the gap between Workstream’s product platform and our customers’ most complex operational challenges.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">In this role, you will operate at the intersection of engineering, product, and customer deployment—embedding deeply with strategic customers to design, build, and deploy high-impact technical solutions that drive measurable business outcomes. You will own end-to-end deployments from discovery and technical scoping through implementation, iteration, and scaled adoption.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">This is a high-ownership role for engineers who thrive in ambiguity, move quickly from prototype to production, and want to solve real-world business problems rather than just build in abstraction. You will work directly with customers, internal product and engineering teams, and executive stakeholders to shape deployment strategy while identifying reusable patterns that influence Workstream’s broader platform roadmap. This structure mirrors leading forward-deployed models where engineers embed closely with customers, ship quickly, and feed field insights back into core product development.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">This is a full-time, hybrid role requiring presence 3 days a week in our Menlo Park office to foster close collaboration with cross-functional teams.&nbsp;</span></p> <h2><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Why This Role Is Different</strong></span></h2> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">This is not traditional software engineering, sales engineering, or implementation support. Forward Deployed Engineers at Workstream act more like startup operators or technical mini-GMs for strategic deployments—owning customer outcomes, shipping production systems quickly, and shaping the future product through execution. The best candidates are engineers who want to build, deploy, and influence product direction simultaneously.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Day In The Life</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Own technical delivery across strategic customer deployments from initial discovery through production launch and long-term adoption</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Embed closely with enterprise customers to understand workflows, operational pain points, and technical requirements</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Scope, architect, and build custom solutions, integrations, workflows, and product extensions that deliver measurable customer value</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Write production-grade code across backend, frontend, APIs, integrations, or automation layers as needed to accelerate deployment</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Translate ambiguous customer problems into structured technical roadmaps and execution plans</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Partner cross-functionally with Product, Engineering, Sales, Customer Success, and Leadership to align deployments with business priorities</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Make trade-offs between speed, scope, scalability, and productization while protecting customer outcomes</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Identify repeatable deployment patterns and convert one-off customer solutions into scalable product capabilities</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Serve as a strategic technical advisor to customers, helping shape adoption, implementation strategy, and long-term success</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Surface field learnings, customer pain points, and deployment insights back to Workstream’s core product roadmap</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Who You Are</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">4+ years of experience in robotics, computer vision, machine learning, data science or model building</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Strong full-stack technical capability (Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, APIs, SQL, integrations, or similar)</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Proven ability to own and deliver complex technical projects in ambiguous, fast-moving environments</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Experience working directly with customers or external stakeholders on technical implementations</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Exceptional problem-solving skills with a bias toward action and first-principles thinking</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Ability to move quickly from prototype to production while maintaining quality</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Strong communication and stakeholder management skills across technical and non-technical audiences</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">High ownership mindset with pride in end-to-end accountability</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Comfort balancing immediate customer needs with long-term scalable product thinking</span></li> </ul> <h2><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Nice To Have</strong></span></h2> <ul> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Experience in HR tech, SaaS, payroll, hiring, or workforce management platforms</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Background in forward deployed engineering, solutions architecture, implementation engineering, or technical consulting</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Experience building integrations, workflow automation, or AI-powered operational tools</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Familiarity with enterprise deployments, APIs, data pipelines, or systems architecture</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Previous experience at high-growth startups, Palantir-style deployment teams, or customer-facing product engineering organizations</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong>What We Offer</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">A mission-driven and value-based company dedicated to empower deskless workers and local businesses</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">An early employee opportunity at a Series B hyper-growth startup; work with the founding team and industry veterans to accelerate your career</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Competitive salary and equity</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Comprehensive health coverage: medical, dental, and vision. We pay 95% of your premiums for our employees and 85% for dependents</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">In office amenities and stocked kitchen</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">401K Plan&nbsp;</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Pre-tax commuter benefits</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Flexible PTO</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Salary Range</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">In compliance with the California Pay Transparency Law, the base salary range for this role is between $150,000 to $180,000 base in Menlo Park. This range is not inclusive of our discretionary bonus or equity package. When determining a candidate’s compensation, we consider a number of factors including skillset, experience, job scope, and current market data.</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><strong>Know More About Workstream</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><a href="https://www.workstream.us/blog/funding-series-b">https://www.workstream.us/blog/funding-series-b</a></span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><a href="https://techcrunch.com/2021/08/26/workstreams-text-based-recruitment-tool-gets-a-48m-bet-from-bond-and-beyond/">https://techcrunch.com/2021/08/26/workstreams-text-based-recruitment-tool-gets-a-48m-bet-from-bond-and-beyond/</a></span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><a href="https://techbuzz.news/buzzworthy-august-27-2021/">https://techbuzz.news/buzzworthy-august-27-2021/</a></span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong data-stringify-type="bold">Additional Information&nbsp;</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Workstream provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws. This policy applies to all terms and conditions of employment, including recruiting, hiring, placement, promotion, termination, layoff, recall, transfer, leaves of absence, compensation and training.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">We are committed to the full inclusion of all qualified individuals.</span></p></div>

title: Head of Data Engineering
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><div> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><strong>About Eve<br></strong><br>Eve is redefining legal technology for plaintiff law firms, and we're building the team that will take us there. We help firms handle more cases, recover more for clients, and grow with AI that works across every stage of a case, from intake through resolution. The next generation of great plaintiff firms will be AI-Native, and Eve is how they get there. But what makes Eve different isn't just the product. It's how we build it. If you're someone who takes ownership, stays curious, and wants to build AI that's already changing how&nbsp;&nbsp;law is practiced, this is where you belong.</p> <p><strong>Product-market fit:</strong> Eve is trusted by over 1000+ law firms, and we’re growing fast.<br><strong>Backed by top investors:</strong> We’ve raised over $160M from world-class partners including Spark Capital, Andreessen Horowitz(A16z), Menlo Ventures, and Lightspeed.<br><strong>Built by a world-class team: </strong>Engineers, designers, and operators from places like Scale, Meta, Airbnb, Cruise, Square, Rubrik, and Lyft are building Eve from the ground up.<br><strong>AI-Native from day one: </strong>We’re on the bleeding edge of AI, collaborating directly with teams at OpenAI and Anthropic to build best-in-class AI workflows tailored for legal work.<br><strong>Explosive growth:</strong> We are growing 2X revenue Quarter over Quarter.</p> </div></div><p><span style="text-decoration: underline;"><strong>What You'll Do:</strong></span></p> <ul> <li>Design and build Eve’s <strong>data warehouse architecture</strong> from the ground up, including schema design, data modeling, and pipeline orchestration.</li> <li>Develop and maintain <strong>reliable ETL/ELT pipelines</strong> that integrate data across core business systems (CRM, product, billing, marketing, etc.).</li> <li>Define and implement <strong>core business data models</strong> that standardize how Eve measures pipeline, conversion, revenue, customer health, and attribution.</li> <li>Build a <strong>reliable GTM data layer</strong> that enables marketing, sales, CS, and finance teams to self-serve key insights without ad hoc analysis.</li> <li>Establish <strong>data quality, governance, and monitoring practices</strong> to ensure accuracy and reliability across the data stack.</li> <li>Create <strong>cross-functional intake and prioritization processes</strong> for data requests, balancing infrastructure work with business needs.</li> <li>Partner closely with <strong>GTM, finance, product, and engineering teams</strong> to understand their workflows and translate them into durable data systems.</li> <li>Select and manage Eve’s <strong>data stack</strong> (warehouse, orchestration, transformation, BI tooling).</li> <li>Lay the foundation for <strong>product analytics and behavioral event tracking</strong> across Eve’s platform.</li> <li><strong>Build and scale Eve’s data function over time</strong>, including hiring, team structure, and operating processes.</li> </ul> <p><span style="text-decoration: underline;"><strong>What We're Looking For:</strong></span></p> <ul> <li>Proven experience <strong>building a data warehouse and core data infrastructure from scratch</strong> at a high-growth SaaS or technology company.</li> <li>Deep expertise in <strong>data engineering</strong>, including data modeling, ETL/ELT pipeline design, and warehouse architecture.</li> <li>Strong proficiency with <strong>SQL and modern data stack tools</strong> (e.g., Snowflake/BigQuery/Redshift, dbt, Airflow/Prefect, etc.).</li> <li>Experience integrating and modeling data from <strong>GTM systems</strong> such as CRM, marketing automation, billing, and customer success platforms.</li> <li>Demonstrated ability to <strong>translate business workflows into durable data models</strong> that teams can rely on for decision-making.</li> <li>Comfortable operating in <strong>early-stage environments with messy, incomplete, or inconsistent data</strong>.</li> <li>Strong cross-functional communication skills and ability to <strong>work closely with sales, marketing, CS, finance, and product teams</strong>.</li> <li>Experience <strong>owning architectural decisions</strong> for the data stack, including tooling selection and infrastructure design.</li> <li>Familiarity with <strong>product analytics and event instrumentation</strong> across web or application platforms.</li> <li>Fluency with <strong>AI-assisted development tools</strong> such as Cursor, Claude Code, or GitHub Copilot.</li> <li>Entrepreneurial mindset with a desire to <strong>build and own a data function from the ground up</strong>.</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Final compensation will be determined based on a variety of factors, including but not limited to relevant experience, skills, interview performance, and the scope and level of the role and candidate.</em></p></div><div class="title">US Base Salary Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$280,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$350,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><div class="section page-centered" data-qa="closing-description"> <p><strong>Benefits</strong></p> <p>💰 Competitive Salary &amp; Equity<br>💹 401(k) Program with Employer Matching<br>⚕️ Health, Dental, Vision and Life Insurance<br>🩼 Short Term and Long Term Disability<br>🚗 Commuter Benefits*<br>🧑‍💻 Autonomous Work Environment<br>🖥️ Workplace Setup Reimbursement<br>🏠 Telecomm Stipend<br>🏝 Flexible Time Off (FTO) + Holidays<br>🚀 Quarterly Team Gatherings<br>🥪 In office Perks*</p> <span style="font-size: 10pt;"><em>*In office employees only</em></span></div> <div class="section page-centered" data-qa="closing-description"> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><em>Eve Legal is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy, sexual orientation, or gender identity), national origin, age, disability, genetic information, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation during the application process, reach out to your recruiter.<br></em></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><em>We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process.&nbsp; These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.</em></span></p> </div></div>

title: Data Engineer II
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong><span style="font-size: 14pt;">About Us</span></strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">DriveWealth is on a mission to make investing easier. We believe that everyone should have the ability to control their financial future, and that access to financial markets should not be limited by geography, wealth, or legacy systems. We are a global B2B financial technology organization dedicated to democratizing access to financial independence around the world. Our mission is realized through an API-based platform, empowering our partners to offer seamless investing and trading experiences to clients worldwide, all from their mobile devices. Our technology provides partners with a modern, extensible toolkit, enabling traditional investment workflows and innovative techniques like fractional share ownership. DriveWealth has evolved into a global platform offering trading of US equities, mutual funds, ETFs, fixed income, and options.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">There’s never been a better time to build a category-defining business and there has rarely been a team better positioned for this opportunity. Our culture blends the pace and agility of a fintech start-up with the impact, stability, and discipline of Wall Street. We encourage creativity and experimentation while ensuring institutional-grade execution and regulatory compliance in everything we do. Join us and help build the future of global investing!</span></p></div><h3><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">About The Team</span></h3> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">We are looking for a Data Engineer who thrives on solving data problems, and enjoys working cross-functionally with product, engineering and analytics teams to deliver trusted, high-impact data solutions. The ideal candidate is excited to take ownership of well-defined data challenges and support the evolution of our data platform.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">The Data &amp; Analytics organization at DriveWealth powers the company’s data ecosystem end-to-end. Within it, the Data Platform Engineering team owns two critical pillars:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Data Ingestion - building reliable pipelines that bring data from diverse internal and external sources</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Semantic Data Layer - creating curated, consistent and reliable datasets that enable analytics, reporting and decision making</span></li> </ul> <h3><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">What You’ll Do</span></h3> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Contribute to the design, build and maintenance of robust data pipelines (batch, streaming and replication) that power analytics, reporting and compliance use-cases</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Translate business needs into data solutions in collaboration with product managers, engineering teams and business stakeholders</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Proactively monitor and address challenges and opportunities, helping to anticipate scaling, performance and quality needs before they become blockers.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Adhere to and promote best practices, including documentation, code reviews and standards for data modelling, orchestration and tooling</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Actively participate in code reviews and knowledge sharing, raising the bar for data engineering craft and helping grow team capabilities</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Support the contribution to self-service data products, enabling data consumers with curated datasets, semantic layers and tools that accelerate insight generation</span></li> </ul> <h3><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>You Bring</strong></span></h3> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">2-3 years of professional experience in data engineering or related fields, with a track record of building and contributing to data pipelines and platforms.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Technical Skills:</span> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Proficiency in Python and SQL</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Familiarity with Spark (PySpark and SparkSQL) and distributed data processing</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Familiarity with orchestration and transformation tools (e.g. Airflow, DBT)</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Familiarity with Databricks and cloud platforms (AWS preferred)</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Familiarity with infrastructure as code (e.g.Terraform or equivalent)</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Working knowledge in shell scripting and command line tooling (e.g. Databricks CLI)</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Proven ability to work independently and cross-functionally with product, engineering and business teams</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Experience working in teams with CI/CD pipelines, Git-based workflows and Agile methodologies</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Curiosity, accountability and a drive to improve data quality, scalability and usability across the company</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">BS in Computer Science or equivalent</span></li> </ul> </li> </ul> <h3><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14pt;"><strong>Working at DriveWealth</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">We do our best work when we're in the same room. We've found that being physically side-by-side is the only way to solve complex problems in real-time and stay truly accountable to the products we ship. When you're here, you're working directly with the people making the decisions.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">To support that work, we provide competitive compensation, equity, and a 401(k) match. We also offer Medical insurance, Dental insurance, Vision insurance, Disability insurance, and Paid Parental Leave, along with a wellness reimbursement, a company-provided phone, and a personal development allowance. Finally, we value the time you spend away from the office with generous Paid Time Off (PTO) and observed holidays.</span></p> <p data-path-to-node="5"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong><span style="font-size: 14pt;">Work Authorization</span></strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Applicants must possess the legal right to work in the country where the position is located at the time of application. DriveWealth requires all employees to provide original documentation verifying their work authorization on or before their first day of employment.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">For US-based roles: Applicants must be currently authorized to work in the United States on a full-time basis without the need for current or future visa sponsorship. DriveWealth does not provide visa sponsorship or support for employment authorization, including transfers, at this time. Offers of employment are strictly contingent upon an individual’s ability to secure and maintain the legal right to work at the Company.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14pt;"><strong>How We Think About AI</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">We leverage AI to work smarter and move faster. Your ability to leverage our internal tools and technology to drive results is as important to us as your core domain expertise.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14pt;"><strong>Compensation</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Pay is generally based on the level, complexity, responsibility, location, and job duties/requirements of the specific position. We then source candidates with the requisite skills, expertise, education, training, and experience.&nbsp; If you are selected for an interview, please feel welcome to speak to a recruiter about our compensation philosophy and other available benefits. This role is eligible for base, bonus, equity, 401(k) match, and heavily subsidized benefits and perks.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14pt;"><strong>Equal Employment Opportunity</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">To build technology and products that are used and loved by people and solve real-world problems, we need to build a team with many different perspectives and experiences. We are an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. We encourage candidates from all backgrounds to apply.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14pt;"><strong>Agency Disclaimer</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">DriveWealth does not accept agency resumes. Do not forward resumes to our jobs alias, employees, or any other organization location. DriveWealth is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes.</span></p></div>

title: Principal Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong><span style="font-size: 14pt;">About Us</span></strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">DriveWealth is on a mission to make investing easier. We believe that everyone should have the ability to control their financial future, and that access to financial markets should not be limited by geography, wealth, or legacy systems. We are a global B2B financial technology organization dedicated to democratizing access to financial independence around the world. Our mission is realized through an API-based platform, empowering our partners to offer seamless investing and trading experiences to clients worldwide, all from their mobile devices. Our technology provides partners with a modern, extensible toolkit, enabling traditional investment workflows and innovative techniques like fractional share ownership. DriveWealth has evolved into a global platform offering trading of US equities, mutual funds, ETFs, fixed income, and options.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">There’s never been a better time to build a category-defining business and there has rarely been a team better positioned for this opportunity. Our culture blends the pace and agility of a fintech start-up with the impact, stability, and discipline of Wall Street. We encourage creativity and experimentation while ensuring institutional-grade execution and regulatory compliance in everything we do. Join us and help build the future of global investing!</span></p></div><h3><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">About the Role</span></h3> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">As a Principal Data Engineer, you will be dedicated to building innovative data products that provide actionable insights and empower both our internal teams and partners to succeed. Your core focus will be on curating and maintaining key data sources and statistics that serve both internal and external stakeholders.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">You will act as the hands-on technical engine driving this work forward, spending 60–70% of your time writing code while shaping the architectural vision of our data ecosystem. You will architect for massive scale, treat data as software, and build highly performant, resilient models and reporting solutions (using Databricks, dbt, and Python) that fuel data-driven decision-making across the business.</span></p> <h3><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">What You’ll Do</span></h3> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Advanced Engineering &amp; Coding</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">End-to-End Ownership: Own the full lifecycle of data products, from initial conceptualization and architecture through to production deployment, optimization, and maintenance.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Core Development: Design and code complex dbt models and data transformation logic for high-volume financial datasets (e.g., trade transactions, stock ledgers, and clearing/settlement records).</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Python Automation: Write production-grade Python scripts for advanced data processing, anomaly detection, and custom orchestration logic that SQL cannot handle alone.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Performance Engineering: Take ownership of the "hardest problems" regarding query performance. Refactor legacy code and optimize incremental loading strategies to reduce costs and latency at scale.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Technical Architecture &amp; Standards</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">CI/CD &amp; DevOps: Own the technical implementation of our data deployment reporting pipelines (Git, dbt Cloud), ensuring robust version control and seamless integration.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Data Quality as Code: Engineer automated testing frameworks and validation suites (using dbt tests/Python) to ensure data integrity for critical business layers.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Leadership &amp; Cross-Functional Impact</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Technical Project Leadership: Act as the hands-on lead for major initiatives. Scope, design, and manage complex data projects while remaining active in the codebase to ensure high-quality delivery.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Cross-Functional Partnership: Partner directly with stakeholders across Product, Finance, Operations, Risk, and Trading to translate domain-specific requirements into robust data products and reporting solutions.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Mentorship &amp; Guidance: Act as the "go-to" technical resource for the team. Conduct thorough code reviews and help senior and junior engineers solve blockers through pair programming and architectural guidance.</span></li> </ul> <h3><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">You Bring</span></h3> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">8+ years of professional experience in analytics engineering or data engineering, with a proven track record of building and scaling analytical data ecosystems.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Expert proficiency in SQL, with experience optimizing complex queries and data models at scale.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Advanced proficiency in Python for data manipulation (Pandas/Polars/Spark) and interaction with APIs/AWS services.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Experience using Databricks for analytics workloads, including building and optimizing data models using Databricks SQL and dbt.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Experience with dbt materializations, macros, and package management.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Experience architecting data models for FinTech and Capital Markets, including trade lifecycles, clearing/settlement, risk models, and financial reporting.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">AI-Assisted Engineering: Proficiency in leveraging AI tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot,or similar LLMs) to accelerate code delivery, automate documentation, and optimize engineering workflows.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Proven ability to build data solutions that are reusable and modular, rather than one-off scripts.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Experience treating data as software by implementing unit testing, CI/CD, comprehensive documentation, and SLA monitoring.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Ability to independently diagnose and resolve complex errors or issues within distributed systems (Spark/Databricks).</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related technical field.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Special Knowledge (Nice to Have, But Not Required)</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Experience implementing Airflow or similar orchestrators.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Experience with Sigma Computing (from a data modeling perspective).</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Experience building Data Apps within Databricks.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Experience using AI/LLM tools to enable faster, smarter analytics workflows.</span></li> </ul> <h3><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Location<strong><br></strong></span></h3> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">This role is open to candidates in the following locations: </span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>New York, NY - Hybrid&nbsp;</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, for any employer in the U.S. DriveWealth does not sponsor or take over sponsorship of an employment visa at this time.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial,
