In this role, your foundational knowledge, skills, abilities and personal attributes are anchored in the following competencies:</p> <ul> <li><strong>Good judgment</strong> - the exercise of critical thinking, analyzing and assessing problems and implications, identifying patterns, making connections of underlying issues, understanding risks and developing mitigation strategies, and taking ownership of the outcome.</li> <li><strong>Resourcefulness</strong> - taking a can-do approach, even in the face of obstacles and constraints by assessing what's in front of you and effectively and efficiently optimizing what you have, whether it's working on something new or thinking about how to do something better.</li> <li><strong>Teamwork and communication</strong> - putting our collective best together through documentation, collaboration, relationship-building, listening, empathy, recruiting, and evangelism.</li> <li><strong>Influence and leadership</strong> - fostering a community of knowledge-sharing, collaboration, mentorship, and forward-thinking.</li> <li><strong>Skills and knowledge</strong> - the capacity to actively learn and apply specific domain knowledge, know-how, and best practices to continually enhance and improve.</li> </ul> <p><strong>In addition, all Justworkers focus on aligning their behaviors to our core values known as COGIS. It stands for:</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Camaraderie</strong> - Day to day you can be seen working together toward a higher purpose. You like to have fun. You're an active listener, treat people respectfully, and have a strong desire to know and help others.</li> <li><strong>Openness</strong> - Your default is to be open. You're willing to share information, understand other perspectives, and consider new possibilities. You're curious, ask open questions, and are receptive to thoughts and feedback from others.</li> <li><strong>Grit</strong> - You demonstrate grit by having the courage to commit and persevere. You're committed, earnest, and dive in to get the job done well with a positive attitude.</li> <li><strong>Integrity</strong> - Simply put, do what you say and say what you'll do. You're honest and forthright, have a strong moral compass, and strive to match your words with your actions while leading by example.</li> <li><strong>Simplicity</strong> - Be like Einstein: "Everything should be made as simple as possible, but no simpler."</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Qualifications</strong></h2> <ul> <li>A minimum of 5 years of professional hands-on experience in analytics engineering, data analytics, data engineering, or a similar role</li> <li>Extensive experience transforming raw data into consistent, trustworthy data models for use by analytics and business stakeholders</li> <li>Hands-on experience building and maintaining a semantic/metrics layer (Snowflake semantic views or equivalent) that powers self-service analytics</li> <li>Demonstrated experience building and governing assets that power BI— certified data sources, dashboard design, and self-service enablement</li> <li>Proven track record partnering directly with non-technical stakeholders to define metrics, gather requirements, and drive adoption of data products</li> <li>Proficient in writing performant SQL and leveraging dbt for data transformation and model management</li> <li>Expert understanding of data warehousing concepts for analytics, including dimensional modeling, star schemas, and representation of complex business facts</li> <li>Experience with Python or other programming languages commonly used in data engineering</li> <li>Strong ability to troubleshoot, optimize, and scale data models for performance and usability</li> <li>Comfortable translating complex technical topics for business stakeholders</li> <li>Comfortable with Git, command line, and CI/CD best practices</li> <li>Comfortable managing workflows using Agile practices</li> <li>Ability to solve ambiguous problems independently</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Nice to have</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Experience w/modern data stack tools (e.g., Fivetran, dbt, Snowflake)</li> <li>Experience working in complex, highly dimensional data ecosystems</li> <li>Experience implementing sensitive data management solutions and privacy-by-design principles strongly preferred</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Technologies Used</strong></h2> <ul> <li><strong>Languages</strong>: SQL, Python, Terraform</li> <li><strong>Stack</strong>: Snowflake (incl. semantic views), Airflow, Fivetran, dbt, GitHub, CircleCI, Tableau, Redash, Jira</li> </ul> <p><span data-sheets-root="1">The base wage range for this position based in our New York City Office is targeted at $147,000.00 - $190,000.00 per year.</span></p> <p><span data-sheets-root="1">#LI-DG2 #LI-Hybrid</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Actual compensation is based on multiple factors that are unique to each candidate, including and not limited to skill set, level of relevant experience, and specific work location.&nbsp; </span><span style="font-weight: 400;">Salary ranges for positions based in other locations may differ based on the cost of labor in that location.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">For more information about Justworks’ Total Reward Philosophy, including all of the perks and benefits we are proud to offer our team members, please visit </span><a href="https://www.justworks.com/careers#total-reward-philosophy">Total Rewards @ Justworks</a><span style="font-weight: 400;">.&nbsp;</span></p> <h1><strong>Diversity At Justworks</strong></h1> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Justworks is committed to maintaining a workplace where diversity of identity, culture, and life experience is the norm and is celebrated authentically and respected consistently. Diversity in our work, our people, and our product drives creativity and innovation, entrepreneurial leadership and integrity, competitiveness, and collaboration throughout our business and in the market. We depend on our differences to make our team stronger, our workplace more dynamic, and our product accessible to all of our customers.</span></p> <p>We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer open to all qualified applicants regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital or familial status, disability, pregnancy, gender identity or expression, veteran status, genetic information, or any other legally protected status. Justworks is fully dedicated to providing necessary support to candidates with disabilities who may require reasonable accommodations. We also provide reasonable accommodations to employees based on their sincerely held religious beliefs, as well as for other covered reasons consistent with applicable federal, state, and local laws. If you're in need of a reasonable accommodation, please reach out to us at <a href="mailto:accommodations@justworks.com">accommodations@justworks.com</a>. Your comfort and success matter to us, and we're here to ensure an inclusive experience.</p> <p><a href="https://www.justworks.com/press/company-news/justworks-impact-report-2024" target="_blank"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Our DEIB Report&nbsp;</span></a></p></div>

title: Senior Manager, Data Engineering
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><h1><strong>Who We Are</strong></h1> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Justworks, you’ll enjoy a welcoming and casual environment, great benefits, wellness program offerings, company retreats, and the ability to interact with and learn from leaders in the startup community. We work hard and care about our most prized asset - our people.</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">We’re helping businesses get off the ground by enabling them to focus on running their business. We solve HR issues. We’re data-driven and never stop iterating. If you’d like to work in a supportive, entrepreneurial environment, are interested in building something meaningful and having fun while doing it, we’d love to hear from you.</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">We're united by shared goals and shared motivations at Justworks. These are best summed up in our company values, which are reflected in our product and in our team.</span></p> <p><a href="https://www.justworks.com/careers#values"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Our Values</span></a></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">If this sounds like you, you’ll fit right in.</span></p></div><h1><strong>Department</strong></h1> <p>Technology, Data &amp; AI</p> <h1><strong>About The Team</strong></h1> <p>The Data &amp; Analytics team is Justworks' data and AI center of excellence — a connected set of functions spanning business intelligence, data science, analytics engineering, platform data/ML engineering and AI builders. We've grown significantly over the last several years and continue to build momentum across the business, leveling up maturity in how we deliver insights, govern data, and enable the company to make better decisions. You'll find a highly collaborative &amp; diverse group motivated by craft, shared learning, and a genuine commitment to growing our impact for customers while evolving how we work together for our people. Come build with us!</p> <p>The Data Platform Engineering team sits at the core of this foundation, owning the pipelines, platform infrastructure, and reliability that every other DNA function depends on.</p> <h1><strong>Who You Are</strong></h1> <p>You're a hands-on engineering leader with deep experience building and operating modern data platforms. You've led teams through scale — evolving architecture, improving reliability, and making hard tradeoffs between speed, cost, and quality. You're as comfortable reviewing a PR or debugging a pipeline failure as you are setting quarterly roadmap priorities or presenting a platform strategy to senior leadership.</p> <p>You think in systems - how pipelines, orchestration, governance, and observability connect to produce a trustworthy platform - and you know how to build a team that operates with both craft and urgency. You develop engineers, set a high technical bar, and create an environment where people grow.</p> <p>You bring strong opinions grounded in experience with modern PaaS data stack technologies - Snowflake, Fivetran, Airflow, dbt, Estuary - and you've seen what works and what doesn't at scale. Snowflake is core to how we operate and you should have depth there.</p> <p>Reporting to the VP of Data &amp; Analytics, you'll lead the data platform organization, setting technical direction, driving operational excellence, and ensuring the platform is reliable, scalable, and built to support the company's growth.</p> <h1><strong>Your Success Profile</strong></h1> <h2><strong>What You Will Work On</strong></h2> <p><strong>Platform Leadership &amp; Technical Direction</strong></p> <ul> <li>Own the technical direction of Justworks' core data platform — pipelines, infrastructure, orchestration, and the standards that keep it trustworthy</li> <li>Lead architectural decisions on cloud data infrastructure, balancing scalability, cost, reliability, and security</li> <li>Drive operational excellence across the platform — observability, data quality, cost optimization, incident management, and SLAs</li> <li>Set and enforce engineering standards — testing, documentation, CI/CD, and code review best practices</li> <li>Maintain and evolve infrastructure as code, ensuring the platform is auditable, repeatable, and resilient</li> </ul> <p><strong>Team Leadership &amp; Development</strong></p> <ul> <li>Lead and develop a team of data engineers, including direct line managers and individual contributors at various levels</li> <li>Set a high bar for engineering craft — mentor engineers, conduct architecture reviews, and foster a culture of continuous improvement</li> <li>Recruit and hire high-caliber data engineers as the platform team grows</li> <li>Create an environment where engineers develop their skills, take ownership, and do the best work of their careers</li> </ul> <p><strong>Cross-Functional Partnership &amp; Delivery</strong></p> <ul> <li>Partner with DNA functional teams (e.g. Analytics Engineering, BI, Data Science) and distributed Data Engineering teams to ensure the platform serves the full breadth of org needs</li> <li>Collaborate with other engineering teams to align on data contracts, security, compliance, and shared infrastructure</li> <li>Drive planning processes that connect platform priorities to DNA's overall strategy and enterprise OKRs</li> </ul> <h2><strong>How You Will Do Your Work</strong></h2> <p>As a Sr. Manager, Data Platform Engineering,, <em>how</em> results are achieved is paramount for your success and ultimately results in our success as an organization. In this role, your foundational knowledge, skills, abilities, and personal attributes are anchored in the following competencies:</p> <ul> <li><strong>Plans &amp; Aligns</strong> - Ensures individual actions support company mission; communicates effectively; understands urgency and plans accordingly</li> <li><strong>Balances Stakeholders</strong> - Understands internal and external stakeholder requirements, expectations, and needs and acts fairly despite conflicting demands of stakeholders.</li> <li><strong>Influence and Leadership</strong> - fostering a community of knowledge-sharing, collaboration, mentorship, and forward-thinking across the organization.</li> <li><strong>Manages Complexity</strong> - Making sense of complex, high quantity, and sometimes contradictory information to effectively solve problems.</li> <li><strong>Good Judgment</strong> - Pauses before acting; asks questions to fully understand context; applies critical thinking and takes ownership of outcomes</li> <li><strong>Teamwork &amp; Communication</strong> - Honors diverse thoughts and opinions; leverages unique skills to maximize efficiency</li> <li><strong>Skills and Knowledge</strong> - the capacity to actively learn and apply specific domain knowledge, know-how, and best practices to continually enhance and improve.</li> </ul> <p>In addition, all Justworkers focus on aligning their behaviors to our core values known as COGIS. It stands for:</p> <ul> <li><strong>Camaraderie</strong> - Day to day you can be seen working together toward a higher purpose. You like to have fun. You’re an active listener, treat people respectfully, and have a strong desire to know and help others.</li> <li><strong>Openness</strong> - Your default is to be open. You're willing to share information, understand other perspectives, and consider new possibilities. You’re curious, ask open questions, and are receptive to thoughts and feedback from others.</li> <li><strong>Grit </strong>- You demonstrate grit by having the courage to commit and persevere. You’re committed, earnest, and dive in to get the job done well with a positive attitude.</li> <li><strong>Integrity</strong> - Simply put, do what you say and say what you'll do. You’re honest and forthright, have a strong moral compass, and strive to match your words with your actions while leading by example.&nbsp;</li> <li><strong>Simplicity</strong> - Be like Einstein: “Everything should be made as simple as possible, but no simpler.”</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Qualifications</strong></h2> <p>You're a builder who applies systems thinking to internal infrastructure. You're comfortable working across a diverse data organization and partnering with leadership to turn fragmented ways of working into scalable, durable systems.</p> <ul> <li>10+ years of professional experience in data engineering, with at least 5 years working hands-on with modern PaaS data stack technologies (Snowflake, Fivetran, Airflow, dbt, Estuary, or equivalent)</li> <li>Deep Snowflake expertise - schema design, query optimization, cost governance, data sharing, and performance tuning at scale</li> <li>5+ years of engineering management experience, including experience managing managers or leading a multi-team engineering organization</li> <li>Strong architectural judgment - able to make sound decisions on pipeline design, infrastructure patterns, and platform evolution</li> <li>Experience leading a distributed engineering team across multiple workstreams and delivery tracks</li> <li>Deep proficiency in SQL and Python; recognized by peers for technical rigor</li> <li>Strong expertise with AWS services (S3, Lambda, Fargate, Redshift, Kinesis) and infrastructure-as-code (Terraform, CloudFormation)</li> <li>Strong experience with data governance, security, and compliance in a production environment</li> <li>Excellent communicator — able to engage technical and non-technical stakeholders, present platform strategy to senior leadership, and translate infrastructure investments into business terms</li> <li>Comfortable navigating ambiguity and driving work forward in a fast-moving environment</li> <li>Point of view on how AI is changing data platform engineering — both in how the team works and what the platform enables</li> </ul> <p><strong>Nice to have</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience building data platforms that support ML/AI workloads (feature stores, model pipelines, vector stores)</li> <li>Background in a regulated or compliance-sensitive environment (fintech, HR tech, healthcare)</li> <li>Experience with streaming/CDC technologies (Estuary, Kafka, Debezium)</li> </ul> <h1><strong>Technologies Used</strong></h1> <ul> <li>Languages: Python, SQL, Terraform</li> <li>Data &amp; Analytics: Snowflake, dbt, Fivetran</li> <li>Streaming &amp; CDC: Estuary</li> <li>Workflow Orchestration: Airflow, MWAA</li> <li>Cloud: AWS (S3, Lambda, Fargate, Redshift, Kinesis, Step Functions, EventBridge)</li> <li>Observability &amp; Monitoring: Datadog</li> <li>CI/CD: CircleCI, GitHub Actions</li> </ul> <p><span data-sheets-root="1">The base wage range for this position based in our New York City Office is targeted at $240,000.00 - $310,000.00 per year.</span></p> <p><span data-sheets-root="1">#LI-DG2 #LI-Hybrid</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Actual compensation is based on multiple factors that are unique to each candidate, including and not limited to skill set, level of relevant experience, and specific work location.&nbsp; </span><span style="font-weight: 400;">Salary ranges for positions based in other locations may differ based on the cost of labor in that location.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">For more information about Justworks’ Total Reward Philosophy, including all of the perks and benefits we are proud to offer our team members, please visit </span><a href="https://www.justworks.com/careers#total-reward-philosophy">Total Rewards @ Justworks</a><span style="font-weight: 400;">.&nbsp;</span></p> <h1><strong>Diversity At Justworks</strong></h1> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Justworks is committed to maintaining a workplace where diversity of identity, culture, and life experience is the norm and is celebrated authentically and respected consistently. Diversity in our work, our people, and our product drives creativity and innovation, entrepreneurial leadership and integrity, competitiveness, and collaboration throughout our business and in the market. We depend on our differences to make our team stronger, our workplace more dynamic, and our product accessible to all of our customers.</span></p> <p>We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer open to all qualified applicants regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital or familial status, disability, pregnancy, gender identity or expression, veteran status, genetic information, or any other legally protected status. Justworks is fully dedicated to providing necessary support to candidates with disabilities who may require reasonable accommodations. We also provide reasonable accommodations to employees based on their sincerely held religious beliefs, as well as for other covered reasons consistent with applicable federal, state, and local laws. If you're in need of a reasonable accommodation, please reach out to us at <a href="mailto:accommodations@justworks.com">accommodations@justworks.com</a>. Your comfort and success matter to us, and we're here to ensure an inclusive experience.</p> <p><a href="https://www.justworks.com/press/company-news/justworks-impact-report-2024" target="_blank"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Our DEIB Report&nbsp;</span></a></p></div>

title: Senior Forward Deployed Engineer (Remote Build)
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><h2><strong>About Remote</strong></h2> <div><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Remote is solving modern organizations’ biggest challenge – navigating global employment compliantly with ease. We make it possible for businesses of all sizes to recruit, pay, and manage international teams. With our core values at heart and future focused work culture, our team works tirelessly on ambitious problems, asynchronously, around the world. You can find Remoters working from 6 different continents (Antarctica left to go!) and all of our positions are fully remote.<br><br><span class="discussion-id-2f7cb4da-dab4-8068-a80f-001c50b2d808 suggestion-update notion-enable-hover" data-token-index="0">With Innovation as one of the core values, we have built Automation and AI capabilities into the requirements for every role.</span><br><br>We encourage every member of the Remote team to bring their talents, experiences and culture to the table to help us build the best-in-class HR platform.</span></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">If you are energetic, curious, motivated and ambitious, be part of our world. Apply now and define the future of work!</span></div></div><h2><strong>What this job can offer you</strong></h2> <p>As a <span class="notion-enable-hover" data-token-index="1">Forward Deployed Engineer (AI)</span> at Remote, you will work directly with customers and internal stakeholders to design, build, and deploy AI-powered solutions that connect Remote’s platform to customer systems and workflows. You will turn messy, real-world requirements into production-grade implementations — often by building integrations, automations, and agentic workflows — and you’ll translate field learnings back into reusable patterns and product roadmap inputs.</p> <ul> <li>High autonomy and direct ownership of customer outcomes — from discovery through production rollout</li> <li>Work at the frontier of practical AI: shipping systems that are reliable, observable, secure, and measurable</li> <li>A seat at the intersection of Product, Engineering, Sales/CS, and customer teams — with clear influence on what we build next</li> <li>Exposure to a wide set of domains (HR, payroll, finance ops, IT, integrations) and complex enterprise ecosystems</li> <li>A remote-first environment with strong documentation culture and high trust</li> </ul> <h2><strong>What you bring</strong></h2> <ul> <li> <h3>Must have</h3> <ul> <li>Demonstrated experience shipping production software (backend and/or full-stack) and owning it in production (on-call mindset, debugging, instrumentation)</li> <li>Strong integration and systems thinking: APIs, event-driven systems, webhooks, auth (OAuth/service accounts), data modeling, idempotency, and failure modes</li> <li>Applied AI/LLM experience beyond prototypes: prompt+tool design, RAG and retrieval patterns, evaluation, latency/cost trade-offs, and reliability practices</li> <li>Ability to operate in ambiguity: you can go from “problem statement” to “shipped solution” with minimal hand-holding</li> <li>Clear, structured communication in writing; ability to explain trade-offs to technical and non-technical stakeholders</li> </ul> <h3>Nice to have</h3> <ul> <li>Experience with enterprise environments (security reviews, compliance constraints, procurement, change management)</li> <li>Experience building with agent frameworks and/or workflow orchestration systems</li> <li>Familiarity with HRIS, payroll, identity/access management, or adjacent enterprise domains</li> <li>Experience with multi-tenant SaaS, RBAC, and data privacy by design</li> </ul> </li> </ul> <h2>Key Responsibilities</h2> <ul> <li><strong>Partner with customers</strong> to understand operational challenges, constraints, and success criteria; run structured technical discovery and define the “definition of done”</li> <li><strong>Translate open-ended problems</strong> into clear technical designs and implementation plans (architecture, data flows, integration surfaces, security considerations, rollout strategy)</li> <li><strong>Build AI-enabled solutions</strong> that integrate with customer systems and Remote’s platform (e.g., data pipelines, workflow automations, tool integrations, agentic services) and perform real tasks end-to-end</li> <li><strong>Own deployments</strong> including reliability, performance, observability, incident response, and continuous improvement</li> <li><strong>Develop evaluation and measurement</strong> for AI behavior: success metrics, test harnesses, golden datasets, regression suites, and guardrails (quality, safety, privacy)</li> <li><strong>Work with real data</strong> to validate outputs, quantify impact, and iterate quickly based on evidence</li> <li><strong>Collaborate cross-functionally</strong> with Product and Engineering to ship high-quality solutions and to upstream reusable components</li> <li><strong>Create leverage</strong> by turning one-off solutions into repeatable playbooks, reference architectures, templates, and internal tooling</li> <li><strong>Be the voice of the field</strong>: bring back concrete customer needs, edge cases, and constraints that should shape product strategy</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Practicals</strong></h2> <ul> <li><strong>Team:</strong> Remote Build / Customer Engineering (or equivalent)</li> <li><strong>Location:</strong> Remote</li> <li><strong>Time zones:</strong> Ability to overlap with customer working hours as needed</li> <li><strong>Travel</strong>: Whilst the majority of the work is Remote, please expect around 10% of travel for customer engagements</li> <li><strong>Start date:</strong> As soon as possible</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Application process</strong></h2> <ol> <li>Recruiter screen</li> <li>Hiring Manager interview</li> <li>Technical challenge</li> <li>Team interview</li> <li>Bar Raiser interview&nbsp;</li> <li>Executive interview&nbsp;</li> <li>Offer + <a href="https://www.notion.so/Veremark-Remote-96e108c037b8423cbd4c3f07a1f9b38b">Prior employment verification check</a>&nbsp;</li> </ol><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>Remote's <a href="https://www.notion.so/remotecom/people-Total-Rewards-1945bce8d3924ece9421ba8630f57b0c">Total Rewards philosophy</a> is to ensure fair, unbiased compensation and fair <span class="link-annotation-unknown-block-id-1691622878">equity</span><span class="discussion-level-1 discussion-id-f2a82bc4-09e4-4a71-ad93-755b1d26a690 notion-enable-hover" data-token-index="3"> pay </span>along with competitive benefits in all locations in which we operate. We do not agree to or encourage cheap-labor practices and therefore we ensure to pay above in-location rates. We hope to inspire other companies to support global talent-hiring and bring local wealth to developing countries.</p> <p>At first glance our salary bands seem quite wide - here is some context. At Remote we have international operations and a globally distributed workforce.&nbsp; We use geo ranges to consider geographic pay differentials as part of our global compensation strategy to remain competitive in various markets while we hiring globally.<br><br>Our salary ranges are determined by role, level and location, and our job titles may span more than one career level. The actual base pay for the successful candidate in this role is dependent upon many factors such as location, transferable or job-related skills, work experience, relevant training, business needs, and market demands. The base salary range may be subject to change.<br><br><em data-stringify-type="italic">At Remote, we foster internal mobility as a key element of our culture of employee growth and development, supported by a compensation philosophy that guarantees pay equity and fairness. Therefore, all compensation changes associated with an internal move will be reviewed by the Total Rewards &amp; People Enablement team on a case by case basis.</em></p></div><div class="title">The annual salary range for this full-time position is</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$53,300</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$215,750 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><h2><strong>Benefits</strong></h2> <div class="p-rich_text_section"> <div class="p-rich_text_section"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Our full benefits &amp; perks are explained in our handbook at&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="http://remote.com/r/benefits" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="http://remote.com/r/benefits" data-sk="tooltip_parent">remote.com/r/benefits</a>. As a global company, each country works differently, but some benefits/perks are for all Remoters:</span></div> <ul class="p-rich_text_list p-rich_text_list__bullet" data-stringify-type="unordered-list" data-indent="0" data-border="0"> <li style="font-size: 12pt;" data-stringify-indent="0" data-stringify-border="0"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">work from anywhere</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;" data-stringify-indent="0" data-stringify-border="0"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">flexible paid time off</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;" data-stringify-indent="0" data-stringify-border="0"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">flexible working hours (we are&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://remote.com/async" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://www.notion.so/remotecom/Working-Async-at-Remote-80c01cd443ad4c77a8ceaef7c5fba5d0" data-sk="tooltip_parent">async</a>)</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;" data-stringify-indent="0" data-stringify-border="0"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">16 weeks paid parental leave</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;" data-stringify-indent="0" data-stringify-border="0"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">mental health support services</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;" data-stringify-indent="0" data-stringify-border="0"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">stock options</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;" data-stringify-indent="0" data-stringify-border="0"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">learning budget</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;" data-stringify-indent="0" data-stringify-border="0"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">home office budget &amp; IT equipment</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;" data-stringify-indent="0" data-stringify-border="0"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">budget for local in-person social events or co-working spaces</span></li> </ul> </div> <h2><strong>How you’ll plan your day (and life)</strong></h2> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">We work async at Remote which means you can plan your schedule around your life (and not around meetings). Read more at <a href="https://remote.com/async" target="_blank">remote.com/async</a>.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">You will be empowered to take ownership and be proactive. When in doubt you will default to action instead of waiting. Your <strong>life-work balance</strong> is important and you will be encouraged to put yourself and your family first, and fit work around your needs.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">If that sounds like something you want, apply now!</span></p> <h2><strong>How to apply</strong></h2> <ol> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Please fill out the form below and upload your CV with a PDF format.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong data-stringify-type="bold">We kindly ask you to submit your application and CV in English, as this is the standardised language we use here at Remote.</strong></span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; text-align: left;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">If you don’t have an up to date CV but you are still interested in talking to us, please feel free to add a copy of your LinkedIn profile instead.</span></li> </ol> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Not only do we encourage folks from all ethnic groups, genders, sexuality, age, abilities, disability status and any other under-represented group to apply, but we prioritize a sense of belonging. We have 4 ERGs (Women, Disability, Queer, Minorities in Tech) who meet regularly with the People team. During your interviews and beyond, we ask &amp; encourage anybody who needs an accommodation to request one from their recruiter.<br></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">We will ask you to voluntarily tell us your pronouns at interview stage, and you will have the option to answer our anonymous demographic questionnaire when you apply below. As an equal employment opportunity employer it’s important to us that our workforce reflects people of all backgrounds, identities, and experiences and this data will help us to stay accountable. We thank you for providing this data, if you chose to.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">At Remote, we embrace AI as a valuable tool while prioritizing human creativity and authenticity.&nbsp;We look forward to meeting candidates who balance innovation with genuine expertise and experience.&nbsp;To learn more about Remote's AI guidelines check see&nbsp;<a href="https://www.notion.so/remotecom/Guidelines-on-using-AI-when-applying-for-a-job-at-Remote-11ccb4dadab4805f80a7c73b6567bd8f" target="_blank" data-saferedirecturl="https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.notion.so/remotecom/Guidelines-on-using-AI-when-applying-for-a-job-at-Remote-11ccb4dadab4805f80a7c73b6567bd8f&amp;source=gmail&amp;ust=1733927526443000&amp;usg=AOvVaw2sIVooKuyGfRra1PtGXreV">here</a>.&nbsp;</span><br><br><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><em>Please note we accept applications on an ongoing basis.&nbsp;</em></span></p></div>

title: Lead Marketing Data & Analytics Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong>About Jetson</strong></span></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]" style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Jetson is on a mission to accelerate the transition of 100 million homes across North America away from fossil fuels toward sustainable energy use. We believe in a future that is 100% electric and 100% better.</span></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]" style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Homes are one of the largest sources of carbon emissions, yet adoption of solutions like heat pumps remains slow due to cost and complexity. Jetson is solving this by building the first fully vertically integrated home electrification company — making clean energy simple, transparent, and affordable.</span></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]" style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">We rely heavily on technology, automation, and data to scale this impact. At Jetson, we value people who are excellent at their craft, curious about new tools (including AI), and motivated to continuously improve how work gets done.</span></p></div><h2 class="text-text-100 mt-3 -mb-1 text-[1.125rem] font-bold"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">The Opportunity</span></h2> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Jetson has gone from $20M to $100M in run-rate sales this year. We're on track to end the year around $250M and scaling toward $1B. That growth is being driven by a marketing org that is getting more sophisticated every quarter — performance marketing across Meta, Google, direct mail, OOH, and CTV; a strong in-house creative studio; an emerging partnerships function; and an experimentation and lifecycle team that needs sharper attribution and faster feedback loops to keep compounding.</span></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">The data layer underneath all of that is what unlocks the next leg of growth. We've built out a real data lake — Iceberg on AWS Glue, dbt for transformation, Fivetran for ingestion, Metabase for BI. The core framework exists. Meaningful work remains to refine it, fill the gaps, integrate the next wave of sources, and ensure the team has accurate real-time data they can trust.</span></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You'll own the marketing data lake end to end — the integrations that bring data in, the bronze/silver/gold models that shape it, the dashboards that surface it, and the analysis that turns it into decisions the team actually makes.</span></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">This is a full-stack role. On any given week you might be standing up a new Fivetran connector for a direct mail vendor, writing the dbt models to land it cleanly into our medallion architecture, building the Metabase dashboard for the performance team to use, and then pulling the analysis together to tell them whether the campaign worked. There's no handoff between the engineering and the analysis — you do both.</span></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You'll work closely with the performance marketing team (who'll lean on you for measurement and incrementality), the growth and experimentation team (who'll need experiment infrastructure and LTV models), and our core data engineering team (who own the broader platform you're building on top of).</span></p> <h2 class="text-text-100 mt-3 -mb-1 text-[1.125rem] font-bold"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">What You'll Own</span></h2> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>The marketing data lake.</strong> Iceberg, Glue, dbt, Fivetran, Metabase. You own the bronze/silver/gold models, the schemas, the freshness, the cost, and the contract with downstream consumers. If a number is wrong in a dashboard, you're the one who finds out why and fixes it at the source.</span></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Source integrations.</strong> Every new channel, vendor, or partnership comes with a new data source — Meta and Google Ads, HubSpot, direct mail vendors, CTV platforms, call tracking, utility and financing partners. You stand up the Fivetran connectors (or write the Python when Fivetran can't), land the raw data in bronze, model it through silver and gold, and surface it where it needs to be.</span></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Attribution and measurement.</strong> Multi-touch attribution across paid, organic, direct mail, OOH, CTV, partnerships, referrals, and field sales. Identity resolution across web, CRM, and offline conversions. You'll design and maintain the attribution models the team relies on day to day, and the incrementality work that informs bigger budget decisions.</span></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Experimentation infrastructure and readout.</strong> Geo holdouts, conversion lift studies, direct mail incrementality, on-site experiments. You'll build the data infrastructure that makes them trustworthy — assignment logging, variant tracking, exposure data — and you'll do the analysis to tell the team whether the result is real.</span></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>LTV, conversion, and channel ROI.</strong> The models that tell us what a customer is worth, what each channel is actually delivering, and where the next dollar should go.</span></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Dashboards and self-serve.</strong> The Metabase dashboards leadership, marketing, and sales check daily. Built so the team can answer their own questions when they can, and knows when to come find you when they can't.</span></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Being the analytics partner to the GTM team.</strong> The marketing, performance, and exec teams will bring you real questions all the time — whether a campaign worked, why one market is lagging another, where we should be investing more. You answer those questions with data, clearly, and with enough context that the team trusts the answer.</span></p> <h2 class="text-text-100 mt-3 -mb-1 text-[1.125rem] font-bold"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">What We're Looking For</span></h2> <ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3"> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>5+ years working on marketing, growth, or revenue data.</strong> Pure backend or pure analytics engineering backgrounds aren't quite right — we need someone who's been close enough to the marketing problem to know where the hard parts are.</span></li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Deep dbt fluency.</strong> You've shipped real production dbt projects, understand medallion architecture, and have opinions on testing, contracts, and model design. dbt is non-negotiable.</span></li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Hands-on with a modern data lake or warehouse stack.</strong> Iceberg, Glue, Fivetran, and Metabase are our tools, but we care about the patterns more than the specific vendors. Equivalent work on Snowflake/BigQuery/Databricks with comparable tooling translates directly.</span></li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Strong SQL and Python.</strong> Deep SQL — you think in SQL, not around it. Python for the integrations Fivetran can't handle, for the stats SQL can't do cleanly, and for everything in between.</span></li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>You've built attribution before, not just consumed it.</strong> You understand the difference between last-click, MTA, MMM, and incrementality testing, and you know why each one is useful and where each one breaks.</span></li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>You've supported experimentation at scale.</strong> Geo tests, holdouts, conversion lift, incrementality — pick at least one and have a real story about it.</span></li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>You build dashboards that get used.</strong> You make thoughtful design decisions, not just drop fields onto a canvas. You know the difference between a dashboard that answers questions and one that creates them.</span></li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>You care about data quality the way good software engineers care about test coverage.</strong> Tests, contracts, monitoring, lineage. You don't ship a model without thinking about how you'll know when it breaks.</span></li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>AI-native.</strong> You've used Claude Code, Cursor, or similar tools to ship real work. You think about how AI changes the leverage of a one-person data team, not whether it does.</span></li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>You communicate clearly with non-technical marketers.</strong> Most of your stakeholders won't speak SQL. You can explain why a number changed without making them feel small for asking.</span></li> </ul> <h2 class="text-text-100 mt-3 -mb-1 text-[1.125rem] font-bold"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Nice to Have</span></h2> <ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3"> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Direct experience with our stack — Iceberg, AWS Glue, Fivetran, dbt, Metabase.</span></li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Experience with marketing-specific sources: Meta and Google Ads APIs, HubSpot, call tracking platforms, direct mail vendor data, CTV reporting.</span></li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Experience at a company that scaled from low nine figures to ten figures in revenue.</span></li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Experience with identity resolution and customer data platforms.</span></li> </ul> <h2 class="text-text-100 mt-3 -mb-1 text-[1.125rem] font-bold"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Why This Role</span></h2> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">This is the highest-leverage data hire we'll make this year. The decisions made off the data you build will move millions of dollars in ad spend, shape channel mix, and define how we measure the business as we scale to $1B. The infrastructure work is real — there's a clean greenfield problem here that few companies our size get to solve properly. And you'll be doing it with a marketing org that has the budget, the ambition, and the technical literacy to use what you build.</span></p> <h2 class="text-text-100 mt-3 -mb-1 text-[1.125rem] font-bold"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">How to Apply</span></h2> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Apply at [link]. There's a short questionnaire as part of the application — we read every one.</span></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">If you've built marketing data infrastructure that you're proud of, tell us about it. Specifics matter more than scope.</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]" style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><em>Do you feel like you don't have everything that's listed above but can still do the job? If you have the core skills and experience that we're looking for and are willing to use your talent to learn the rest, we encourage you to apply!</em></span></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]" style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong>U.S. Roles</strong> Jetson is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, genetic information, sexual orientation, or gender identity. If you require accommodation during the recruitment process, please contact us.</span></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]" style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Canada Roles</strong> Jetson is an equal opportunity employer committed to inclusive hiring. We do not discriminate on any ground protected under applicable human rights legislation. If you require accommodation at any stage of the recruitment process, please contact us.</span></p></div>

title: Forward Deployed Analytics Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><h2>About Hightouch</h2> <p>Hightouch is an Agentic Marketing Platform powered by the industry-leading Composable CDP. With complete brand context, customer data, and performance history in one place, every marketer finally has the power to build and ship end-to-end campaigns themselves. Teams move faster, stay on brand, and get AI marketing that actually works.</p> <p>Founded in 2019 and headquartered in San Francisco, Hightouch enables marketing teams to analyze performance, brainstorm ideas, and generate creative at a speed and quality that wasn't previously possible.</p> <p>Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Customer Data Platforms, Hightouch is trusted by leading enterprises like Domino's, Spotify, Aritzia, Cars.com, Ramp, and PetSmart.</p> <p>At Hightouch, our mission is to help our customers leverage data and AI to grow their businesses. The team is ambitious, impact-driven, efficient — and we believe humility, kindness, and compassion are essential to our success. If you're energized by velocity, obsessed with raising the bar, and want to build alongside people who care deeply about each other and our customers, we'd love to meet you.</p></div><h3><strong>About the Role</strong></h3> <p>We are looking for a highly analytical and customer-obsessed <strong>Forward Deployed Analytics Engineer</strong> to bridge the gap between our customers' complex legacy reporting environments and the future of agentic data exploration. Sitting within the Solutions &amp; Success organization, you will be the tip of the spear in helping our enterprise customers activate the full power of Hightouch’s Agentic CDP.</p> <p>Your core mission is to deeply understand our customers' existing marketing and BI reports, reverse-engineer their logic, and cleanly translate them into Hightouch. More importantly, you will architect and maintain the underlying context and semantic layers that power our chat-based reporting features. You will ensure that when a marketer asks our AI an ad-hoc reporting question, the system generates SQL that is not only accurate but highly reliable, idempotent, and perfectly aligned with the customer's unique business definitions.</p> <h3><strong>What You'll Do</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Strategic Scoping &amp; Alignment:</strong> Scope difficult reporting questions and clarify the core business decisions the resulting reports must support.</li> <li><strong>Complex Reporting &amp; Translation:</strong> Audit and deconstruct complex customer marketing reports across legacy BI tools. Build, implement, and translate these into complex reports, analyses, and reusable reporting frameworks within Hightouch’s aCDP.</li> <li><strong>Deep Data Investigation:</strong> Rigorously investigate data sources, identity resolution logic, metric definitions, and audience behavior within the aCDP to ensure absolute accuracy.</li> <li><strong>Customer Enablement &amp; Training:</strong> Train non-technical and non-AI forward marketers on how to use AI effectively to brainstorm and strategize, particularly when Ads and LCM Studio are not in-scope.</li> <li><strong>Cross-Functional Collaboration:</strong> Explain your analytical findings in a clear, actionable way that helps our customers make critical business decisions.</li> <li><strong>Context Layer Engineering &amp; Documentation:</strong> Design, build, and tune the semantic context layer. Rigorously document assumptions, data limitations, and recommended next steps for ongoing use, ensuring report generation maintains strict consistency and idempotency.</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h3><strong>What We're Looking For</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Deep SQL Expertise:</strong> You write clean, performant, and scalable SQL. You are deeply comfortable navigating cloud data platforms, particularly Snowflake and Databricks.</li> <li><strong>BI &amp; Marketing Analytics DNA:</strong> You have extensive experience building or dissecting BI reports. You understand marketing schemas, attribution models, and what metrics actually matter to a growth team.</li> <li><strong>Systems Thinker:</strong> You understand how to build robust semantic layers. You can take a messy, real-world database and organize it into a structured, highly contextualized format that an LLM can reliably query.</li> <li><strong>Customer-Facing Polish:</strong> You possess the empathy and communication skills necessary to navigate complex technical discussions, train marketers, and deliver clear findings to both engineers and non-technical stakeholders.</li> <li><strong>Martech Knowledge:</strong> You understand the modern data stack and marketing technology infrastructure (CDPs, ETL/ELT pipelines, and data activation systems).</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Bonus Points</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Prior experience working with LLMs, prompt engineering, or AI-driven analytics tools.</li> <li>Background in a Forward Deployed, Solutions Engineering, or Technical Customer Success role.</li> <li>Familiarity with array aggregation and object manipulation in modern cloud data warehouses.</li> </ul> <h3>Compensation</h3> <p>$100,000-$160,000 USD per year, location-independent. We also offer meaningful equity in the form of ISO options, with early exercise and a 10-year post-termination exercise window.</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>E-Verify Statement</strong></p> <p><em>Hightouch participates in E-Verify. After you join the team, we'll verify your eligibility to work in the U.S. by submitting information from your Form I-9 to the Social Security Administration and, if needed, the Department of Homeland Security. This process happens post-hire only — we never use E-Verify to pre-screen applicants.</em></p> <p><em><br></em><a href="https://www.rhoworld.com/wp-content/uploads/E-Verify_Participation_Poster-1.pdf"><em>E-Verify Notice</em><em><br></em></a><a href="https://www.rhoworld.com/wp-content/uploads/E-Verify_Participation_Poster_ES-1.pdf"><em>E-Verify Notice (Spanish)</em><em><br></em></a><a href="https://www.rhoworld.com/wp-content/uploads/ier_poster_final.pdf"><em>Right to Work Notice</em><em><br></em></a><a href="https://www.rhoworld.com/wp-content/uploads/spanish_ier_poster_final.pdf"><em>Right to Work Notice (Spanish)</em></a></p></div>

title: Forward Deployed Creative Designer, Ads
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><h2>About Hightouch</h2> <p>Hightouch is an Agentic Marketing Platform powered by the industry-leading Composable CDP. With complete brand context, customer data, and performance history in one place, every marketer finally has the power to build and ship end-to-end campaigns themselves. Teams move faster, stay on brand, and get AI marketing that actually works.</p> <p>Founded in 2019 and headquartered in San Francisco, Hightouch enables marketing teams to analyze performance, brainstorm ideas, and generate creative at a speed and quality that wasn't previously possible.</p> <p>Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Customer Data Platforms, Hightouch is trusted by leading enterprises like Domino's, Spotify, Aritzia, Cars.com, Ramp, and PetSmart.</p> <p>At Hightouch, our mission is to help our customers leverage data and AI to grow their businesses. The team is ambitious, impact-driven, efficient — and we believe humility, kindness, and compassion are essential to our success. If you're energized by velocity, obsessed with raising the bar, and want to build alongside people who care deeply about each other and our customers, we'd love to meet you.</p></div><h3><strong>The Role</strong></h3> <p>Most AI-generated ads still look like AI-generated ads. Generic lighting, off-brand color, the same five compositions on a loop. Brands that care about their identity have stayed on the sidelines because the output hasn't met their bar.</p> <p>We're changing that. Hightouch's Agentic Marketing Platform is the system enterprise marketers are using to plan, generate, and ship campaigns with their data, their guidelines, and their voice. Our customers include Domino's, Chime, Spotify, Ramp, Whoop, and Grammarly. They are not going to settle for slop, and neither are we.</p> <p><strong>We're hiring a Forward Deployed Creative Designer, Ads </strong>to be the human who proves what's possible. You'll collaborate alongside our Solutions Engineering team on enterprise customer calls, translate brand guidelines into agentic workflows that actually produce on-brand work, and ship the creative that makes the case. You will be the most influential creative voice in the room, both for our customers and for our product.</p> <p>You will define how the most recognizable brands in the world make ads with AI, and you will watch the work you direct ship to millions of impressions.</p> <h3><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Drive Product Adoption:</strong> Partner directly with enterprise marketing teams to onboard them onto the Agentic Marketing Platform Ads, ensuring they see immediate value through high-quality creative output.</li> <li><strong>Master AI Workflows:</strong> Utilize advanced prompt engineering across leading generative AI models to create polished, on-brand, and performant ad creatives (imagery, video, and copy) tailored to complex client guidelines.</li> <li><strong>Consult &amp; Strategize</strong>: Act as a creative consultant for top-tier brands. You will help clients understand how to merge traditional brand guidelines with agentic AI workflows, ensuring the output maintains a high bar for "taste" and aesthetic quality.</li> <li><strong>Performance Optimization</strong>: Collaborate with clients to set up A/B tests, analyze creative performance data, and continuously refine prompts and strategies to drive higher ROI and conversion rates.</li> <li><strong>Cross-Functional Collaboration</strong>: Work closely with the product and engineering teams, providing ground-level feedback from enterprise clients to shape the future roadmap of our AI Decisioning and creative generation tools.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>What You Bring</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>A portfolio that does the talking:</strong>&nbsp;Real ads, real product launches, real campaigns. Ideally with AI integrated into the workflow, but the bar is craft. If your work is exceptional, we want to see it. (Applications without a portfolio link will not be reviewed.)</li> <li><strong>Deep AI fluency:</strong>&nbsp;You don't need us to teach you what's new. You're already testing the latest image and video models the week they drop, you’re stringing them together in node based UIs, you have strong opinions about which ones get which jobs, and you know how to push them past their defaults to hit a specific look.</li> <li><strong>Enterprise client instincts:</strong>&nbsp;You've worked directly with sophisticated marketing teams, in-house, agency, or consultancy, and you know how to navigate brand reviews, legal, and the politics of getting work approved.</li> <li><strong>Performance marketing literacy:</strong>&nbsp;You understand the difference between an ad that wins a Cannes Lion and an ad that wins a CAC target, and you can hold both standards at once.</li> <li><strong>Taste:</strong>&nbsp;This is the hardest one to write a bullet for, so we'll just say it: you have it, your portfolio shows it, and you can articulate <em>why</em> something works.</li> </ul> <h3>You might be a fit if you are...</h3> <ul> <li>A <strong>Senior Art Director or Creative Lead at an agency</strong> who's frustrated with the pace, the layers of approval, and watching AI eat workflows you can't influence from where you sit.</li> <li>An <strong>in-house Creative Lead at a DTC or consumer brand</strong> who's been quietly building AI workflows nights and weekends, and is ready to do it as the job.</li> <li>A <strong>Creative Strategist at a Meta, Google, or TikTok partner shop</strong> who wants to be closer to the product and further from the deck.</li> <li>A <strong>product or brand designer at a fast-moving startup</strong> who's been pulled into ads work, found you're great at it, and want to go all-in on the AI side.</li> <li>Or you don't fit any of these neatly, but your portfolio is undeniable and you've been waiting for a role that takes AI in advertising seriously. Apply.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Why Hightouch?</strong></h3> <p>You’ll be joining a fast-paced, high-growth environment where you can directly impact the success of some of the world’s most recognizable brands. You will be at the absolute forefront of AI in marketing, helping to define how the industry uses agentic models to drive real revenue.</p> <h3>Compensation</h3> <p>The salary range for this position is $140,000-$180,000 USD per year, which is location independent in accordance with our remote-first policy. We also offer meaningful equity compensation in the form of ISO options, and offer early exercise and a 10-year post-termination exercise window.</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>E-Verify Statement</strong></p> <p><em>Hightouch participates in E-Verify. After you join the team, we'll verify your eligibility to work in the U.S. by submitting information from your Form I-9 to the Social Security Administration and, if needed, the Department of Homeland Security. This process happens post-hire only — we never use E-Verify to pre-screen applicants.</em></p> <p><em><br></em><a href="https://www.rhoworld.com/wp-content/uploads/E-Verify_Participation_Poster-1.pdf"><em>E-Verify Notice</em><em><br></em></a><a href="https://www.rhoworld.com/wp-content/uploads/E-Verify_Participation_Poster_ES-1.pdf"><em>E-Verify Notice (Spanish)</em><em><br></em></a><a href="https://www.rhoworld.com/wp-content/uploads/ier_poster_final.pdf"><em>Right to Work Notice</em><em><br></em></a><a href="https://www.rhoworld.com/wp-content/uploads/spanish_ier_poster_final.pdf"><em>Right to Work Notice (Spanish)</em></a></p></div>

title: Forward Deployed Creative Strategist
location: New York, New York,  San Francisco, California, Remote
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><h2>About Hightouch</h2> <p>Hightouch is an Agentic Marketing Platform powered by the industry-leading Composable CDP. With complete brand context, customer data, and performance history in one place, every marketer finally has the power to build and ship end-to-end campaigns themselves. Teams move faster, stay on brand, and get AI marketing that actually works.</p> <p>Founded in 2019 and headquartered in San Francisco, Hightouch enables marketing teams to analyze performance, brainstorm ideas, and generate creative at a speed and quality that wasn't previously possible.</p> <p>Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Customer Data Platforms, Hightouch is trusted by leading enterprises like Domino's, Spotify, Aritzia, Cars.com, Ramp, and PetSmart.</p> <p>At Hightouch, our mission is to help our customers leverage data and AI to grow their businesses. The team is ambitious, impact-driven, efficient — and we believe humility, kindness, and compassion are essential to our success. If you're energized by velocity, obsessed with raising the bar, and want to build alongside people who care deeply about each other and our customers, we'd love to meet you.</p></div><h3><strong>Why Hightouch?</strong></h3> <p>Here, you will be at the forefront of the next evolution of MarTech. You’ll have the autonomy to shape a massive new product category while working alongside a world-class team and some of the most forward-thinking consumer brands in the world.</p> <h3><strong>The Role</strong></h3> <p>We are looking for our first <strong>Forward Deployed Creative Strategist</strong>&nbsp;to act as the crucial bridge between our cutting-edge agentic platform and the world’s most innovative brands.</p> <p>Reporting into the Solutions &amp; Success organization, you will be a zero-to-one foundational member of the team. You will speak peer-to-peer with performance marketing leaders, educating them on the paradigm shift toward agentic marketing systems, and guiding them through successful pilots. You will pair your deep marketing expertise with innate sales acumen to navigate complex buying processes and drive adoption.</p> <h3><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Act as a Strategic Peer:</strong> Engage with performance marketing teams at top-tier, innovative companies. You will speak their language, understand their current attribution and campaign scaling challenges, and educate them on how agentic workflows can transform their operations.</li> <li><strong>Drive Deals &amp; Pilots:</strong> Partner closely with our sales organization to navigate complex enterprise buying processes. You will be instrumental in defining pilot success criteria and driving those pilots forward to closed-won deals.</li> <li><strong>Collaborate with Creative:</strong> Work hand-in-hand with our Forward Deployed Creative Designers. You will bridge the gap between performance data and creative execution, ensuring that AI-generated assets (utilizing the latest generation models like Veo and Nano Banana 2) are optimized for conversion and pilot success.</li> <li><strong>Shape the Playbook:</strong> As the first person in this role, you will help design the go-to-market motion, define the educational frameworks we use for new customers, and feed critical market insights back to our product and engineering teams.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>What We’re Looking For</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Performance Marketing DNA:</strong> Deep, hands-on experience running and scaling performance marketing campaigns. You understand the metrics, the pain points, and the day-to-day realities of a performance marketer.</li> <li><strong>Sales Acumen:</strong> You possess strong commercial instincts. Whether you have formal sales experience or a natural ability to guide a prospect through an evaluation, you know how to build consensus, handle objections, and close.</li> <li><strong>Cross-Functional Fluency:</strong> Proven experience working closely with creative teams and designers. You know how to brief creatives, evaluate assets, and tie creative performance back to marketing metrics.</li> <li><strong>A "Zero-to-One" Mindset:</strong> You thrive in ambiguity and are excited by the prospect of building a new function from the ground up in a fast-paced environment.</li> <li><strong>Technical Curiosity:</strong> An eagerness to dive deep into AI-driven creative performance and the evolving landscape of agentic marketing tools.</li> </ul> <p>The on-target earning range for this position is $180,000-$250,000 per year, which is location-independent in accordance with our remote-first policy. We also offer meaningful equity compensation in the form of ISO options, and offer early exercise and a 10-year post-termination exercise window.</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>E-Verify Statement</strong></p> <p><em>Hightouch participates in E-Verify. After you join the team, we'll verify your eligibility to work in the U.S. by submitting information from your Form I-9 to the Social Security Administration and, if needed, the Department of Homeland Security. This process happens post-hire only — we never use E-Verify to pre-screen applicants.</em></p> <p><em><br></em><a href="https://www.rhoworld.com/wp-content/uploads/E-Verify_Participation_Poster-1.pdf"><em>E-Verify Notice</em><em><br></em></a><a href="https://www.rhoworld.com/wp-content/uploads/E-Verify_Participation_Poster_ES-1.pdf"><em>E-Verify Notice (Spanish)</em><em><br></em></a><a href="https://www.rhoworld.com/wp-content/uploads/ier_poster_final.pdf"><em>Right to Work Notice</em><em><br></em></a><a href="https://www.rhoworld.com/wp-content/uploads/spanish_ier_poster_final.pdf"><em>Right to Work Notice (Spanish)</em></a></p></div>

title: Forward Deployed Marketing Data Scientist
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><h2>About Hightouch</h2> <p>Hightouch is an Agentic Marketing Platform powered by the industry-leading Composable CDP. With complete brand context, customer data, and performance history in one place, every marketer finally has the power to build and ship end-to-end campaigns themselves. Teams move faster, stay on brand, and get AI marketing that actually works.</p> <p>Founded in 2019 and headquartered in San Francisco, Hightouch enables marketing teams to analyze performance, brainstorm ideas, and generate creative at a speed and quality that wasn't previously possible.</p> <p>Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Customer Data Platforms, Hightouch is trusted by leading enterprises like Domino's, Spotify, Aritzia, Cars.com, Ramp, and PetSmart.</p> <p>At Hightouch, our mission is to help our customers leverage data and AI to grow their businesses. The team is ambitious, impact-driven, efficient — and we believe humility, kindness, and compassion are essential to our success. If you're energized by velocity, obsessed with raising the bar, and want to build alongside people who care deeply about each other and our customers, we'd love to meet you.</p></div><h2><strong>About the Role</strong></h2> <p>We’re looking for a <strong>Forward Deployed Marketing Data Scientist</strong> to partner closely with our AI Decisioning customers and internal engineering teams to ensure that AI-driven marketing campaigns deliver measurable, compounding impact. This role is uniquely cross-functional: you’ll spend time diagnosing model behavior, tuning ML levers, analyzing incrementality, exploring customer data, and explaining insights to marketers and executives.</p> <p>Marketing teams come to Hightouch to transform how they operate. Instead of planning campaigns weeks ahead on a calendar, AI Decisioning continuously learns customer preferences and executes 1:1 messaging that adapts in real time. Your mission is to make sure that these AI agents perform at their best—and to help customers understand <em>why</em> they are performing the way they are.</p> <p>You’ll work alongside ML engineers, product managers, Solutions Consultants, and some of the world’s most recognizable brands to improve campaign performance, debug experiments, and identify opportunities for additional lift. Roughly <strong>30%</strong> of your time will be customer-facing and <strong>70%</strong> deep analytical and modeling work.</p> <p>No two days are the same, but you can expect to:</p> <h3><strong>Own diagnostics, insights, and tuning for AI Decisioning campaigns</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Explain <em>why</em> AI Decisioning is driving lift using counterfactuals, incrementality breakdowns, and cohort analysis.</li> <li>Debug performance issues, iterate on reward functions, and ensure the agent’s recommendations align with customer goals.</li> <li>Investigate experiment setups (send volumes, reachability, channel constraints) and surface actionable recommendations.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Work deeply with data in notebooks and customer warehouses</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Pull down historical data to run exploratory analyses using Polars / Pandas in Jupyter notebooks</li> <li>Modify and improve customer feature matrices to unlock deep personalization.</li> <li>Conduct deeper warehouse-level SQL analyses when insights aren’t available in the UI.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Build lightweight tooling that enables scale</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Create templates, notebooks, scripts, and repeatable workflows that improve how we analyze performance across customers.</li> <li>Identify systemic gaps and influence the direction of ML reporting and introspection.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Communicate ML concepts clearly to non-technical stakeholders</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Present model insights and recommendations to marketers, analysts, and executives.</li> <li>Explain how the decision engine handles cold start, message transfer learning, exploration vs. exploitation, and more.</li> <li>Partner closely with Solutions Consultants to identify and drive new opportunities for uplift.</li> </ul> <h2><strong>What We’re Looking For</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Strong ability to perform deep exploratory data analysis in Python (Polars / Pandas, Jupyter notebooks).</li> <li>Ability to write and interpret SQL for customer warehouse analysis.</li> <li>High-level understanding of ML modeling concepts (features, hyperparameters, reward functions, training windows).</li> <li>Excellent communication skills; able to explain technical reasoning simply and confidently to marketers.</li> <li>A customer-first attitude with high ownership and urgency when resolving issues.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Bonus Points</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Experience setting up and analyzing marketing experiments such as A/B, multivariate tests.</li> <li>Prior experience in an applied ML, data science, analytics engineering, or forward-deployed role.</li> <li>Experience building lightweight internal tools or scripting solutions.</li> </ul> <p>We are looking for talented, intellectually curious, and motivated individuals who are interested in tackling the problems above. We focus on impact and potential for growth more than years of experience. The salary range for this position is $140,000 - $220,000 USD per year, which is location independent in accordance with our remote-first policy.</p> <h2>Interview Process</h2> <p>We have limited inbound applications to one application per candidate. You will be auto-rejected if you apply to multiple roles. Please only apply to the position you are most qualified for.</p> <p>Our interview process evaluates the most important dimensions of the role: analytical depth, customer communication, first-principles problem solving, and alignment with Hightouch’s values.</p> <p><strong>Intro Call [15–30m]</strong></p> <p>Introductory call with either a member of our recruiting team or the hiring manager to get to know each other and see if the role could be a good mutual fit.</p> <p><strong>Take Home Data Analysis Exercise + Review Session [45m]</strong></p> <p>You’ll complete a short take-home assignment focused on exploratory data analysis of an example dataset. In the live review, you’ll walk through your approach, explain your reasoning, and present your findings as if you were guiding a customer through your analysis. We’re looking for clarity of communication, rigor of thinking, and the ability to turn data into actionable insights.</p> <p><strong>Experiment Design &amp; Analysis Session [90m]</strong></p> <p>A hands-on session where we collaboratively design and evaluate an experiment end-to-end. This includes:</p> <ul> <li>Defining the experimental goal and how success should be measured</li> <li>Identifying the most relevant context and features to use in modeling</li> <li>Interpreting example results and diagnosing performance patterns</li> <li>Recommending next steps and communicating tradeoffs</li> </ul> <p><strong>Hiring Manager Interview [30m]</strong></p> <p>Chat with hiring manager about past experiences and future operating preferences to assess fit on company values and operating principles.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>E-Verify Statement</strong></p> <p><em>Hightouch participates in E-Verify. After you join the team, we'll verify your eligibility to work in the U.S. by submitting information from your Form I-9 to the Social Security Administration and, if needed, the Department of Homeland Security. This process happens post-hire only — we never use E-Verify to pre-screen applicants.</em></p> <p><em><br></em><a href="https://www.rhoworld.com/wp-content/uploads/E-Verify_Participation_Poster-1.pdf"><em>E-Verify Notice</em><em><br></em></a><a href="https://www.rhoworld.com/wp-content/uploads/E-Verify_Participation_Poster_ES-1.pdf"><em>E-Verify Notice (Spanish)</em><em><br></em></a><a href="https://www.rhoworld.com/wp-content/uploads/ier_poster_final.pdf"><em>Right to Work Notice</em><em><br></em></a><a href="https://www.rhoworld.com/wp-content/uploads/spanish_ier_poster_final.pdf"><em>Right to Work Notice (Spanish)</em></a></p></div>

title: Senior Data Engineer
full_description: <h3><strong>About the Role</strong></h3> <p>Together AI is looking for a Senior Data Engineer to help define, build, and operate the data infrastructure that handles millions of events every day to power Together’s mission-critical systems. As a Senior Data Engineer, you will work with our Data and Commerce engineering team to scale the data processing components of Together’s usage-based billing system, real-time customer-facing analytics product, and internal business intelligence tools. You will work across both cloud-native services and globally distributed data centers.</p> <p>If you thrive in fast-paced environments and have a passion for defining and building early-stage data platforms for a rapidly scaling and data-intensive company, this is for you.</p> <h3><strong>Requirements</strong></h3> <ul> <li>5+ years of demonstrated experience in building large scale, fault tolerant, distributed data platforms, stream processing pipelines, ETLs, etc</li> <li>Expert-level skills in designing, building, and operating stream processing pipelines with services like AWS Kinesis, Apache Kafka, or Redpanda</li> <li>Expert-level knowledge of building real-time customer facing analytics systems using services like AWS TimeStream or Clickhouse</li> <li>Proficiency in writing and maintaining Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using tools like Terraform, AWS CDK, or Pulumi</li> <li>Proficiency in version control practices and integrating IaC with CI/CD pipelines.</li> <li>Proficiency in implementing and managing GitOps workflows with tools such as ArgoCD, Github Actions, TeamCity, or similar</li> <li>Proficiency in one or more of Golang, Rust, Python, Java, or
