TypeScript</li> <li>Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience</li> <li>Experience with Kubernetes, or containers a plus</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Responsibilities</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Identify, design, and develop foundational data infrastructure components capable of handling millions or billions of events daily</li> <li>Analyze and improve the robustness and scalability of existing data processing infrastructure</li> <li>Partner with product teams to understand functional requirements and deliver solutions that meet business needs</li> <li>Write clear, well-tested, and maintainable infra-as-code and software for both new and existing systems</li> <li>Conduct design and code reviews, create developer documentation, and develop testing strategies for robustness and fault tolerance</li> <li>Participate in an on-call rotation to address critical incidents when necessary</li> </ul> <h3><strong>About Together AI</strong></h3> <p>Together AI is a research-driven artificial intelligence company. We believe open and transparent AI systems will drive innovation and create the best outcomes for society, and together we are on a mission to significantly lower the cost of modern AI systems by co-designing software, hardware, algorithms, and models. We have contributed to leading open-source research, models, and datasets to advance the frontier of AI, and our team has been behind technological advancement such as FlashAttention, Hyena, FlexGen, and RedPajama. We invite you to join a passionate group of researchers and engineers in our journey in building the next generation AI infrastructure.</p> <h3><strong>Compensation</strong></h3> <p>We offer competitive compensation, startup equity, health insurance and other competitive benefits. The US base salary range for this full-time position is: $160,000 - $240,000 + equity + benefits. Our salary ranges are determined by location, level and role. Individual compensation will be determined by experience, skills, and job-related knowledge.</p> <h3><strong>Equal Opportunity</strong></h3> <p>Together AI is an Equal Opportunity Employer and is proud to offer equal employment opportunity to everyone regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity, veteran status, and more.</p> <p>Please see our privacy policy at&nbsp;<a href="https://www.together.ai/privacy">https://www.together.ai/privacy</a>&nbsp;&nbsp;</p>

title: Engineering: Senior Customer Forward Deployed Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p>Amplitude is the leading AI analytics platform, helping over 4,700 customers—including Atlassian, Burger King, NBCUniversal, and Square—build better products and digital experiences. With powerful AI Agents embedded across our platform, teams can analyze, test, and optimize user experiences faster than ever. Ranked #1 across multiple categories in G2’s Winter 2026 Report, Amplitude is the best-in-class solution for product, data, and marketing teams. Learn more at <a href="http://amplitude.com">amplitude.com</a>.</p> <p>As an organization, we deliver for our customers by living our values. We operate from a place of humility, take ownership of problems and successes, approach challenges with a growth mindset, and put our customers at the center of everything we do.</p> <p><strong>Amplitude’s Commitment to Diversity Equity &amp; Inclusion (DEI): </strong>Amplitude believes that diversity enables the creation of better products, improves the ability to solve complex problems, and drives more powerful solutions. We strive to create an environment of inclusion—one focused on psychological safety, empathy, and human connection—that will allow employees of all backgrounds to thrive.</p></div><p><strong>About The Role &amp; Team</strong></p> <p>Amplitude is the leading AI analytics platform, and our ability to deliver measurable customer outcomes quickly is a key part of how we keep that lead. The Customer FDE (Forward Deployed Engineering) team sits at the intersection of engineering, product, and customer success — owning the technical delivery that takes validated products from co-development and implements them across enterprise customers.</p> <p>As a Customer Forward Deployed Engineer, you will own end-to-end technical delivery for enterprise customer implementations, from sales engagement through post-deployment validation. You'll work directly in Amplitude's product codebase, submitting PRs, shipping customer-specific solutions, and building reusable patterns that make every successive engagement faster. This is not a traditional support or solutions role. Customer FDEs are engineers first who partner closely with Sales, Customer Success, Product, and Engineering to turn customer needs into working software. The right person thrives in ambiguity, learns new domains quickly, and cares as much about the customer's outcome as about technical elegance.</p> <p><strong>As a Customer Forward Deployed Engineer, you will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Own enterprise implementations end-to-end — engage during sales to map customer needs to capabilities, scope implementation plans, and deliver through post-deployment validation with measurable customer outcomes</li> <li>Work directly in the product codebase — submit PRs, test, and ship customer-specific solutions without requiring constant oversight; over time, the gap between "what we built" and "what the customer needs" keeps shrinking because you're the one closing it</li> <li>Ship early, ship often, and gather feedback — treat every customer interaction as an opportunity to validate your approach and course-correct quickly</li> <li>Build reusable patterns and playbooks — when you solve something once, make sure the next person doesn't have to solve it again; identify and document implementation patterns that reduce effort for subsequent engagements</li> <li>Feed structured signals back to Product — translate customer pain into actionable product feedback that influences the roadmap; surface gaps so they get fixed rather than hiding them</li> <li>Establish an AI-native engineering workflow — AI tools are integral to how you write, test, debug, and deliver code, not an occasional supplement; this is a professional standard, not an optional enhancement</li> <li>Proactively identify the right engagements — dictate what you work on, identify accounts that need FDE engagement pre-Sales, and have the judgment to say "no" when the fit isn't right</li> <li>Build cross-functional trust — partner with Sales, Customer Success, and Product Engineering as a trusted technical voice in customer conversations and internal planning</li> <li>Instrument and measure your impact — track implementation cycle time, customer outcome achievement, pattern reuse rate, and product signal quality to ensure you're shipping changes that actually move the business</li> </ul> <p><strong>You'll be a great addition to the team if you:</strong></p> <ul> <li>5+ years of experience, including a track record of owning customer-facing technical engagements end-to-end</li> <li>Demonstrated ability to architect reusable solutions and mentor other engineers</li> <li>Comfortable operating autonomously across 4–6 concurrent customer engagements</li> <li>Have hands-on experience shipping software in customer-facing contexts — you've owned or significantly contributed to implementations, integrations, or technical engagements where you delivered working solutions directly to customers or stakeholders</li> <li>Are comfortable working in complex codebases you didn't build — you can read, write, and review production code confidently, navigate unfamiliar systems, and submit PRs with appropriate testing and review awareness</li> <li>Have fluency with data and integrations — you understand event schemas, data pipelines, APIs, SDKs, and integrations, the building blocks of analytics implementations</li> <li>Default to showing, not telling — you reach for prototypes, wireframes, demos, and visual artifacts to communicate technical solutions, not lengthy emails or slide decks</li> <li>Operate with high ownership and bias toward action — you don't wait for perfect requirements; you build something, show it, learn from the reaction, and iterate fast; you don't hand off problems, you hand off working solutions</li> <li>Communicate clearly with diverse audiences — you can move fluidly between a technical conversation about data pipelines and a business conversation about what metrics matter and why</li> <li>Are relentless about getting the customer to value — you take ownership of customer outcomes and drive implementations to completion, removing blockers and finding creative paths forward</li> <li>Are curious and fast-learning — you enjoy picking up new domains and applying that knowledge quickly; the fastest way to become a great engineer is to build things that real people depend on, in environments you don't control</li> <li>Have familiarity with TypeScript, React, Python, Node.js, and AWS</li> </ul> <table cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" data-sheets-root="1" data-sheets-baot="1"> <tbody> <tr> <td> <div>This role is eligible for equity, benefits and other forms of compensation.<br><br>Based on Colorado law, the following details are for individuals who will work for Amplitude in Colorado. Colorado range: $165,000 - $247,000 total target cash (inclusive of bonus or commission)<br><br>Based on legislation in New York City, the following details are for individuals who will work for Amplitude in New York City. New York City salary range: $183,000 - $276,000 total target cash (inclusive of bonus or commission)<br><br>Based on legislation in California, the following details are for individuals who will work for Amplitude in San Francisco Bay Area of California. Salary range: $183,000 - $276,000 total target cash (inclusive of bonus or commission)<br><br>Based on legislation in California, the following details are for individuals who will work for Amplitude in California outside of the San Francisco Bay Area. California salary range: $165,000 - $247,000 total target cash (inclusive of bonus or commission)<br><br>Based on legislation in Washington state, the following details are for individuals who will work for Amplitude in Washington state. Washington salary range: $165,000 - $247,000 total target cash (inclusive of bonus or commission)<br><br>Based on legislation in Washington state, the following details are for individuals who will work for Amplitude in Washington only: unlimited PTO, 10 to 13 holidays annually (will vary), medical dental and vision PPO and CDHP plans. Finally, a company sponsored 401(k) retirement plan.</div> </td> </tr> <tr></tr> <tr></tr> </tbody> </table><div class="content-conclusion"><p>By applying for this job, you acknowledge that Amplitude processes your personal data in accordance with the <a href="https://amplitude.com/job-applicant-privacy-notice">Amplitude Applicant Privacy Notice</a>.</p> <p><em data-stringify-type="italic">Staying Safe - Protect Yourself From Recruitment Fraud</em><br><em data-stringify-type="italic">We are aware of individuals and entities fraudulently representing themselves as Amplitude recruiters and/or hiring managers. Amplitude will never ask for financial information or payment, or for personal information such as bank account number or social security number during the job application or interview process. Any emails from the Amplitude recruiting team will come from an @</em><em data-stringify-type="italic"><a class="c-link" href="http://amplitude.com/" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="http://amplitude.com" data-sk="tooltip_parent">amplitude.com</a></em><em data-stringify-type="italic">&nbsp;email address. You can learn more about how to protect yourself from these types of fraud by referring to&nbsp;</em><em data-stringify-type="italic"><a class="c-link" href="https://consumer.ftc.gov/consumer-alerts/2023/05/scammers-are-hijacking-job-ads-heres-how-spot-fakes" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://consumer.ftc.gov/consumer-alerts/2023/05/scammers-are-hijacking-job-ads-heres-how-spot-fakes" data-sk="tooltip_parent">this article</a></em><em data-stringify-type="italic">. Please exercise caution and cease communications if something feels suspicious about your interactions.</em></p></div>

title: Data Engineer (AI/Data Platform)
full_description: <h2 data-section-id="1t7hx99" data-start="2134" data-end="2153">About CodeRoad</h2> <p data-start="2154" data-end="2457">CodeRoad provides end-to-end software development services, helping businesses scale with ideal infrastructure solutions. From staff augmentation to dedicated IT teams and general software engineering, our nearshore technology services empower businesses to thrive in an ever-evolving digital landscape.</p> <h2 data-section-id="1y3h6bp" data-start="2459" data-end="2478">About the Role</h2> <p data-start="2479" data-end="2703">As a Data Engineer, you’ll own the backbone of our AI systems: data pipelines, storage, and processing layers. work in production.</p> <h2 data-section-id="kw62d4" data-start="2770" data-end="2795">Key Responsibilities</h2> <ul data-start="2796" data-end="3238"> <li data-section-id="1w0r75g" data-start="2796" </ul> <h2 data-section-id="7ro8sp" data-start="3240" data-end="3257">Requirements</h2> <ul data-start="3258" data-end="3701"> <li data-section-id="y20kd1" data-start="3258" data-end="3304">3+ years of consuming REST APIs</li> <li data-section-id="1tw81o7" data-start="3515" data-end="3573">Familiarity with Docker and containerized environments</li> <li data-section-id="1a1ayn1" data-start="3574" (Blob Storage, Container Apps, Monitor)</li> <li data-section-id="map3c7" data-start="3818" data-end="3854">Exposure to AI/ML data pipelines</li> </ul> <h2><strong>What You’ll Love</strong></h2> <ul> <li>100% Remote</li> <li>Holidays off</li> <li>Paid Time Off</li> <li>Health insurance assistance program</li> <li>Competitive USD compensation</li> <li>Strong team culture and collaborative environment</li> <li>Ongoing training and growth opportunities</li> </ul>

title: Senior Data Engineer (AWS)
full_description: <p>&nbsp;</p> <h2 data-path-to-node="0">AWS Data Engineer</h2> <h3 data-path-to-node="1">Latin America | 100% Remote</h3> <h3 data-path-to-node="2">About CodeRoad</h3> <p id="p-rc_12d8c2f56c0a6cb8-22" data-path-to-node="3">CodeRoad provides end-to-end software development <span class="citation-216 citation-217 citation-end-217">services, helping businesses scale with ideal infrastructure solutions. From staff augmentation to dedicated IT teams and general software engineering, our nearshore technology services empower businesses to thrive in an ever-evolvin</span><span class="citation-216 citation-end-216">g digital landscape</span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h3 data-path-to-node="4"><span class="citation-215 citation-end-215">About the Role</span></h3> <p id="p-rc_12d8c2f56c0a6cb8-23" data-path-to-node="5"><span class="citation-214 citation-end-214">We are looking for</span> a Mid-to-Senior Data Engineer to architect, build, and operate cloud-native data pipelines on AWS. You will be responsible for ensuring technical excellence across our data infrastructure by writing production-grade Python, utilizing modern AI coding assistants like GitHub Copilot and Claude, and managing infrastructure as code via Terraform.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p data-path-to-node="6">This role is critical to shaping and defending our core data architecture, optimizing platform performance, and delivering curated, analytics-ready datasets for downstream BI and reporting. As a key contributor on a fully remote team, your autonomy, ownership mindset, and clear written communication will directly impact our ability to scale data solutions and maintain full historical accuracy using advanced dimensional modeling techniques.</p> <h3 data-path-to-node="7">Key Responsibilities</h3> <ul data-path-to-node="8"> <li> <p data-path-to-node="8,0,0"><strong data-path-to-node="8,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">Design</strong> and own the architectural evolution of data pipelines and platform components, leading design reviews and defending technical decisions with evidence-based reasoning.</p> </li> <li> <p data-path-to-node="8,1,0"><strong data-path-to-node="8,1,0" data-index-in-node="0">Build</strong> and maintain robust ingestion pipelines leveraging <strong data-path-to-node="8,1,0" data-index-in-node="57">AWS DMS</strong>, <strong data-path-to-node="8,1,0" data-index-in-node="66">Amazon AppFlow</strong>, and <strong data-path-to-node="8,1,0" data-index-in-node="86">Amazon EventBridge</strong> to land data seamlessly into <strong data-path-to-node="8,1,0" data-index-in-node="134">AWS S3</strong> and <strong data-path-to-node="8,1,0" data-index-in-node="145">Snowflake</strong>.</p> </li> <li> <p data-path-to-node="8,2,0"><strong data-path-to-node="8,2,0" data-index-in-node="0">Optimize</strong> and model analytics datasets within <strong data-path-to-node="8,2,0" data-index-in-node="45">dbt Cloud</strong>, applying strict dimensional modeling (Kimball techniques) and implementing SCD Type 2 logic.</p> </li> <li> <p data-path-to-node="8,3,0"><strong data-path-to-node="8,3,0" data-index-in-node="0">Lead</strong> performance tuning and cost optimization efforts across the <strong data-path-to-node="8,3,0" BI</strong>, while mentoring peers through rigorous code reviews and engineering enablement.</p> </li> </ul> <h3 data-path-to-node="9">Requirements</h3> <ul data-path-to-node="10"> <li> <p (including <strong data-path-to-node="10,1,0" data-index-in-node="47">AWS Lambda</strong>), advanced <strong data-path-to-node="10,1,0" data-index-in-node="69">SQL</strong>, <strong Glue, Athena, EventBridge, AppFlow, DMS</strong>).</p> </li> <li> <p data-path-to-node="10,3,0"><strong data-path-to-node="10,3,0" data-index-in-node="0">Data Modeling:</strong> Solid grasp of title: Software Engineer, Data Engineering
full_description: <p><strong>Location: </strong>United States (remote)</p> <p><strong>What is Verse?&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>Energy markets are more volatile than ever. Rapid electrification and the rise of AI are driving unprecedented demand for power, while energy costs continue to rise across the globe. For the world’s largest energy buyers, managing energy has never been more complex or more critical.</p> <p>Verse helps these organizations manage complex power portfolios with confidence by unifying energy data, planning, forecasting, and operations in one tool. Our Energy Cost Intelligence platform, Aria, brings together energy, finance, and operations teams with real-time, finance-ready intelligence—replacing spreadsheets and consultants with precision across the entire energy lifecycle. Built by an expert team of energy buyers, data scientists, and engineers, Verse enables faster, smarter energy decisions that reduce risk and lower energy costs.</p> <p><strong>The Role</strong></p> <p>You will be a member of the technical staff designing, building, and maintaining the next generation of data platform tools, pipelines, and orchestration frameworks to support multiple teams and products across a diverse range of data at Verse. This role supports Core Engineering needs within the organization and builds on top of existing engineering foundations focused on data. As a technical leader with advanced data engineering expertise, teammates will look to you to vet proposals, solutions to internal and customer-facing problems, system designs, and drive the implementation of these solutions with highest standards of software-engineering best practices. You will be an integral part of scaling our data platform as the company grows.</p> <p><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong></p> <ul> <li>Ensure data quality, contracts and integrity with best practices around access, governance, and federation throughout the data lifecycle</li> <li>Implement, maintain, and promote best practices and hygiene in our dataland code repository for others to follow and emulate</li> <li>Write shared libraries and reusable data tools across a variety of data flows, sources, and sinks</li> <li>Partnering closely with our Data Science and data-heavy internal teams to support various analytical and AI/ML workflows</li> <li>Foster a culture and mindset of well-designed systems, test-driven software, and proactive communication with a high degree of transparency, mutual respect, and consideration for teammates</li> <li>Participate in code reviews, maintain technical documentation, and adhere to best software development practices</li> </ul> <p><strong>What We're Looking For (Minimum Qualifications)</strong></p> <ul> <li>Advanced software development skills in Python, Rust, Java, Scala, or similar data-oriented language ecosystems</li> <li>Deep understanding of databases, data {lake,ware}house architectures, and data pipeline solutions across heterogeneous data and workloads in cloud-native environments</li> <li>Proficiency in carefully handling large, complex data and processing them (streaming and batch) in both transactional and analytical settings</li> <li>Commitment to delivering high quality software on time or ahead of schedule while adhering to best software development practices</li> <li>Continuous obsession for staying informed on contemporary technologies, tools, libraries, services, frameworks, or breakthroughs that could benefit the team</li> <li>Discipline using generative AI tools in day-to-day work</li> </ul> <p><strong>What Will Make You Standout (Preferred Qualifications)</strong></p> <ul> <li>Bachelor’s&nbsp; or master's degree in Computer Science, Data Science, or a related field</li> <li>Senior level software development talent and up</li> <li>Proven track record being a technical leader in high-performing data engineering teams</li> <li>Intimate knowledge of scaling “big data” solutions in cloud-based environments</li> <li>Hands on experience deploying and maintaining software such as Hadoop, Spark, Airflow, DBT, Dagster, Temporal, Presto/Trino, Iceberg, AlloyDB, Postgres, HBase, BigQuery, BigTable, Fabric, Hive, RedShift, S3, GCS, etc.</li> <li>Experience building event-driven architectures with streaming tools such as Kafka, NATS, GCP Pub/Sub, Kinesis, Bufstream, Flink, Beam</li> <li>Knowledge of managed or hosted data solutions such as Databricks, Snowflake, ClickHouse, Tinybird, etc</li> <li>Practical knowledge working with data in formats like Parquet, Avro, Protobuf, time series, text, image, video</li> <li>Working closely to support AI/ML-focused teams (knowledge of MLflow and Ray is a big a plus)</li> <li>Comfort building internal dashboards and data-focused visualizations</li> </ul> <p><strong>What Makes Verse a Great Place to Work?&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Lead with Empathy: </strong>We lift each other up with humility and kindness, always putting colleagues and customers first</li> <li><strong>Be Honest &amp; Transparent:&nbsp;</strong>We prioritize effective communication to build trust with our team, customers, and stakeholders</li> <li><strong>Move with Balance &amp; Precision:&nbsp;</strong>We believe speed and perseverance must be accompanied by thoughtfulness and reflection</li> <li><strong>Leave the World a Better Place:</strong> We are passionate about our mission, and we strive to create a sustainable world for future generations</li> </ul> <p><strong>Base Pay Range</strong></p> <p>$180,000 - $250,000+</p> <p><em data-stringify-type="italic">This is the estimated base salary range for this position, which does not include the value of benefits or a potential equity grant. A wide range of factors are considered in making compensation decisions, including but not limited to level, skill sets, market conditions, experience and training, licensure and certifications, and business and organizational needs.</em></p> <p><strong>Benefits and Employee Perks&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>Competitive compensation and equity grant at a high-growth start up&nbsp;</li> <li>Comprehensive benefits package including medical, dental and vision insurance, and 401k&nbsp;</li> <li>Flexible hours and unlimited PTO&nbsp;</li> <li>Diverse and inclusive working environment&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p>Verse is an equal opportunity employer. All applicants and employees are considered for hire, promotion, and compensation without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, sexual orientation, marital or familial status.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p>

title: Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Our Mission: Why Lighthouse?&nbsp;</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">At Lighthouse, we’re on a mission to revolutionize commercial strategy as hospitality’s most powerful AI platform. We take the world's largest hotel data network and transform it into real-time intelligence that drives action. We don't just deliver insights; we empower businesses to make decisions that move revenue.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">With $370M in Series C funding and over $100M in ARR, we are scaling at lightspeed. Our 850+ teammates across 35 countries aren't just building software—they are leveraging cutting-edge AI to help hoteliers be the first to act. Tens of thousands of hotels across 185 countries trust Lighthouse to execute their commercial strategy, including every one of the top 15 global chains and thousands of independent hotels that consistently outperform their markets. With Lighthouse AI, the intelligence gets deeper. Decisions get smarter. Actions get faster. We help hoteliers be first to act.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Lighthouse Values: Our guiding light</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">We are&nbsp;<strong><span style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);">Lumineers</span></strong>. Our shared values keep us on a collaborative path fostering a cultural and customer centric environment</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);"><strong>Pursuit of greatness</strong></span>: We’re innovators who care deeply about our customers’ success. Our team brings their best work, stays curious, and delivers excellence through attention to detail</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);"><strong>Meaningful work matters</strong></span>: We make every moment count by knowing what to deliver, why it matters, and how it drives Lighthouse forward</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);"><strong>Elevate each other</strong></span>: We don’t just work together - we grow together. What unites us is understanding each other as people and working toward shared goals</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">We’re more than just a workplace – we’re a community. Collaborative, fun, and deeply committed, we work hard together to revolutionize the hospitality sector. Are you ready to join us and shine brighter in the industry’s most exciting rocket-ship? 🚀</span></p></div><p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Job details<br></strong>● 💼 Engineering Team<br>● 📍 Belgium - Ghent<br>● 🕜 Full-Time/Hybrid</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">As a<strong> Data Engineer</strong> in our new Accommodation Facts team, you will play a key role in shaping the quality and business value of our hotel and short term rental property data in close collaboration with our data scientists.. You will be hands-on in designing, building, and maintaining the data pipelines that serve ML models and other parts of the business.&nbsp; You will act as a bridge between our data and the business, collaborating with stakeholders and ensuring our data effectively enables its consumers.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Where you will have impact</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Become the expert for our hotel and short term rental property data, understanding the full data lifecycle, quality, and business applications.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Design, implement, and maintain the streaming and batch data pipelines that power our products and internal analytics.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Collaborate directly with data consumers to understand their needs, gather requirements, and deliver data solutions.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Deliver improvements in data quality, latency, and reliability.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Show a product engineering mindset, focusing on delivering value and solving business problems through data.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">You will be at the forefront of our AI evolution, helping to embed intelligence into our platform. You’ll not only build AI features for our customers but also champion an AI-first development culture within the engineering team.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>About our team</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">The Accommodation Facts Team owns the single source of truth for hotel and short term rental property data at Lighthouse, sitting at the foundational layer of our data ecosystem.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Our core mission is to model and deliver high-quality, foundational data products that are essential ingredients for all downstream product features, machine learning models, and data science initiatives across the company:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Data Modeling &amp; Ownership: Defining and optimizing core hotel and short term rental data entities for product, analytics and commercial teams.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Pipeline Engineering: Building robust ETL/ELT pipelines to transform raw integrated data into trusted domains.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Data Quality: Establishing standards and monitoring the health of our foundational property data assets.&nbsp;</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">We are a core part of the Lighthouse platform. We take raw data from many sources , turn it into usable data products, and provide that clean output to serve Engineering and Commercial teams. We rely on internal platform teams for infrastructure support and tooling.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>What's in it for you?</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Flexible time off: Autonomy to manage your work-life balance.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Alan Flex benefits: 160€/month for food or nursery.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Flexible retribution: Optional benefits through tax-free payroll deductions for food, transportation and/or nursery.&nbsp;</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Wellbeing support: Subsidized ClassPass subscription.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Comprehensive health insurance: 100% Alan coverage for you, your spouse, and dependents.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Impactful work: Shape products relied on by 85,000+ users worldwide.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Referral bonuses: Earn rewards for bringing in new talent.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Who you are</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Experience in a data engineering role, with a proven track record of building scalable data pipelines.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">A product engineering mindset, with a focus on understanding business context and stakeholder needs.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Professional proficiency in Python for data processing and pipeline development.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Strong knowledge of cloud database solutions such as BigQuery, Snowflake, or Databricks.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Hands-on experience with dbt or a similar data transformation framework.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">You are a forward-thinking builder who views AI as a core component of modern architecture. You have a proven interest (or experience) in working with LLMs, agentic workflows, or AI-assisted coding tools to ship higher-quality code, faster.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>We welcome</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Experience with microservice architectures and data streaming systems like Kafka or Google Cloud Pub/Sub.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Familiarity with data governance or data quality tools such as Atlan or Soda.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Experience with entity resolution, fuzzy matching, or data deduplication.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Experience mentoring other engineers.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Technologies you will work with</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Mostly, but not limited to: GCP, Python, BigQuery, Kubernetes, Airflow, dbt, Terraform, Atlan (data governance tool), Soda.</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Diversity, equity, inclusion, and belonging</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Thank you for considering a career with Lighthouse. We are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace that values equal opportunity for all. We welcome candidates from all backgrounds, regardless of age, gender, race, religion, sexual orientation, and disability. Our commitment to equality is part of our culture. If you require reasonable accommodation at any point during the application or interview process, please notify your recruiter.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Not ticking every box? title: Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Our Mission: Why Lighthouse?&nbsp;</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">At Lighthouse, we’re on a mission to revolutionize commercial strategy as hospitality’s most powerful AI platform. We take the world's largest hotel data network and transform it into real-time intelligence that drives action. We don't just deliver insights; we empower businesses to make decisions that move revenue.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">With $370M in Series C funding and over $100M in ARR, we are scaling at lightspeed. Our 850+ teammates across 35 countries aren't just building software—they are leveraging cutting-edge AI to help hoteliers be the first to act. Tens of thousands of hotels across 185 countries trust Lighthouse to execute their commercial strategy, including every one of the top 15 global chains and thousands of independent hotels that consistently outperform their markets. With Lighthouse AI, the intelligence gets deeper. Decisions get smarter. Actions get faster. We help hoteliers be first to act.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Lighthouse Values: Our guiding light</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">We are&nbsp;<strong><span style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);">Lumineers</span></strong>. Our shared values keep us on a collaborative path fostering a cultural and customer centric environment</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);"><strong>Pursuit of greatness</strong></span>: We’re innovators who care deeply about our customers’ success. Our team brings their best work, stays curious, and delivers excellence through attention to detail</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);"><strong>Meaningful work matters</strong></span>: We make every moment count by knowing what to deliver, why it matters, and how it drives Lighthouse forward</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);"><strong>Elevate each other</strong></span>: We don’t just work together - we grow together. What unites us is understanding each other as people and working toward shared goals</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">We’re more than just a workplace – we’re a community. Collaborative, fun, and deeply committed, we work hard together to revolutionize the hospitality sector. Are you ready to join us and shine brighter in the industry’s most exciting rocket-ship? 🚀</span></p></div><p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Job details<br></strong>● 💼 Engineering Team<br>● 📍 Belgium - Ghent<br>● 🕜 Full-Time/Hybrid</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">As a<strong> Data Engineer</strong> in our new Accommodation Facts team, you will play a key role in shaping the quality and business value of our hotel and short term rental property data in close collaboration with our data scientists.. You will be hands-on in designing, building, and maintaining the data pipelines that serve ML models and other parts of the business.&nbsp; You will act as a bridge between our data and the business, collaborating with stakeholders and ensuring our data effectively enables its consumers.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Where you will have impact</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Become the expert for our hotel and short term rental property data, understanding the full data lifecycle, quality, and business applications.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Design, implement, and maintain the streaming and batch data pipelines that power our products and internal analytics.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Collaborate directly with data consumers to understand their needs, gather requirements, and deliver data solutions.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Deliver improvements in data quality, latency, and reliability.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Show a product engineering mindset, focusing on delivering value and solving business problems through data.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">You will be at the forefront of our AI evolution, helping to embed intelligence into our platform. You’ll not only build AI features for our customers but also champion an AI-first development culture within the engineering team.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>About our team</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">The Accommodation Facts Team owns the single source of truth for hotel and short term rental property data at Lighthouse, sitting at the foundational layer of our data ecosystem.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Our core mission is to model and deliver high-quality, foundational data products that are essential ingredients for all downstream product features, machine learning models, and data science initiatives across the company:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Data Modeling &amp; Ownership: Defining and optimizing core hotel and short term rental data entities for product, analytics and commercial teams.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Pipeline Engineering: Building robust ETL/ELT pipelines to transform raw integrated data into trusted domains.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Data Quality: Establishing standards and monitoring the health of our foundational property data assets.&nbsp;</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">We are a core part of the Lighthouse platform. We take raw data from many sources , turn it into usable data products, and provide that clean output to serve Engineering and Commercial teams. We rely on internal platform teams for infrastructure support and tooling.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>What's in it for you?</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Flexible time off: Autonomy to manage your work-life balance.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Career development: Workshops, frameworks, and trainings to maximize your professional potential.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Impactful work: Shape products relied on by 85,000+ users worldwide.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Mobility options: Mobility budget or company car (based on your job category).</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Net allowance: Support for home office related expenses.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Vouchers: Lunch vouchers &amp; Eco vouchers.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Comprehensive health insurance: Extensive coverage for you and your dependents.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Pension funding: Group insurance to secure your future.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Referral bonuses: Earn rewards for bringing in new talent.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Who you are</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Experience in a data engineering role, with a proven track record of building scalable data pipelines.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">A product engineering mindset, with a focus on understanding business context and stakeholder needs.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Professional proficiency in Python for data processing and pipeline development.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Strong knowledge of cloud database solutions such as BigQuery, Snowflake, or Databricks.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Hands-on experience with dbt or a similar data transformation framework.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">You are a forward-thinking builder who views AI as a core component of modern architecture. You have a proven interest (or experience) in working with LLMs, agentic workflows, or AI-assisted coding tools to ship higher-quality code, faster.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>We welcome</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Experience with microservice architectures and data streaming systems like Kafka or Google Cloud Pub/Sub.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Familiarity with data governance or data quality tools such as Atlan or Soda.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Experience with entity resolution, fuzzy matching, or data deduplication.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Experience mentoring other engineers.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Technologies you will work with</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Mostly, but not limited to: GCP, Python, BigQuery, Kubernetes, Airflow, dbt, Terraform, Atlan (data governance tool), Soda.</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Diversity, equity, inclusion, and belonging</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Thank you for considering a career with Lighthouse. No problem! We value diverse backgrounds and unique skill sets, and we encourage individuals from all walks of life to apply. If your experience looks a little different from what we've described, but you're passionate about what we do and are a quick learner, we'd love to hear from you!</span></p> <hr> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55); font-size: 10pt;"><a style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);" href="https://www.mylighthouse.com/company/careers" target="_blank"><strong>Learn more about our careers and recruitment process</strong></a>&nbsp;| <strong><a style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);" href="https://www.mylighthouse.com/company/about" target="_blank">Our company and leadership team</a></strong> | <strong><a style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);" href="https://www.mylighthouse.com/company/beware-of-recruitment-scams" target="_blank">Beware of recruitment scams</a></strong></span></p></div>

title: Senior Analytics Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Our Mission: Why Lighthouse?&nbsp;</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">At Lighthouse, we’re on a mission to revolutionize commercial strategy as hospitality’s most powerful AI platform. We take the world's largest hotel data network and transform it into real-time intelligence that drives action. We don't just deliver insights; we empower businesses to make decisions that move revenue.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">With $370M in Series C funding and over $100M in ARR, we are scaling at lightspeed. Our 850+ teammates across 35 countries aren't just building software—they are leveraging cutting-edge AI to help hoteliers be the first to act. Tens of thousands of hotels across 185 countries trust Lighthouse to execute their commercial strategy, including every one of the top 15 global chains and thousands of independent hotels that consistently outperform their markets. With Lighthouse AI, the intelligence gets deeper. Decisions get smarter. Actions get faster. We help hoteliers be first to act.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Lighthouse Values: Our guiding light</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">We are&nbsp;<strong><span style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);">Lumineers</span></strong>. Our shared values keep us on a collaborative path fostering a cultural and customer centric environment</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);"><strong>Pursuit of greatness</strong></span>: We’re innovators who care deeply about our customers’ success. Our team brings their best work, stays curious, and delivers excellence through attention to detail</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);"><strong>Meaningful work matters</strong></span>: We make every moment count by knowing what to deliver, why it matters, and how it drives Lighthouse forward</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);"><strong>Elevate each other</strong></span>: We don’t just work together - we grow together. What unites us is understanding each other as people and working toward shared goals</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">We’re more than just a workplace – we’re a community. Collaborative, fun, and deeply committed, we work hard together to revolutionize the hospitality sector. Are you ready to join us and shine brighter in the industry’s most exciting rocket-ship? 🚀</span></p></div><p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Job Details</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">💼 Engineering</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">📍 Belgium - Ghent</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">🕜 Full-Time/Hybrid</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>What you will do</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">We’re looking for a <strong>Senior Analytics Engineer</strong> to help us build reliable, scalable data products for enterprise customers and internal teams. This is a hands-on role with a strong focus on SQL, dbt, data modeling, data-product development, and practical AI integration—not traditional dashboarding alone.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">You’ll own work from a stakeholder question through analysis, modeling, quality assurance, and delivery. You’ll also help strengthen how the team works with dbt and contribute to our shift toward scalable data delivery. You will take on direct customer-facing responsibilities, with support from the team as you build that experience.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Where you will have impact</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;" value="1"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Design, build, and improve reliable production data models and products using SQL, dbt, Python, and BigQuery.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;" value="2"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Turn business and customer questions into scalable solutions, owning delivery from scoping and analysis through modeling, testing, documentation, QA, and actionable insights.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;" value="3"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Diagnose and improve data quality, query performance, and cost across large, complex datasets.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;" value="4"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Partner with Product, Data Science, Engineering, Commercial, and Account Management to define requirements, explain trade-offs, and manage expectations on feasibility and timelines.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;" value="6"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Use AI to accelerate development, analysis, scoping, and documentation, and help explore AI-powered capabilities such as automated quality checks and agentic customer or sales tooling.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;" value="7"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Share your dbt expertise, strengthen team development practices, contribute to enterprise and internal initiatives, and eventually join the evolving on-call rotation for enterprise data products.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>About our team</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Lighthouse is not only a data-driven company, we are a data company. The heart of all our products is data. It enables hotels to make the right decisions and fuel our analytical solutions. Being a growth company enables us to regularly attract new and interesting datasets, which can unlock new product directions. Today we process billions of data points and +100TB of data on a daily basis, containing hotels' pricing information, search data, hotel bookings, etc. All of that using modern technologies.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">The data solutions team is part of our Enterprise vertical within engineering:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Teams, originally from different companies and acquisition being brought together and integrated into 2 product areas: Data solutions and Distribution.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">It’s focused on data we have, leveraging it in a different way, and using the vastness of datapoints Lighthouse can offer, to support our Enterprise customer in the best way possible.&nbsp;</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">It’s ‘a few’ customers being served by a product roadmap. We build and we iterate.&nbsp;</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>What's in it for you?</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Flexible time off: Autonomy to manage your work-life balance.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Career development: Workshops, frameworks, and trainings to maximize your professional potential.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Impactful work: Shape products relied on by 85,000+ users worldwide.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Mobility options: Mobility budget or company car (based on your job category).</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Net allowance: Support for home office related expenses.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Vouchers: Lunch vouchers &amp; Eco vouchers.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Comprehensive health insurance: Extensive coverage for you and your dependents.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Pension funding: Group insurance to secure your future.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Referral bonuses: Earn rewards for bringing in new talent.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Who you are</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;" value="1"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Expert-level SQL and hands-on, production-level dbt experience, including incremental models, testing, configuration, and performance tuning.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;" value="2"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">A track record of owning reliable data models or products in production, with strong data-modeling skills and experience working with large, complex datasets.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;" value="3"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Strong data-warehouse fluency with BigQuery or an equivalent platform, including the ability to diagnose query cost and performance issues.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;" value="4"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Experience using Python for data analysis or data-product development, alongside a practical approach to testing, documentation, data quality, governance, and correctness.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;" value="5"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Strong stakeholder-management skills and the judgment to explain technical decisions, manage trade-offs, and move ambiguous work forward.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;" value="6"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">A direct, pragmatic, and collaborative working style, with concrete examples of using AI to improve how you work independently and with a distributed team.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Excellent communication skills in both written and spoken English.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>We welcome</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;" value="2"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Experience with client-facing products, external customers, or complex internal stakeholders in a SaaS or consultancy environment.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;" value="3"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Familiarity with tools and practices such as BigQuery, Airflow, Looker or other visualization platforms, cloud analytics platforms, and Agile ways of working.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;" value="4"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Experience using AI in recurring workflows, agent-based processes, or customer-facing data products.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;" value="5"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Knowledge of travel, hospitality, or short-term-rental data, or experience mentoring colleagues and improving analytics-engineering practices.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Technologies you will work with</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">SQL (Google’s BigQuery), python, GCP, Looker / Tableau, terraform, airflow, Claude.</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Diversity, equity, inclusion, and belonging</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Thank you for considering a career with Lighthouse. We are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace that values equal opportunity for all. We welcome candidates from all backgrounds, regardless of age, gender, race, religion, sexual orientation, and disability. Our commitment to equality is part of our culture. If you require reasonable accommodation at any point during the application or interview process, please notify your recruiter.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Not ticking every box? No problem! We value diverse backgrounds and unique skill sets, and we encourage individuals from all walks of life to apply. If your experience looks a little different from what we've described, but you're passionate about what we do and are a quick learner, we'd love to hear from you!</span></p> <hr> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55); font-size: 10pt;"><a style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);" href="https://www.mylighthouse.com/company/careers" target="_blank"><strong>Learn more about our careers and recruitment process</strong></a>&nbsp;| <strong><a style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);" href="https://www.mylighthouse.com/company/about" target="_blank">Our company and leadership team</a></strong> | <strong><a style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);" href="https://www.mylighthouse.com/company/beware-of-recruitment-scams" target="_blank">Beware of recruitment scams</a></strong></span></p></div>
