font-size: 12pt;" value="5"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Strong stakeholder-management skills and the judgment to explain technical decisions, manage trade-offs, and move ambiguous work forward.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;" value="6"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">A direct, pragmatic, and collaborative working style, with concrete examples of using AI to improve how you work independently and with a distributed team.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Excellent communication skills in both written and spoken English.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>We welcome</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;" value="2"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Experience with client-facing products, external customers, or complex internal stakeholders in a SaaS or consultancy environment.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;" value="3"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Familiarity with tools and practices such as BigQuery, Airflow, Looker or other visualization platforms, cloud analytics platforms, and Agile ways of working.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;" value="4"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Experience using AI in recurring workflows, agent-based processes, or customer-facing data products.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;" value="5"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Knowledge of travel, hospitality, or short-term-rental data, or experience mentoring colleagues and improving analytics-engineering practices.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Technologies you will work with</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">SQL (Google’s BigQuery), python, GCP, Looker / Tableau, terraform, airflow, Claude.</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Diversity, equity, inclusion, and belonging</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Thank you for considering a career with Lighthouse. We are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace that values equal opportunity for all. We welcome candidates from all backgrounds, regardless of age, gender, race, religion, sexual orientation, and disability. Our commitment to equality is part of our culture. If you require reasonable accommodation at any point during the application or interview process, please notify your recruiter.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Not ticking every box? No problem! We value diverse backgrounds and unique skill sets, and we encourage individuals from all walks of life to apply. If your experience looks a little different from what we've described, but you're passionate about what we do and are a quick learner, we'd love to hear from you!</span></p> <hr> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55); font-size: 10pt;"><a style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);" href="https://www.mylighthouse.com/company/careers" target="_blank"><strong>Learn more about our careers and recruitment process</strong></a>&nbsp;| <strong><a style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);" href="https://www.mylighthouse.com/company/about" target="_blank">Our company and leadership team</a></strong> | <strong><a style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);" href="https://www.mylighthouse.com/company/beware-of-recruitment-scams" target="_blank">Beware of recruitment scams</a></strong></span></p></div>

title: Senior Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Our Mission: Why Lighthouse?&nbsp;</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">At Lighthouse, we’re on a mission to revolutionize commercial strategy as hospitality’s most powerful AI platform. We take the world's largest hotel data network and transform it into real-time intelligence that drives action. We don't just deliver insights; we empower businesses to make decisions that move revenue.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">With $370M in Series C funding and over $100M in ARR, we are scaling at lightspeed. Our 850+ teammates across 35 countries aren't just building software—they are leveraging cutting-edge AI to help hoteliers be the first to act. Tens of thousands of hotels across 185 countries trust Lighthouse to execute their commercial strategy, including every one of the top 15 global chains and thousands of independent hotels that consistently outperform their markets. With Lighthouse AI, the intelligence gets deeper. Decisions get smarter. Actions get faster. We help hoteliers be first to act.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Lighthouse Values: Our guiding light</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">We are&nbsp;<strong><span style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);">Lumineers</span></strong>. Our shared values keep us on a collaborative path fostering a cultural and customer centric environment</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);"><strong>Pursuit of greatness</strong></span>: We’re innovators who care deeply about our customers’ success. Our team brings their best work, stays curious, and delivers excellence through attention to detail</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);"><strong>Meaningful work matters</strong></span>: We make every moment count by knowing what to deliver, why it matters, and how it drives Lighthouse forward</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);"><strong>Elevate each other</strong></span>: We don’t just work together - we grow together. What unites us is understanding each other as people and working toward shared goals</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">We’re more than just a workplace – we’re a community. Collaborative, fun, and deeply committed, we work hard together to revolutionize the hospitality sector. Are you ready to join us and shine brighter in the industry’s most exciting rocket-ship? 🚀</span></p></div><p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Job details<br></strong>● 💼 Engineering Team<br>● 📍 Belgium - Ghent<br>● 🕜 Full-Time/Hybrid</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">As a<strong> Senior Data Engineer</strong> in our new Accommodation Facts team, you will play a key role in shaping the quality and business value of our hotel and short term rental property data in close collaboration with our data scientists.. You will be hands-on in designing, building, and maintaining the data pipelines that serve ML models and other parts of the business.&nbsp; You will act as a bridge between our data and the business, collaborating with stakeholders and ensuring our data effectively enables its consumers.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Where you will have impact</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Become the expert for our hotel and short term rental property data, understanding the full data lifecycle, quality, and business applications.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Design, implement, and maintain the streaming and batch data pipelines that power our products and internal analytics.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Collaborate directly with data consumers to understand their needs, gather requirements, and deliver data solutions.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Deliver improvements in data quality, latency, and reliability.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Show a product engineering mindset, focusing on delivering value and solving business problems through data.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">You will be at the forefront of our AI evolution, helping to embed intelligence into our platform. You’ll not only build AI features for our customers but also champion an AI-first development culture within the engineering team.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>About our team</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">The Accommodation Facts Team owns the single source of truth for hotel and short term rental property data at Lighthouse, sitting at the foundational layer of our data ecosystem.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Our core mission is to model and deliver high-quality, foundational data products that are essential ingredients for all downstream product features, machine learning models, and data science initiatives across the company:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Data Modeling &amp; Ownership: Defining and optimizing core hotel and short term rental data entities for product, analytics and commercial teams.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Pipeline Engineering: Building robust ETL/ELT pipelines to transform raw integrated data into trusted domains.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Data Quality: Establishing standards and monitoring the health of our foundational property data assets.&nbsp;</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">We are a core part of the Lighthouse platform. We take raw data from many sources , turn it into usable data products, and provide that clean output to serve Engineering and Commercial teams. We rely on internal platform teams for infrastructure support and tooling.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>What's in it for you?</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Flexible time off: Autonomy to manage your work-life balance.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Alan Flex benefits: 160€/month for food or nursery.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Flexible retribution: Optional benefits through tax-free payroll deductions for food, transportation and/or nursery.&nbsp;</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Wellbeing support: Subsidized ClassPass subscription.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Comprehensive health insurance: 100% Alan coverage for you, your spouse, and dependents.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Impactful work: Shape products relied on by 85,000+ users worldwide.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Referral bonuses: Earn rewards for bringing in new talent.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Who you are</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Experience in a data engineering role, with a proven track record of building scalable data pipelines.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">A product engineering mindset, with a focus on understanding business context and stakeholder needs.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Professional proficiency in Python for data processing and pipeline development.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Strong knowledge of cloud database solutions such as BigQuery, Snowflake, or Databricks.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Hands-on experience with dbt or a similar data transformation framework.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">You are a forward-thinking builder who views AI as a core component of modern architecture. You have a proven interest (or experience) in working with LLMs, agentic workflows, or AI-assisted coding tools to ship higher-quality code, faster.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>We welcome</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Experience with microservice architectures and data streaming systems like Kafka or Google Cloud Pub/Sub.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Familiarity with data governance or data quality tools such as Atlan or Soda.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Experience with entity resolution, fuzzy matching, or data deduplication.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Experience mentoring other engineers.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Technologies you will work with</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Mostly, but not limited to: GCP, Python, BigQuery, Kubernetes, Airflow, dbt, Terraform, Atlan (data governance tool), Soda.</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Diversity, equity, inclusion, and belonging</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Thank you for considering a career with Lighthouse. We are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace that values equal opportunity for all. We welcome candidates from all backgrounds, regardless of age, gender, race, religion, sexual orientation, and disability. Our commitment to equality is part of our culture. If you require reasonable accommodation at any point during the application or interview process, please notify your recruiter.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Not ticking every box? No problem! We value diverse backgrounds and unique skill sets, and we encourage individuals from all walks of life to apply. If your experience looks a little different from what we've described, but you're passionate about what we do and are a quick learner, we'd love to hear from you!</span></p> <hr> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55); font-size: 10pt;"><a style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);" href="https://www.mylighthouse.com/company/careers" target="_blank"><strong>Learn more about our careers and recruitment process</strong></a>&nbsp;| <strong><a style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);" href="https://www.mylighthouse.com/company/about" target="_blank">Our company and leadership team</a></strong> | <strong><a style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);" href="https://www.mylighthouse.com/company/beware-of-recruitment-scams" target="_blank">Beware of recruitment scams</a></strong></span></p></div>

font-size: 12pt;">A product engineering mindset, with a focus on understanding business context and stakeholder needs.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Professional proficiency in Python for data processing and pipeline development.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Strong knowledge of cloud database solutions such as BigQuery, Snowflake, or Databricks.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Hands-on experience with dbt or a similar data transformation framework.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">You are a forward-thinking builder who views AI as a core component of modern architecture. You have a proven interest (or experience) in working with LLMs, agentic workflows, or AI-assisted coding tools to ship higher-quality code, faster.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>We welcome</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Experience with microservice architectures and data streaming systems like Kafka or Google Cloud Pub/Sub.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Familiarity with data governance or data quality tools such as Atlan or Soda.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Experience with entity resolution, fuzzy matching, or data deduplication.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Experience mentoring other engineers.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Technologies you will work with</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Mostly, but not limited to: GCP, Python, BigQuery, Kubernetes, Airflow, dbt, Terraform, Atlan (data governance tool), Soda.</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Diversity, equity, inclusion, and belonging</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Thank you for considering a career with Lighthouse. We are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace that values equal opportunity for all. We welcome candidates from all backgrounds, regardless of age, gender, race, religion, sexual orientation, and disability. Our commitment to equality is part of our culture. If you require reasonable accommodation at any point during the application or interview process, please notify your recruiter.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Not ticking every box? No problem! We value diverse backgrounds and unique skill sets, and we encourage individuals from all walks of life to apply. If your experience looks a little different from what we've described, but you're passionate about what we do and are a quick learner, we'd love to hear from you!</span></p> <hr> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55); font-size: 10pt;"><a style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);" href="https://www.mylighthouse.com/company/careers" target="_blank"><strong>Learn more about our careers and recruitment process</strong></a>&nbsp;| <strong><a style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);" href="https://www.mylighthouse.com/company/about" target="_blank">Our company and leadership team</a></strong> | <strong><a style="color: rgb(253, 130, 55);" href="https://www.mylighthouse.com/company/beware-of-recruitment-scams" target="_blank">Beware of recruitment scams</a></strong></span></p></div>

title: Senior Data Engineer
full_description: <p><strong>Description Summary:&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>M3 (<a href="https://nam10.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.m3as.com%2F&amp;data=05%7C02%7Cjeff.holmes%40vaco.com%7Cf80b5e70b0d742fa0a9b08de55efb6bf%7C120aeae9286f438abbf3de3ab96fcf5d%7C1%7C0%7C639042685216069101%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&amp;sdata=5APTJY6jQwLSEv2bXcjNSYuawWby6bKKN%2FJUzyIvBNQ%3D&amp;reserved=0">www.m3as.com</a>) is a leading provider of hospitality-specific software solutions, delivering cloud-based tools for hotel accounting, financial reporting, labor management, payroll, and business intelligence. title: Data Engineer
full_description: <p><strong>About Interval</strong></p> <p class="p1">Interval helps enterprises turn messy, underused data into governed, high-confidence&nbsp;intelligence—without handing control to a black box. We bring compute to your data with a private&nbsp;data lakehouse, verifiable audit trails, and <strong>U-AI</strong>, our contextual AI framework for secure AI&nbsp;workflows.</p> <p class="p1"><strong>Our platform is built around three outcomes:</strong><br>- Control: Keep ownership of your data and how models use it.<br>- Verify: Audit what happened, why it happened, and where results came from.<br>- Monetize: Create new revenue opportunities through private, permissioned data exchange.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Role Overview</strong><br>We are seeking a highly skilled Data Engineer to join our team and revolutionize how enterprises secure, analyze, and monetize their data—on their terms. As a Data Engineer at Interval, you’ll work on building and optimizing secure, scalable data pipelines and infrastructure that ensure privacy, compliance, and enable AI-powered business transformation.</p> <p><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong><br>- Design, develop, and maintain scalable data pipelines for ingestion, transformation, and delivery of large datasets across diverse industries.<br>- Implement and ensure data privacy and security best practices, supporting data sovereignty and compliance with regulatory requirements.<br>- Collaborate closely with AI/ML engineers, Data Scientists, and Platform engineers to enable advanced analytics and AI capabilities while retaining strict data control.<br>- Optimize data platforms and systems for performance, reliability, and cost efficiency.<br>- Build tools and frameworks for secure, privacy-preserving data processing and orchestration.<br>- Develop and maintain documentation, data models, and technical workflows.<br>- Partner with cross-functional teams to launch new data-driven product features and solutions.</p> <p><strong>Qualifications</strong><br>- Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field.<br>- Proven experience in designing and building ETL pipelines and data infrastructure (cloud, hybrid, and/or on-premise).<br>- Strong proficiency with Python, SQL, and modern data engineering toolsets (e.g., Apache Spark, Kafka).<br>- Solid understanding of data security, privacy frameworks, and regulatory compliance such as GDPR, CCPA, or equivalent.<br>- Experience with privacy-first, AI-native, or data sovereignty-focused platforms is a plus.<br>- Familiarity with industry-specific data challenges (CPG, financial services, energy, supply chain, etc.) is advantageous.<br>- Excellent analytical and communication skills; proactive and detail-oriented.</p> <p><strong>Why Interval?</strong><br>- Shape the frontier of AI, blockchain, and enterprise data infrastructure.&nbsp;<br>- Enjoy meaningful ownership, flexible work, and the autonomy where data, AI, and privacy meet<br>- Thrive in a sharp, mission-driven team backed by top-tier technical leadership and investors</p>

title: Data Engineer III - FMX
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><h2 class="job-details__description-header text-color-secondary font-family-secondary" data-bind="i18n: 'job-details.employer-description-title'">About Us</h2> <div class="job-details__description-content basic-formatter" data-bind="html: pageData().job.corporateDescription"> <div>Fanatics is building a leading global digital sports platform. We ignite the passions of global sports fans and maximize the presence and reach for our hundreds of sports partners globally by offering products and services across Fanatics Commerce, Fanatics Collectibles, and Fanatics Betting &amp; Gaming, allowing sports fans to Buy, Collect, and Bet. Through the Fanatics platform, sports fans can buy licensed fan gear, jerseys, lifestyle and streetwear products, headwear, and hardgoods; collect physical and digital trading cards, sports memorabilia, and other digital assets; and bet as the company builds its Sportsbook and iGaming platform. Fanatics has an established database of over 100 million global sports fans; a global partner network with approximately 900 sports properties, including major national and international professional sports leagues, players associations, teams, colleges, college conferences and retail partners, 2,500 athletes and celebrities, and 200 exclusive athletes; and over 2,000 retail locations, including its Lids retail stores. Our more than 22,000 employees are committed to relentlessly enhancing the fan experience and delighting sports fans globally.&nbsp;</div> </div> <p>&nbsp;</p></div><div id="message-list_1784585771.303139"> <div> <div> <div> <div> <div> <div> <div> <div> <div> <div> <div><strong><u>Data Engineer III</u></strong><br><br><strong>About the Role</strong><br>We're looking for a Data Engineer III to join our Data Engineering team, which builds and governs the data foundation that powers the business. You'll work within our stack — Python ingestion pipelines, Airflow orchestration, and Snowflake/Databricks — helping move data reliably and securely from source to decision-ready output.<br>You'll implement features and fixes against a given design, handle known classes of pipeline issues on your own, and escalate genuinely novel problems with clear context rather than working them in isolation. You're also expected to start contributing meaningfully in code review — catching real bugs, not just style nits.<br><br><strong>What You'll Do</strong></div> <ul> <li>Implement new ingestion sources end-to-end against a senior engineer's design — connector code, DAG, schema, monitoring, and catalog registration — extending the team's existing framework where a new source needs a pattern it doesn't yet support</li> <li>Investigate pipeline failures independently, recognize known classes of issues, and ship the documented fix without needing to escalate</li> <li>Before shipping a new pipeline, identify downstream consumers and what would break if data were late or wrong, and flag gaps like this during spec review — before writing code</li> <li>Write clear handovers when escalating a genuinely unresolved issue — what you tried, what you ruled out, and where things diverge — so a senior can pick up without re-discovery</li> <li>Review peers' pipeline PRs and catch non-obvious issues (e.g., missing idempotency checks, race conditions) that could cause incorrect downstream data</li> <li>Turn ambiguous "why is this data wrong?" questions into structured investigations — tracing data lineage from source to warehouse and communicating back what you found</li> <li>Surface concerns in spec review as specific, well-reasoned questions rather than staying silent or blocking progress</li> <li>Support data security and governance work (e.g., PII masking, access controls) and contribute to data delivery work, including reverse ETL integrations</li> <li>Build strong working relationships with internal stakeholders and help scope and clarify requirements for new work</li> <li>Mentor DE2s on their first significant projects — pairing on tricky decisions and helping them apply team conventions</li> </ul> <div><br><br><strong>What We're Looking For</strong></div> <ul> <li>3–5 years of professional software or data engineering experience</li> <li>Strong SQL and Python skills, with solid experience building and operating production data pipelines</li> <li>Comfort investigating and root-causing pipeline issues independently before escalating</li> <li>Experience with workflow orchestration tools (Airflow or similar) and a cloud data warehouse/lakehouse (Snowflake, Databricks, or similar)</li> <li>Solid understanding of data pipeline concepts: idempotency, schema evolution, backfills, and data quality/testing</li> <li>Experience giving substantive code review feedback, not just style or formatting comments</li> <li>Strong communication skills — can write a clear technical handover, ask sharp questions in spec review, and explain a data lineage investigation to a non-technical stakeholder</li> <li>A track record of taking ownership of known-class problems end-to-end rather than needing step-by-step direction</li> </ul> <div><br><strong>Nice to Have</strong></div> <ul> <li>Experience extending or building reusable pipeline frameworks/templates</li> <li>Exposure to reverse ETL tools or patterns, PII masking, or data access governance (RBAC)</li> <li>Exposure to observability/monitoring tooling (e.g., Datadog) for pipeline health and alerting</li> <li>Some experience mentoring or informally supporting more junior engineers</li> <li>Background in gaming, betting, e-commerce, or another regulated/high-compliance industry</li> </ul> <div><br><strong>Why Join Us</strong></div> <ul> <li>Real ownership over known-class problems, with senior/staff support available for the genuinely novel ones</li> <li>Work on high-visibility, high-trust systems that the business depends on</li> <li>A culture built around clear tenets: standardize before you scale, own the outcome (not just the ticket), and clarity over complexity</li> <li>Clear growth path into Senior Data Engineer, with room to start mentoring and shaping team practices along the way</li> </ul> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div><div class="content-conclusion"><p>By submitting your application, you agree to our terms of service and acknowledge you have read our&nbsp;<a href="https://static1.squarespace.com/static/5ff494b9931735466ce28d5b/t/69de53bde2c02c25e9c38758/1776178110037/Candidate+Privacy+Policy+April+2026.pdf" target="_blank">Candidate Privacy Policy.</a></p></div>

title: Data Engineer II - (Remote)
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><h2 class="job-details__description-header text-color-secondary font-family-secondary" data-bind="i18n: 'job-details.employer-description-title'">About Us</h2> <div class="job-details__description-content basic-formatter" data-bind="html: pageData().job.corporateDescription"> <div>Fanatics is building a leading global digital sports platform. We ignite the passions of global sports fans and maximize the presence and reach for our hundreds of sports partners globally by offering products and services across Fanatics Commerce, Fanatics Collectibles, and Fanatics Betting &amp; Gaming, allowing sports fans to Buy, Collect, and Bet. Through the Fanatics platform, sports fans can buy licensed fan gear, jerseys, lifestyle and streetwear products, headwear, and hardgoods; collect physical and digital trading cards, sports memorabilia, and other digital assets; and bet as the company builds its Sportsbook and iGaming platform. Fanatics has an established database of over 100 million global sports fans; a global partner network with approximately 900 sports properties, including major national and international professional sports leagues, players associations, teams, colleges, college conferences and retail partners, 2,500 athletes and celebrities, and 200 exclusive athletes; and over 2,000 retail locations, including its Lids retail stores. Our more than 22,000 employees are committed to relentlessly enhancing the fan experience and delighting sports fans globally.&nbsp;</div> </div> <p>&nbsp;</p></div><h2 data-bind="i18n: 'job-details.organization-description-title'">About the Team</h2> <p>We're looking for a Data Engineer II to join our Data Engineering team, which builds and governs the data foundation that powers the business. You'll work within our stack — Python ingestion pipelines, Airflow orchestration, and Snowflake/Databricks — helping move data reliably and securely from source to decision-ready output.</p> <p><strong>This is an entry-level role.</strong> You'll execute well-defined tasks under the direction of senior data engineers, learn our team's stack and conventions, and build a strong foundation in pipeline correctness. You're not expected to own designs independently yet — you're expected to build reliable software against a design, ask good questions, and grow quickly from feedback.</p> <h3>Responsibilities</h3> <ul> <li>Implement ingestion pipelines and Airflow DAGs from a senior engineer's design, using the team's scaffolding and conventions — including writing the code, unit tests, and documentation</li> <li>Support data security and governance work, such as PII masking and access controls, following established patterns</li> <li>Contribute to data delivery work, including reverse ETL integrations, under guidance from senior engineers</li> <li>Add and extend fields in existing pipelines, incorporating review feedback and applying learned patterns on future work</li> <li>Take oncall pages for pipeline failures, work through runbooks, and escalate with clear context when needed</li> <li>Pair with senior engineers on data integrity issues you can't yet diagnose alone</li> <li>Write clear, reviewer-friendly PR descriptions and ask clarifying questions before starting new work</li> <li>Flag blockers early and with context rather than going quiet when stuck</li> <li>Build strong working relationships with internal stakeholders (BI analysts, other data engineers, data scientists) and help gather and clarify requirements</li> <li>Conduct and participate in code and system inspections</li> <li>Help the team define and adhere to data engineering best practices</li> <li>Mentor more junior data engineers as you grow into the role</li> </ul> <h3>Experience and Skills</h3> <ul> <li>1–3 years of professional software or data engineering experience</li> <li>A self-learner with a strong ability to gather, evaluate, and analyze requirements</li> <li>Solid foundation in Python and deep understanding of SQL and ETL/ELT for complex data transformations</li> <li>Comfort reading and writing unit tests, and working within an established codebase and conventions</li> <li>Familiarity with (or eagerness to quickly learn) workflow orchestration tools like Airflow (Managed Workflows for Apache Airflow)</li> <li>Basic understanding of data pipeline concepts: ingestion, idempotency, scheduling, and data quality</li> <li>Knowledge of several of the following technologies: Snowflake, Databricks, AWS, dbt, Tableau, MongoDB, PostgreSQL</li> <li>Familiarity with Git-based version control and PR-based code review workflows</li> <li>Strong communication skills — asks clarifying questions, writes clear PR descriptions, and escalates blockers with useful context rather than staying stuck silently</li> <li>A growth mindset: takes review feedback well, improves processes, and champions best practices to avoid technical debt</li> </ul> <h3>Preferred But Not Required</h3> <ul> <li>Exposure to cloud data warehouses/lakehouses (Snowflake, Databricks, AWS) and data catalog/lineage tooling</li> <li>Familiarity with dbt, Tableau, MongoDB, or PostgreSQL</li> <li>Familiarity with reverse ETL tools or patterns (e.g., Segment, LaunchDarkly, Kafka, S3-based delivery)</li> <li>Exposure to PII masking, data security, or RBAC/access governance concepts</li> <li>Exposure to observability/monitoring tooling (e.g., Datadog) for pipeline health and alerting</li> <li>Background in gaming, betting, e-commerce, or another regulated/high-compliance industry</li> <li>Familiarity with responsible handling of customer/PII-sensitive data</li> </ul> <h3>Why Join Us</h3> <ul> <li>Join a team that's literally described as "the foundation" — everything at FBG, FES, and FMX runs on the data we ingest, govern, and deliver</li> <li>Learn from senior and staff data engineers on a well-invested, modern data platform, with a clear growth path from DE2 into independent ownership</li> <li>Work on high-visibility, high-trust systems: regulatory and financial reporting, PII security, and data governance that the business depends on</li> <li>A culture built around clear tenets: standardize before you scale, own the outcome (not just the ticket), and clarity over complexity</li> <li>Collaborative culture with strong engineering practices, code review, and mentorship</li> </ul> <p>Depending on the role, your interview and onboarding experience may include in-person components, such as onsite interviews or Launching into Better: LIVE—a multi-day cultural immersion in New York City for full-time, non-seasonal hires. These sessions are designed to build connection and bring our culture to life, though specific travel and participation requirements will be confirmed based on your role and location. Your recruiter will provide clear guidance at each stage of the process.</p> <p>For information about our benefits, please visit&nbsp;<a href="https://benefitsatfanatics.com/">https://benefitsatfanatics.com/</a></p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>Ranges will change based on country and state of residence, which are reflected in Geographical Zones defined by Fanatics Betting and Gaming. The range incorporates all of our Geographical Compensation Zones and is subject to change as the Zone associated with the actual offer is confirmed. In addition to the base and bonus, full-time employment, and more. For information about our benefits, please visit&nbsp;<a href="https://benefitsatfanatics.com/">https://benefitsatfanatics.com/</a></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p></div><div class="title">Salary Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$118,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$156,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p>By submitting your application, you agree to our terms of service and acknowledge you have read our&nbsp;<a href="https://static1.squarespace.com/static/5ff494b9931735466ce28d5b/t/69de53bde2c02c25e9c38758/1776178110037/Candidate+Privacy+Policy+April+2026.pdf" target="_blank">Candidate Privacy Policy.</a></p></div>

title: Director, Data Engineering
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p style="text-align: justify;">Rush Street Interactive (NYSE: RSI) is a market leader in online casino and sports betting, currently operating real-money gaming with our brands: BetRivers.com, PlaySugarHouse.com, and RushBet.co. We’re building bridges between online, social and land-based gaming businesses to create amazing, integrated experiences that keep players in the game.</p></div><p>The Director of Data Engineering will lead and scale the Data Engineering and Analytics Engineering functions, owning the post-application data platform and its architecture, governance, and operating model. This foundational leadership role ensures best in class engineering standards, helps drive the organization toward a durable, auditable, data-product operating model, and modernizes and expands a Snowflake-centered data stack to include building and operating scalable distributed data processing and real-time streaming systems that support event-driven data products for operational use cases.</p> <p>The role partners closely with Product, Software Engineering, Data Product Managers, Marketing, Compliance, Finance and Data Science to ensure our data ecosystem is production-grade, scalable, and compliant in a regulated gaming environment.</p> <p><strong>What You'll Do:</strong></p> <p>Team Leadership &amp; Organizational Growth</p> <ul> <li>Lead and grow Data Engineering and Analytics Engineering teams; recruit, mentor, and elevate technical capabilities around distributed data processing, stream processing, and event-driven architectures</li> <li>Define ownership models for platform components and data products; set performance and hiring plans.</li> <li>Advance engineering standards for deployment: development, testing, documentation, release management, and SLAs.</li> <li>Partner with Data Product Managers to define data assets as versioned, documented data products with clear ownership and SLAs.</li> </ul> <p>Platform, Architecture &amp; Engineering Excellence</p> <ul> <li>Own the administration, reliability, governance, and strategic expansion of the Snowflake-based post-application data platform to operate scalable distributed data processing pipelines capable of handling high-volume event data across both batch and streaming workloads.</li> <li>Manage platform governance, access control, security, cost, and capacity planning.</li> <li>Standardize DBT deployment methods, promotion workflows, and environment management.</li> <li>Implement Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform or similar) for reproducible, auditable infrastructure.</li> <li>Deliver monitoring, observability, lineage, and data quality frameworks; enforce traceability and auditability for regulated reporting.</li> <li>Own and evolve ingestion and warehouse architecture and transformation frameworks .</li> <li>Improve performance, cost efficiency, reliability, and scalability of data transformation and storage layers.</li> <li>Define and enforce engineering standards across the data lifecycle and establish SLAs and reliability metrics for critical assets - ensuring all pipelines, transformations, and reporting are auditable and documented for internal and external review</li> </ul> <p>Event-Driven Architecture &amp; Player 360</p> <ul> <li>Partner with Software Engineering on event messaging, streaming architecture, and ingestion patterns (built on technologies such as Kafka, Kinesis, Spark Structured Streaming, Flink, or equivalent platforms).</li> <li>Lead technical design and development of a unified Player 360 data foundation that integrates transactional, behavioral, and event-level data.</li> <li>Align application schema design with downstream analytical, product, and regulatory requirements.</li> <li>Balance real-time and batch processing strategies according to business needs and cost/complexity tradeoffs.</li> </ul> <p><strong>What You'll Bring:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Data Science, or related STEM field preferred. Equivalent practical experience will be considered.</li> <li>8+ years of experience in data engineering, with 3+ years of experience in leadership roles.&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience transitioning an organization from private/startup to public company.</li> <li>Experience in regulated industries (gaming, fintech, payments, healthcare).</li> <li>Prior experience building Player 360 / Customer 360 platforms.</li> <li>Deep hands-on experience with Terraform / IaC and production-grade streaming systems (Kafka, Kinesis, etc.).</li> <li>Familiarity with GenAI governance frameworks and scalable AI integration patterns such as Harness Engineering.</li> <li>Able to travel occasionally both domestically and internationally. <span style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255);">#LI-REMOTE #LI-PROMOTE</span></li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><div class="p-rich_text_section" style="text-align: justify;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong data-stringify-type="bold">What Makes title: Technical Lead - Analytics Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p style="text-align: justify;">Rush Street Interactive (NYSE: RSI) is a market leader in online casino and sports betting, currently operating real-money gaming with our brands: BetRivers.com, PlaySugarHouse.com, and RushBet.co. We’re building bridges between online, social and land-based gaming businesses to create amazing, integrated experiences that keep players in the game.</p></div><p>The Analytics Engineering Technical Lead will define and own the modeling architecture, standards, and technical direction within RSI’s cloud-native Data Platform. This role is accountable for ensuring that analytics-ready data is reliable, scalable, and aligned to long-term business needs across growth, operations, and risk.</p> <p>You will lead the design and governance of core data models in Snowflake and dbt, establishing best practices that enable high-quality, self-service analytics without sacrificing trust or performance. As a hands-on technical leader, you will set standards for modeling, testing, documentation, and deployment while mentoring other Analytics Engineers and raising the overall technical bar of the team.</p> <p>This role partners closely with Data Engineering, Analytics, and business stakeholders to translate evolving requirements into durable data products. You will help balance speed and governance, prioritize platform investments, and ensure our data foundation scales with the business.</p> <p>Our modern data stack includes Snowflake, AWS, Python, Airflow, and dbt.</p> <p><strong>What You'll Do:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Lead the design, development, and lifecycle management of curated datasets, dbt models, and analytics data marts aligned to business domains and metrics.</li> <li>Establish and evolve standards and best practices for dbt modeling, testing, documentation, and code organization to support long-term scalability.</li> <li>Ensure analytical datasets are accurate, reliable, and trusted, serving as a single source of truth for business, product, and stakeholders.</li> <li>Embed data quality checks, documentation, and governance directly into analytics pipelines.</li> <li>Partner closely with Product, Data Engineering and Analytics teams to translate business requirements into well-modeled, performant data products.</li> <li>Mentor and support Analytics Engineers through technical guidance, design reviews, and knowledge sharing.</li> <li>Continuously improve and modernize analytics workflows by introducing automation, tooling enhancements, and AI-assisted development where appropriate.</li> <li>This role includes technical leadership and mentoring responsibilities for the team, including other Analytics Engineers.</li> </ul> <p><strong>What You'll Bring:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Engineering, or a related quantitative discipline.</li> <li>Technical Leadership: Proven experience defining technical direction, standards, and architectural decisions within analytics engineering or curation teams.</li> <li>Data Modeling Expertise: Deep understanding of dbt, data marts, dimensional modeling, and self-service BI enablement.</li> <li>Data Engineering Background: 7+ years of experience in data warehousing or development; 5+ years of experience in hands-on data engineering using SQL and Python.</li> <li>Cloud Infrastructure: Proficiency with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure), including containerization (Docker/Kubernetes).</li> <li>Tooling &amp; Orchestration: Experience with tools like dbt, Airflow, S3, REST APIs, and large-scale DWHs (Snowflake, Redshift, BigQuery, etc.).</li> <li>Change Management: Skilled at leading cross-functional data initiatives and driving adoption of new tools and standards.</li> <li>People Leadership: Experience mentoring and guiding distributed teams across time zones.</li> <li>Communication: Strong written and verbal English skills with the ability to collaborate across technical and business functions.</li> <li>Able to travel occasionally both domestically and internationally <span style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255);">#LI-HYBRID #LI-PROMOTE</span></li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><div class="p-rich_text_section" style="text-align: justify;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong data-stringify-type="bold">What Makes Us Great:</strong></span></div> <ul class="p-rich_text_list p-rich_text_list__bullet p-rich_text_list--nested" style="text-align: justify;" data-stringify-type="unordered-list" data-list-tree="true" data-indent="0" data-border="0"> <li data-stringify-indent="0" data-stringify-border="0">Comprehensive compensation</li> <li data-stringify-indent="0" data-stringify-border="0">Work-life balance initiatives</li> <li data-stringify-indent="0" data-stringify-border="0">Autonomy – we embrace personal freedom and responsibility</li> <li data-stringify-indent="0" data-stringify-border="0">Creativity – we are open to new ideas of how we can be better</li> <li data-stringify-indent="0" data-stringify-border="0">Growth – we want you to develop personally as well as professionally</li> <li data-stringify-indent="0" data-stringify-border="0">Top-notch professionals who are passionate about what they do</li> <li data-stringify-indent="0" data-stringify-border="0">People-oriented environment and supportive atmosphere</li> </ul> <p style="text-align: justify;">As a rapidly growing company in an emerging industry, you’ll have a huge impact on our product and our company. We like proactive team members and strive to have a company of self-disciplined professionals who enjoy collaboration, having fun, and of course, achieving together what others believe to be improbable. We are dedicated to treating everyone with respect and to support your professional and personal growth.</p> <p style="text-align: justify;">Rush Street Interactive is an equal opportunity employer and committed to a diverse and inclusive workplace. All qualified applicants will be considered for employment without regard to race, national origin, ancestry, sex, sexual orientation, sexual identity and expression, marital status, family status, lifestyle, age, culture, religion, military and veteran status, citizenship, or disability.</p> <p style="text-align: justify;">Be at the forefront of this ground-breaking industry! Apply now!</p> <p style="text-align: justify;"><em>Rush Street Interactive uses AI-assisted tools at select stages of the hiring process to enhance efficiency, consistency, and communication. AI does not make hiring decisions - final decisions are made exclusively by our recruiting and hiring teams.</em></p> <p style="text-align: justify;"><em>Rush Street Interactive participates in E-Verify for U.S.-based positions. As required by federal law, we provide the following notices to all prospective U.S. employees:<br><u><span><a href="https://rushstreet.cdn.prismic.io/rushstreet/aiGqugeQX7-eWvvC_E-VerifyParticipationNotice-English%26Spanish-.pdf" target="_blank">E-Verify Participation Notice (English/Spanish)</a></span></u><br><u><span><a href="https://rushstreet.cdn.prismic.io/rushstreet/aiGqvQeQX7-eWvvD_RighttoWorkNotice-English%26Spanish-.pdf" target="_blank">Right to Work Notice (English/Spanish)</a></span></u></em></p></div>

title: Data Analytics Engineer - Boulder, Colorado
full_description: <h1>Data Analytics Engineer — Boulder, Colorado</h1> <p><strong>Full-time | Boulder, CO | No visa sponsorship available</strong></p> <hr> <p>The US Analytics team is building the data foundations that power SumUp's US operations. We design reliable data models, keep our infrastructure clean, and turn complex datasets into insights the business can act on. You'll join at a point where there's real work to own — from shaping how data is structured to improving the tools and dashboards that teams rely on every day. If you're someone who's been close to data in an analytical role and is ready to go deeper into how it's built and maintained, this is a meaningful next step.</p> <p>👉 <a href="https://youtu.be/ZF8A9onHQCE?si=c-GZnVUkrOATN2Jg">Take a look at our Boulder office</a></p> <hr> <h2>What you'll do</h2> <ul> <li>Build, maintain, and document DBT models in a Snowflake environment, keeping data clean, reliable, and well-structured</li> <li>Develop and maintain Tableau dashboards and data sources that stakeholders across the business trust and use independently</li> <li>Rotate through day-to-day data operations support — handling ad hoc requests, troubleshooting reporting issues, and diagnosing pipeline problems</li> <li>Contribute to modernizing our data infrastructure, helping business stakeholders self-serve through AI-assisted tooling</li> <li>Own stakeholder relationships independently — gathering requirements, setting clear expectations, and communicating confidently with technical and non-technical audiences alike</li> </ul> <hr> <h2>You'll be great for this role if…</h2> <ul> <li>Strong experience building or structuring datasets — not just querying them based on others work</li> <li>Solid SQL and DBT Core skills, hands-on experience with Snowflake and&nbsp;</li> <li>Proven ability to build Tableau dashboards that stakeholders genuinely rely on</li> <li>Strong communicator who can own stakeholder conversations, gather requirements, manage expectations, and push back when a request isn't clearly defined</li> <li>High attention to data quality and the confidence to work through problems independently before escalating</li> <li>Familiarity with AI-assisted data tools such as GitHub Copilot or Cursor</li> <li>Familiarity with Salesforce</li> </ul> <p><strong>Bonus points for:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Advanced DBT experience</li> <li>Experience with self-serve or semantic data layers</li> <li>Contributions to an AI agent knowledge base or prompt engineering work</li> <li>Understanding of the limitations of LLMs when applied to data problems</li> <li>Previous experience in a fast paced, team environment</li> </ul> <hr> <h2>Why you should join SumUp</h2> <ul> <li>🌍 Opportunity to work with SumUppers globally on large-scale fintech products used by millions of businesses worldwide, from our Boulder office. This involves an office-first setup</li> <li>🚀 Enrollment onto our Virtual Stock Option program: you will own a stake in SumUp's future success</li> <li>📚 A dedicated annual learning budget of $2,000 for your individual development, which can be used to attend conferences and/or advance your career through further education</li> <li>🏖 Generous time off: 22 days of paid vacation, plus an extra day each year up to 28 days, public holidays, and special leaves</li> <li>🏥 Health and life coverage: group medical coverage, plus life insurance</li> <li>💼 Financial security: 401(k) retirement scheme with SumUp matching funds</li> <li>🌴 Break4me: 1-month sabbatical after 3 years of service</li> <li>🌈 Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion: be part of a workplace that values and promotes diversity, fostering an inclusive environment where everyone's perspectives are respected and embraced</li> </ul> <p><strong>Compensation:</strong></p> <ul> <li>$100,000–$120,000 base salary</li> <li>Virtual Stock Options</li> <li>Final compensation will be based on the candidate's experience and location</li> </ul> <hr> <h2>About SumUp</h2> <p>Be empowered to do more that matters.</p> <p>At SumUp, we're on a mission to empower small businesses across the globe by providing simple and affordable tools that allow them to thrive. Today, over 4 million businesses in 37 markets rely on SumUp as their financial partner to manage payments, finance and customer relationships.</p> <p>Our commitment to small businesses is reflected in <a href="https://youtu.be/9DG64C3moeQ?si=YpcWuBNBTOQPzeLI">our diverse team</a> of over 4,000 SumUppers from over 90 nationalities, united by global collaboration and an innovative mindset. <a href="https://www.sumup.com/careers/culture/">Our core values</a> lay the foundation for who we are and what we stand for, shaping our work culture and driving our success. We foster inclusivity and a continuous learning culture, providing a safe space for personal and professional growth. Our differences make us unique and strong as we strive to create an environment where everyone belongs and feels supported, no matter how they identify.</p> <p>SumUp is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer, actively seeking and embracing diversity in our workforce. We don't make hiring or employment decisions based on race, colour, religion or religious belief, ethnic or national origin, nationality, sex, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, disability, age or any other basis protected by applicable laws or prohibited by company policy. Our commitment extends beyond recruitment to creating a safe and respectful workplace where harassment of any form is strictly prohibited. Discover more about our culture and opportunities on our <a href="https://www.sumup.com/careers/">careers website</a>, and follow our journey on <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/sumup/">LinkedIn</a>, <a href="https://www.instagram.com/insidesumup/">Instagram</a>, and <a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@insidesumup">TikTok</a>.</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Job Application Tip</strong></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">We recognise that candidates feel they need to meet 100% of the job criteria in order to apply for a job. Please note that this is only a guide. If you don’t tick every box, it’s ok too because it means you have room to learn and develop your career at SumUp.</span></p></div>

title: Data Engineer
full_description: <p>As part of the Platform tribe, you will help build a self-service, AI-Ready Data Platform. The Data Platform team supports our next big bets: Data, AI, and real-time analytics. We are a team focused on building scalable, reliable infrastructure to enable our global data community.</p> <p><strong>What you’ll do</strong></p> <ul> <li>Build and maintain best-in-class data infrastructure for critical processes.</li> <li>Develop features that strengthen self-service, including for ETL and orchestration.</li> <li>Optimise processes to use compute more efficiently and reduce cost.</li> <li>Automate operations so the platform stays highly available.</li> <li>Contribute to the design and implementation of new services.</li> </ul> <p><strong>You’ll be a strong fit if you</strong></p> <ul> <li>Have experience with infrastructure as code and containerisation (e.g. Terraform, Helm, Docker, Kubernetes).</li> <li>Have used modern query engines (e.g. Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Trino).</li> <li>Have worked with modern data orchestration tools (e.g. Airflow, Dagster).</li> <li>Are proficient in at least one of our main languages: Python or Go.</li> <li>Bring a pragmatic, team-first mindset.</li> <li>Are self-motivated, work well independently, and can balance stakeholder needs.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Nice to have&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience building and operating performant API layers.</li> <li>Experience with dbt for transform, test, and documentation workflows.</li> <li>Query optimization at scale.</li> <li>Real-time streaming (e.g. Kafka, Flink, StarRocks, Pinot, Druid, ClickHouse).</li> <li>Experience with systems at petabyte scale.</li> <li>Experience implementing AI-enabled systems (e.g. agentic SRE, AI automation).</li> </ul> <p><strong>About SumUp</strong>&nbsp;</p> <p>We believe in the everyday hero. Small business owners are at the heart of all we do, so we're creating tools that help them run their businesses. With a founder’s mentality and a 'team-first’ attitude, our diverse teams across Europe, South America, and the United States work together to ensure that the small business owners we partner with can be successful doing what they love. SumUp is an Equal Employment Opportunity employer that proudly pursues and hires a diverse workforce. SumUp does not make hiring or employment decisions on the basis of race, colour, religion or religious belief, ethnic or national origin, nationality, sex, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, disability, age or any other basis protected by applicable laws or prohibited by company policy. SumUp also strives for a healthy and safe workplace and strictly prohibits harassment of any kind. SumUp will not accept unsolicited resumes from any source other than directly from a candidate.&nbsp;</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Job Application Tip</strong></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">We recognise that candidates feel they need to meet 100% of the job criteria in order to apply for a job. Please note that this is only a guide. If you don’t tick every box, it’s ok too because it means you have room to learn and develop your career at SumUp.</span></p></div>

title: Sr. Analytics Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><h3>About CookUnity:</h3> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Food has lost its soul to modern convenience. And with it, it has lost the power to nourish, inspire, and connect us. So in 2018, CookUnity was founded as the first-of-its-kind platform that connects the world with the source of truly great food: chefs. Today, CookUnity delivers 50 million meals a year from the industry’s best chefs to homes all over the country. Fresh. Ready-to-eat. And crafted with the passion that nourishes body and soul.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Unwilling to stop there, CookUnity is expanding beyond delivery to become an ever-innovating marketplace focused on our singular mission: <strong data-stringify-type="bold">empower Chefs to nourish the world.</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">If that mission has you hungry in more ways than one, you’ve found the right job posting.</span></p></div><h3>About the Team:</h3> <p>Our Data Team is a highly dynamic and innovative group that excels in solving complex business challenges and propelling the growth of an enterprise through our analytical expertise. We provide crucial insights that empower individuals across the company to make better decisions, ultimately increasing efficiency. If you have a passion for shaping the future of an organization with your analytical skills, this role offers an exciting opportunity to fulfill your aspirations.</p> <h3>The role:</h3> <p>Analytics Engineers at CookUnity are data product owners who sit in a single team on a mission to minimize time spent by analysts and data scientists discovering, understanding and preparing data before launching into their work. Each analytics engineer has ownership and autonomy over a set of entities / tables in a domain, collaborating on a single data design from first principles that the team owns together. As their products mature they merchandise them as Tableau Connections, extracts into sheets or any other end point needed to achieve their mission.</p> <p>Some analytics engineers have an interest in data infrastructure and integrations, others in bringing their data to life through interactive visualizations but all have the skills to work with unruly raw data, design analytics friendly data products (incl entities and flat tables) and build them to a production standard that the whole company can rely on. Everyone in data at CookUnity comes with a high agency mindset, a passion for collaborating with others, a pattern of achievement and a sincere interest in investing in their own development.</p> <p>Everyone in data at CookUnity comes with a high agency mindset, a passion for collaborating with others, a pattern of achievement and a sincere interest in investing in their own development.</p> <h3><strong>Responsibilities:</strong></h3> <ul> <li> <p><strong>Own Core Data Products</strong></p> <p>Design, build, and maintain dbt models in Snowflake that reflect key business logic and serve as reliable sources of truth. Define clear ownership, usage expectations, and roadmaps for your data products.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Build Trustworthy, Scalable Models</strong></p> <p>Develop models that are easy to use, tested, documented, and serve a wide range of stakeholders. Measure success through usage metrics, reduced support needs, and SLA coverage.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Ensure Reliability and Observability</strong></p> <p>Monitor pipelines, track schema changes, and implement testing and alerting to ensure consistent data quality and uptime.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Drive Iteration Through Feedback</strong></p> <p>Collect and act on feedback from users. Use metrics, interviews, and usage logs to continuously improve your data products and documentation.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Advance AI Adoption in Analytics</strong></p> <p>Champion the use of agentic and AI-assisted tools in data workflows. Lead pilots, measure impact, and scale successful practices across the team.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Collaborate Cross-Functionally</strong></p> <p>Work with Engineering, Product, and Ops to align on metrics, instrumentation, experimentation, and data needs.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Mentor and Raise the Bar</strong></p> <p>Review code, guide design decisions, and share knowledge to elevate the craft of Analytics Engineering within the team.</p> </li> </ul> <hr> <h3><strong>Qualifications:</strong></h3> <ul> <li>4+ years of experience in Analytics Engineering, Data Engineering, or a similar role working with modern data stacks (dbt, Fivetran/Airbyte, Airflow, Snowflake/BigQuery, etc.)</li> <li>Deep understanding of data modeling principles (e.g. dimensional modeling, ELT best practices, testing strategies, etc.)</li> <li>Proficiency in SQL and version control (Git), with experience shipping production-quality data pipelines</li> <li>Experience collaborating closely with cross-functional stakeholders (Product, Engineering, Operations, etc.) to translate business needs into data solutions</li> <li>Comfort navigating ambiguity in fast-paced environments, with a strong sense of ownership and problem-solving mindset</li> <li>Familiarity with BI tools (e.g. Tableau, Hex, Looker) and a passion for enabling self-serve data culture</li> <li>Excellent communication skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical audiences</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <hr> <h3><strong>Learn More About CookUnity</strong></h3> <p>We believe great leadership starts with alignment on vision, values, and ways of working. To give you deeper insight into who we are and what we’re looking for, we invite you to explore:&nbsp;<a href="https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1mGIRBDJLi0K908bKJtP24QNVMo6QmrsPrDeYCu4dAts/edit?usp=sharing"><strong>CookUnity's Leadership Principles</strong></a>&nbsp;– The values and behaviors that guide how we operate, collaborate, and scale.</p> <p>We hope this provides valuable insight into our culture and product vision. If this excites you, we’d love to connect!</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <hr> <h3>Benefits</h3> <p>💸 Get paid in USD</p> <p>🗺&nbsp;Work remotely: design the life that you want</p> <p>⛱&nbsp;Enjoy 15 days of vacation each year from the start date</p> <p>🎄&nbsp;16 fully paid Argentinean holidays</p> <p>🩺&nbsp;Healthcare Benefit: Monthly stipend to use in your preferred healthcare provider</p> <p>🗓️&nbsp;5- year Sabbatical: After 5 years with CookUnity, you get a 4-week paid sabbatical</p> <p>🐣&nbsp;Paid Family leave</p> <p>🕯&nbsp;Compassionate Leave: 3-5 days each time the need arises</p> <p>🧘🏽‍♀️ Customize the benefits that suit your needs! Access a range of perks tailored to you, including learning opportunities, wellness memberships, delivery apps, and more through our comprehensive benefit platform</p> <p>🧑‍🏫&nbsp;Personalized English coach</p> <h3>&nbsp;</h3> <p>&nbsp;</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">If you’re interested in this role, please submit your application, and if we think you might be a fit, we'll get in touch with you.&nbsp;<strong>Thank you for your time!</strong></span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><em><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>CookUnity is an Equal Opportunity Employer</strong>. We are dedicated to creating a community of inclusion and an environment free from discrimination or harassment. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, age, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, citizenship status, protected veteran status, genetic information, or physical or mental disability.</span></em></p> <p class="p-rich_text_section"><em><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong>A quick note for all candidates</strong></span></em><br><em><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">We’ve recently seen an increase in recruitment scams across the industry, and we want to make sure you (and your data)&nbsp;<strong data-stringify-type="bold">stay safe while applying to CookUnity.</strong>&nbsp;We also want you to know that we take this seriously — sometimes, as part of our process, we may ask for a brief&nbsp;<strong data-stringify-type="bold">“proof of humanity”</strong> to confirm that we’re connecting with a real person, not an impersonator. </span></em><em><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Here are a few tips to help you protect yourself and know what to expect from us:</span></em></p> <ul class="p-rich_text_list p-rich_text_list__bullet p-rich_text_list--nested" data-stringify-type="unordered-list" data-list-tree="true" data-indent="0" data-border="0"> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;
