title: Senior Sustaining and Forward Deployed Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p class="p1"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>About Us</strong></span></p> <p class="p1"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Abacus Insights is transforming how data works for health plans. Our mission is simple: make healthcare data usable, so the people responsible for care and cost decisions can act faster, with confidence.</span></p> <p class="p1"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">We help health plans break down data silos to create a single, trusted data foundation. That foundation powers better decisions—so plans can improve outcomes, reduce waste, and deliver better experiences for members and providers alike. Backed by $100M from top investors, we’re tackling big challenges in an industry that’s ready for change. Our platform enables GenAI use cases by delivering clean, connected, and reliable healthcare data to support automation, prioritization, and decision workflows—and it’s why we are leading the way.</span></p> <p class="p1"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Our innovation begins with people. We are bold, curious, and collaborative—because the best ideas come from working together. We embrace the thoughtful use of AI and automation to drive innovation and efficiency, and we look for individuals who are curious and adaptable—those excited to leverage emerging technologies to enhance how we work—while keeping human insight, connection, and our clients at the center of every decision.</span></p> <p class="p1"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Ready to make an impact? Join us and let’s build the future together.</span></p></div><p><strong>About the Role</strong></p> <p>The Senior Sustaining &amp; Forward Deployed Engineer is a senior individual contributor responsible for production operations, incident response, and post‑launch system reliability across Abacus Insights’ platform.</p> <p>This role blends:</p> <ul> <li>SRE and production operations</li> <li>SWAT-style deep technical problem solving</li> <li>Forward‑deployed, customer‑facing technical work</li> <li>Hands‑on software development and automation</li> </ul> <p>You will own the&nbsp;most complex, ambiguous, and high‑impact production issues, particularly those involving&nbsp;AWS infrastructure, Databricks workloads, and large‑scale data pipelines. You will work directly with customers on escalations and deployments, while ensuring learnings are translated back into durable product and platform improvements.</p> <p>This is a&nbsp;hands-on role. You are expected to lead technically during incidents, debug live systems, and write production code where it meaningfully improves reliability and operability.</p> <p><strong>Your day to day</strong></p> <p><strong>Production Operations &amp; Incident Response</strong></p> <ul> <li>Act as a&nbsp;senior technical escalation point&nbsp;during production incidents</li> <li>Lead real-time incident triage, mitigation, and recovery efforts</li> <li>Drive&nbsp;root cause analysis (RCA)&nbsp;with a focus on systemic, long-term fixes</li> <li>Identify recurring failure patterns and push for architectural or operational improvements</li> <li>Partner with Customer Success and Engineering to manage customer impact during incidents</li> </ul> <p><strong>Sustaining Engineering &amp; Post‑Launch Ownership</strong></p> <ul> <li>Own&nbsp;post-launch reliability, stability, and operational quality&nbsp;of core systems</li> <li>Investigate and resolve complex field issues and production defects</li> <li>Ensure fixes developed during incidents or customer escalations are&nbsp;up streamed into the core product</li> <li>Improve operational readiness of services through better runbooks, monitoring, and alerting</li> <li>Reduce operational toil by converting repeated manual work into automation</li> </ul> <p><strong>Forward Deployed / Customer‑Facing Engineering</strong></p> <ul> <li>Engage directly with strategic customers to solve&nbsp;real-world, production-grade technical challenges</li> <li>Support complex deployments, integrations, and escalations in customer environments</li> <li>Act as a trusted technical partner to customers during high-impact issues</li> <li>Translate customer learnings into&nbsp;concrete product, platform, and operational improvements</li> <li>Contribute to reusable tools, playbooks, and best practices that accelerate future deployments</li> </ul> <p><strong>AWS &amp; Databricks Technical Expertise</strong></p> <ul> <li>Serve as a subject matter expert for&nbsp;AWS-hosted production systems</li> <li>Troubleshoot and resolve issues across: <ul> <li>AWS compute, storage, networking, IAM, and security</li> <li>Databricks jobs, clusters, and Spark-based data pipelines</li> </ul> </li> <li>Debug performance degradation, scalability issues, job failures, and data correctness problems</li> <li>Partner with platform and data teams to harden systems for&nbsp;reliability, scale, and operability</li> </ul> <p><strong>Software Development &amp; Automation</strong></p> <ul> <li>Write&nbsp;production-quality code&nbsp;to: <ul> <li>Automate operational workflows</li> <li>Improve reliability and observability</li> <li>Eliminate manual intervention and reduce incident frequency</li> </ul> </li> <li>Contribute primarily in&nbsp;Python, with exposure to JVM-based systems as needed</li> <li>Review code with a strong emphasis on&nbsp;operability, resiliency, and maintainability</li> <li>Advocate for “build it so it can be operated” engineering standards</li> </ul> <p><strong>Technical Leadership &amp; Collaboration</strong></p> <ul> <li>Provide&nbsp;technical leadership without formal authority, influencing design and operational decisions</li> <li>Mentor engineers through pairing, reviews, and incident leadership</li> <li>Collaborate closely with Product, Engineering, Data, and Customer teams</li> <li>Operate effectively in&nbsp;high-pressure, ambiguous environments, especially during customer-impacting incidents</li> </ul> <p><strong>What you bring to the team</strong>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>10+ years of experience in&nbsp;software engineering, SRE, sustaining engineering, or production operations</li> <li>Deep hands-on experience operating&nbsp;production systems in AWS</li> <li>Strong experience troubleshooting&nbsp;Databricks and large-scale data platforms</li> <li>Proficiency in&nbsp;Python&nbsp;and experience building production services or tooling</li> <li>Strong understanding of: <ul> <li>Distributed systems</li> <li>Incident management and RCA practices</li> <li>Monitoring, alerting, and observability</li> <li>CI/CD Pipelines that leverage Infrastructure as Code.</li> </ul> </li> <li>Proven ability to own problems&nbsp;end-to-end, from detection to permanent resolution</li> <li>Excellent communication skills, especially during incidents and customer escalations</li> <li>Ability to work backward from customer impact to root cause across systems and codebases, delivering fixes in environments with minimal documentation.</li> <li>Strong instinct for operational risk, with the ability to proactively identify failure modes and harden systems before they impact customers.</li> </ul> <p><strong>What we would like to see, but not required</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience in&nbsp;healthcare, health insurance, or regulated data environments</li> <li>Familiarity with: <ul> <li>Kubernetes (EKS), EMR, Lambda</li> <li>Spark internals</li> <li>Snowflake or similar data warehouses</li> </ul> </li> <li>Experience with FHIR, MDM systems, or entity resolution</li> <li>Prior experience in&nbsp;SWAT, escalation engineering, or tiger-team roles</li> <li>Experience contributing to or operating within SRE/on-call programs</li> </ul> <p><strong>Compensation:&nbsp;</strong>Compensation for this role is based on experience, skills, and location, and includes base salary plus eligibility for performance bonuses and equity grants.</p> <p><strong>What you’ll get in return:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Unlimited paid time off – recharge when you need it</li> <li>Work from anywhere – flexibility to fit your life</li> <li>Comprehensive health coverage – multiple plan options to choose from</li> <li>Equity for every employee – share in our success</li> <li>Growth-focused environment – your development matters here</li> <li>Home office setup allowance – one-time support to get you started</li> <li>Monthly cell phone allowance – stay connected with ease<span style="color: rgb(236, 240, 241);">#LI-MS1</span></li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p class="p1"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Our Commitment as an Equal Opportunity Employer</strong></span></p> <p class="p1"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">As a mission-led technology company helping to drive better healthcare outcomes, Abacus Insights believes that the best innovation and value we can bring to our customers comes from diverse ideas, thoughts, experiences, and perspectives. Therefore, we dedicate resources to building diverse teams and providing equal employment opportunities to all applicants. Abacus prohibits discrimination and harassment regarding race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local laws.</span></p> <p class="p1"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">At the heart of who we are is a commitment to continuously and intentionally building an inclusive culture—one that empowers every team member across the globe to do their best work and bring their authentic selves. We carry that same commitment into our hiring process, aiming to create an interview experience where you feel comfortable and confident showcasing your strengths. If there’s anything we can do to support that—big or small—please let us know.</span></p></div>

title: Azure Data Engineer in St. Louis, MO
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>At Accenture Federal Services, nothing matters more than helping the US federal government make the nation stronger and safer and life better for people. Our 13,000+ people are united in a shared purpose to pursue the limitless potential of technology and ingenuity for clients across defense, national security, public safety, civilian, and military health organizations.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join Accenture Federal Services, a technology company within global Accenture. Recognized as a Glassdoor Top 100 Best Place to Work, we offer a collaborative and caring community where you feel like you belong and are empowered to grow, learn and thrive through hands-on experience, certifications, industry training and more.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join us to drive positive, lasting change that moves missions and the government forward!</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> </div></div><p><strong>The work: </strong></p> <p>Azure Data Engineer with experience integrating data from both internal and external data sources to build a data processing system. Creates new pipelines and builds reusable components at scale to support reporting &amp; analytics data products. Writes complex queries to transform raw data sources into accessible models by coding. Cleans, prepares, transforms, and optimizes data at scale for integration and consumption. Implements data management projects and restructures current web architecture. Solves complex data issues and performs root cause analysis to proactively resolve product issues. Owns the data pipeline and supports systems failures.</p> <p><strong>Here’s what you need:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Active Secret security clearance required</li> <li>3+ years of hands-on experience working with Azure cloud native technologies</li> <li>2+ years experience with developing ETL pipelines in Azure using tools such as Azure Data factory, Event hubs, Event grid, Azure functions</li> <li>2+ years developing data engineering pipeline with Databricks or Spark</li> <li>1+ year working with technologies such as CosmoDB, AzureSQL, Redis, Synapse&nbsp;</li> <li>1+ year working with orchestration tool such as Airflow or Oozie</li> <li>Strong programming foundation with python or java</li> <li>Strong experience with SQL</li> <li>Experience working in Agile teams</li> <li>Experience working with streaming and batching solutions</li> <li>Experience working with csv, json, xml and complex structures</li> <li>Familiar with devOps process, CI/CD, security, coding standard and SDLC cycle</li> </ul> <p>Preferred:&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>Experience with migrations to major cloud</li> <li>Experience working with databases, compute, storage and networks on one or more of the following platforms: Azure, AWS, Google Cloud Platform, VMware or Oracle Cloud Platform.</li> </ul> <p>"You must live local to St. Louis, MO <u>OR</u> be willing to travel to St. Louis every week Monday-Thursday"</p> <p><span style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255);">#clearancejob</span></p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span class="TextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8">As required by local law, Accenture Federal Services provides reasonable ranges of compensation for hired roles based on labor costs in the states of <strong>California, Colorado, Hawaii, Illinois, Maine, Maryland, Massachusetts, Minnesota, New Jersey, New York, Vermont, Virginia, Washington, and the District of Columbia, and the city of Cleveland</strong></span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8">. The base pay range for this position in these locations is shown below. Compensation for roles at Accenture Federal Services varies depending on a wide array of factors, including but not limited to office location, role, skill set, and level of experience. Accenture Federal Services offers a wide variety of benefits. </span></span><a class="Hyperlink SCXW225111203 BCX8" href="https://www.accenture.com/us-en/careers/your-future-rewards-benefits" target="_blank"><span class="TextRun Underlined SCXW225111203 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="none"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8" data-ccp-charstyle="Hyperlink">You can find more information on benefits here.</span></span></a><span class="TextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8"> We accept applications on an on-going basis and there is no fixed deadline to apply.</span></span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p></div><div class="title">The pay range for the states of California, Colorado, Hawaii, Illinois, Maine, Maryland, Massachusetts, Minnesota, New Jersey, New York, Vermont, Virginia, Washington, and the District of Columbia, and the city of Cleveland is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$114,700</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$221,100 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><div> <div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><em><strong><span data-contrast="none">What We Believe</span> </strong></em></div> <div><em>As a company wholly dedicated to serving the US federal government, we bring together the best talent to help reinvent how federal agencies operate and deliver greater value for their mission and the American people. We have an unwavering commitment to creating a culture in which all our people are respected, feel a sense of belonging, and have equal opportunity. As a business imperative, every person at Accenture Federal Services has the responsibility to create and sustain a culture where everyone feels welcomed and included. This is grounded in our core values and our experience that hiring and developing great people who reflect different perspectives, experiences, and backgrounds is key to driving innovation and delivering the results that our clients and the country count on.</em></div> </div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><em><strong><span data-contrast="none">Equal Employment Opportunity Statement</span></strong></em></div> <div><em>We believe that no one should be discriminated against because of their differences. All employment decisions shall be made without regard to age, race, creed, color, religion, sex, national origin, ancestry, disability status, veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, citizenship status or any other basis as protected by federal, state, or local law. Our rich diversity makes us more innovative, more competitive, and more creative, which helps us better serve our clients and our communities. For details, view a copy of the<a href="https://afscommunities.force.com/careers/s/equal-opportunity-annual-policy" target="_blank"> Accenture Federal Services Equal Opportunity Policy Statement.</a></em></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><em>Accenture Federal Services is an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. Additionally, as an Affirmative Action Employer for Veterans and Individuals with Disabilities, Accenture Federal Services is committed to providing veteran employment opportunities to our service men and women.</em></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><strong><em><span data-contrast="none">Requesting An Accommodation</span></em></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></div> <div><em><span data-contrast="none">Accenture Federal Services is committed to providing equal employment opportunities for persons with disabilities or religious observances, including reasonable accommodation when needed. If you are hired by Accenture Federal Services and require accommodation to perform the essential functions of your role, you will be asked to participate in our reasonable accommodation process. Accommodations made to facilitate the recruiting process are not a guarantee of future or continued accommodations once hired.</span></em></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><em><span data-contrast="auto">If you<strong> </strong>are being considered for employment opportunities with Accenture Federal Services and need an accommodation for a disability or religious observance during the interview process or for the job you are interviewing for, please speak with your recruiter.</span></em></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><strong><em><span data-contrast="none">Other Employment Statements</span></em></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></div> <div><em><span data-contrast="none">Applicants for employment in the US must have work authorization that does not now or in the future require sponsorship of a visa for employment authorization in the United States.</span></em></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><em><span data-contrast="none">Candidates who are currently employed by a client of Accenture Federal Services or an affiliated Accenture business may not be eligible for consideration.</span></em></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><em><span data-contrast="none">Job candidates will not be obligated to disclose sealed or expunged records of conviction or arrest as part of the hiring process.</span></em></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><em><span data-contrast="none">The Company will not discharge or in any other manner discriminate against employees or applicants because they have inquired about, discussed, or disclosed their own pay or the pay of another employee or applicant. Additionally, employees who have access to the compensation information of other employees or applicants as a part of their essential job functions cannot disclose the pay of other employees or applicants to individuals who do not otherwise have access to compensation information, unless the disclosure is (a) in response to a formal complaint or charge, (b) in furtherance of an investigation, proceeding, hearing, or action, including an investigation conducted by the employer, or (c) consistent with the Company's legal duty to furnish information.</span></em></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><em><span data-contrast="none">California requires additional notifications for applicants and employees. If you are a California resident, live in or plan to work from Los Angeles County upon being hired for this position, please&nbsp;<a class="external-link" href="https://www.accenture.com/us-en/careers/life-at-accenture/e-verify-legal-notices" target="_blank">click here</a> for additional important information.</span></em></div> </div> <p><strong><em> </em></strong></p></div>

title: Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>At Accenture Federal Services, nothing matters more than helping the US federal government make the nation stronger and safer and life better for people. Our 13,000+ people are united in a shared purpose to pursue the limitless potential of technology and ingenuity for clients across defense, national security, public safety, civilian, and military health organizations.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join Accenture Federal Services, a technology company within global Accenture. Recognized as a Glassdoor Top 100 Best Place to Work, we offer a collaborative and caring community where you feel like you belong and are empowered to grow, learn and thrive through hands-on experience, certifications, industry training and more.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join us to drive positive, lasting change that moves missions and the government forward!</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> </div></div><p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>ob Description: Data Engineer</strong></p> <p>We are looking for a skilled and passionate&nbsp;<strong>Data Engineer</strong>&nbsp;to join our team. You will play a critical role in designing, building, and maintaining our data infrastructure to ensure seamless data flow, scalability, and reliability. You will work closely with data scientists, analysts, and other stakeholders to develop efficient data pipelines, manage large datasets, and integrate machine learning models into production environments.</p> <h3><strong>Key Responsibilities:</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Programming Fundamentals</strong>: Write clean, efficient, and scalable code to build and optimize data solutions using programming languages like Python.</li> <li><strong>Data Pipeline Development</strong>: Design, build, and orchestrate robust and reliable data workflows using tools such as Apache Airflow, dbt, Prefect, or Dagster.</li> <li><strong>Cloud Platform Familiarity</strong>: Work comfortably in cloud environments, with a strong preference for experience in AWS. Experience in GCP or Azure is also highly valued.</li> <li><strong>Database &amp; Querying Skills</strong>: Extract, integrate, and ensure the quality of data from various sources using tools and technologies such as SQL, PostgreSQL, Snowflake, Amazon Redshift, or BigQuery.</li> <li><strong>Big Data Processing</strong>: Leverage frameworks like Apache Spark, Databricks, or Apache Kafka to process and manage large-scale data workflows with reliability and efficiency.</li> <li><strong>ML Integration / MLOps</strong>: Support the implementation, deployment, and scaling of machine learning models in production environments using tools like Amazon SageMaker, MLflow, or Kubeflow.</li> <li><strong>Monitoring &amp; Troubleshooting</strong>: Monitor data pipeline health, troubleshoot issues, and ensure data consistency using tools such as Amazon CloudWatch, Datadog, or Great Expectations.</li> <li><strong>Collaboration &amp; Documentation</strong>: Work closely with data scientists, analysts, and other stakeholders to understand data requirements, communicate solutions, and document processes using tools like Git, Jira, and Confluence.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Qualifications:</strong></h3> <ul> <li>2 years of experience as a Data Engineer or similar role.</li> <li>Strong proficiency in Python or other programming languages relevant to data engineering.</li> <li>Any additional experience with any of the following: <ul> <li>Hands-on experience with data pipeline orchestration tools (e.g., Apache Airflow, dbt, Prefect, Dagster).</li> <li>Solid understanding of cloud platforms (AWS strongly preferred; GCP or Azure experience also considered).</li> <li>Expertise in SQL and familiarity with relational and columnar databases (e.g., PostgreSQL, Snowflake, BigQuery).</li> <li>Knowledge of big data processing frameworks (e.g., Apache Spark, Databricks, or Apache Kafka).</li> <li>Familiarity with machine learning workflows and experience implementing MLOps tools (e.g., Amazon SageMaker, MLflow, or Kubeflow) in production environments.</li> <li>Strong troubleshooting skills and experience monitoring data pipelines and system health using tools like Amazon CloudWatch, Datadog, or Great Expectations.</li> <li>Excellent communication skills and a collaborative mindset, with a focus on documentation and best practices.</li> </ul> </li> </ul> <h3><strong>Preferred Skills:</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Experience working with large-scale distributed systems.</li> <li>Knowledge of data governance and security best practices.</li> <li>Proven ability to work in cross-functional teams and contribute to problem-solving and innovation.</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h3><strong>Clearance:</strong></h3> <ul> <li>An active TS/SCI federal security clearance is required</li> </ul> <p><br><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">#LI-Defense #clearancejobs</span></p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span class="TextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8">As required by local law, Accenture Federal Services provides reasonable ranges of compensation for hired roles based on labor costs in the states of <strong>California, Colorado, Hawaii, Illinois, Maine, Maryland, Massachusetts, Minnesota, New Jersey, New York, Vermont, Virginia, Washington, and the District of Columbia, and the city of Cleveland</strong></span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8">. The base pay range for this position in these locations is shown below. Compensation for roles at Accenture Federal Services varies depending on a wide array of factors, including but not limited to office location, role, skill set, and level of experience. title: Data Engineering Lead
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>At Accenture Federal Services, nothing matters more than helping the US federal government make the nation stronger and safer and life better for people. Our 13,000+ people are united in a shared purpose to pursue the limitless potential of technology and ingenuity for clients across defense, national security, public safety, civilian, and military health organizations.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join Accenture Federal Services, a technology company within global Accenture. Recognized as a Glassdoor Top 100 Best Place to Work, we offer a collaborative and caring community where you feel like you belong and are empowered to grow, learn and thrive through hands-on experience, certifications, industry training and more.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join us to drive positive, lasting change that moves missions and the government forward!</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> </div></div><p><strong>Job Description</strong></p> <p>The Data Engineer will design, build, and maintain the core client data infrastructure and pipelines necessary to ingest, process, store, and transform data for various consumers. Develop and operate automated, end-to-end data pipelines, create and maintain data models and schemas, and contribute to the overall scalability, reliability, and security of the data platform. Implement data processing frameworks and technologies, design and optimize data storage solutions, and develop data transformation logic to support analytics requirements. Implement data quality checks and validation procedures, establish data lineage tracking mechanisms, and troubleshoot data pipeline issues. Collaborate with data scientists and analysts to understand data requirements, work with security teams to implement data protection measures, and stay current with data engineering technologies and best practices. Document data architecture and pipelines, participate in data governance activities, and contribute to continuous improvement of data engineering processes.</p> <p><strong>Must have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>8 years of experience in data engineering, data pipeline design, and management</li> <li>Must meet DoD 8140 requirements</li> <li>Bachelor’s degree (or 4 years of additional equivalent experience) in IT, Cybersecurity, Computer Science, Information Systems, Data Science, Software Engineering</li> </ul> <p><strong>Security Clearance:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Active Secret, Top Secret, TS/SCI, or TS/SCI with Polygraph clearance required, depending on position&nbsp;</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span class="TextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8">As required by local law, Accenture Federal Services provides reasonable ranges of compensation for hired roles based on labor costs in the states of <strong>California, Colorado, Hawaii, Illinois, Maine, Maryland, Massachusetts, Minnesota, New Jersey, New York, Vermont, Virginia, Washington, and the District of Columbia, and the city of Cleveland</strong></span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8">. title: Data Engineer in St. Louis, MO
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>At Accenture Federal Services, nothing matters more than helping the US federal government make the nation stronger and safer and life better for people. Our 13,000+ people are united in a shared purpose to pursue the limitless potential of technology and ingenuity for clients across defense, national security, public safety, civilian, and military health organizations.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join Accenture Federal Services, a technology company within global Accenture. Recognized as a Glassdoor Top 100 Best Place to Work, we offer a collaborative and caring community where you feel like you belong and are empowered to grow, learn and thrive through hands-on experience, certifications, industry training and more.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join us to drive positive, lasting change that moves missions and the government forward!</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> </div></div><p><strong>The work: </strong></p> <p>Data Engineer is responsible for creating efficient data pipelines, ensuring data quality, and implementing ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) processes to facilitate the seamless migration and deployment of data across systems. The Data Engineer works within the Agile frameworks to support the team's data-driven approach to application migration, collaborating closely with other team members to ensure data integrity and accessibility throughout the transition to cloud environments.</p> <p>Key Responsibilities:</p> <ul> <li>Design and develop scalable, efficient data architectures to support the migration process</li> <li>Create data models and schemas that align with both source and target systems</li> <li>Develop and maintain robust data pipelines for data generation, collection, and processing</li> <li>Implement real-time and batch processing pipelines as required by the migration strategy</li> <li>Design and implement ETL processes to migrate data between source and target systems</li> <li>Develop scripts and workflows for data extraction, transformation, and loading</li> <li>Develop and maintain data cleansing routines to address data inconsistencies</li> <li>Create monitoring systems to track data quality metrics throughout the migration</li> <li>Collaborate with the migration team to plan and execute data migration strategies</li> <li>Provide expertise on data-related aspects of the migration process</li> <li>Troubleshoot and resolve data-related issues during migration</li> <li>Optimize data processing and storage for improved performance in cloud environments</li> <li>Monitor and tune data pipelines for efficiency</li> <li>Implement data security measures to protect sensitive information during migration</li> <li>Ensure compliance with data protection regulations and organizational policies</li> <li>Develop and maintain data access controls and audit trails</li> <li>Create and maintain comprehensive documentation for data architectures and processes</li> <li>Work closely with data analysts, cloud engineers, and application developers</li> <li>Integrate data solutions with other components of the migrated applications</li> <li>Participate in Agile ceremonies (Sprint Planning, Daily Stand-ups, Sprint Reviews, and Retrospectives)&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><strong>Here's what you need: </strong></p> <ul> <li>Bachelors degree and a minimum of 5 years experience.</li> <li>Active Secret Security clearance required</li> <li>Experience with cloud-based ETL services (e.g. AWS Glue, Google Cloud Dataflow, Azure Data Factory)</li> <li>Experience with Python, SQL, Spark, and PySpark</li> <li>Familiarity with data orchestration and data quality processes&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><strong>Preferred experience:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience with data platforms like Databricks, Palantir, and Snowflake</li> </ul> <p>"You must live local to St. Louis, MO <u>OR</u> be willing to travel to St. Louis every week Monday-Thursday"</p> <p>&nbsp;</p><div title: Data Engineer Senior Analyst
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>At Accenture Federal Services, nothing matters more than helping the US federal government make the nation stronger and safer and life better for people. Our 13,000+ people are united in a shared purpose to pursue the limitless potential of technology and ingenuity for clients across defense, national security, public safety, civilian, and military health organizations.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join Accenture Federal Services, a technology company within global Accenture. Recognized as a Glassdoor Top 100 Best Place to Work, we offer a collaborative and caring community where you feel like you belong and are empowered to grow, learn and thrive through hands-on experience, certifications, industry training and more.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join us to drive positive, lasting change that moves missions and the government forward!</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> </div></div><p><strong>Job Description</strong></p> <p>As a Data Engineer at the Senior Analyst level, you will be a key contributor to the team responsible for building and maintaining the data pipelines for a data platform. This is a hands-on role where you will support the development, deployment, and operation of critical data infrastructure. You will work closely with senior engineers, applying your technical skills to execute tasks, troubleshoot issues, and learn the foundations of enterprise-scale data engineering in a mission-critical environment.</p> <p><strong>Responsibilities: </strong></p> <ul> <li>Assist in the development and maintenance of ETL/ELT data pipelines using established patterns and tools.</li> <li>Utilize reusable pipeline templates and Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) scripts to deploy data flows consistently and efficiently.</li> <li>Support the O&amp;M of existing pipelines by monitoring performance, troubleshooting failures, and responding to alerts.</li> <li>Execute data quality checks and assist in the implementation of data validation rules using frameworks like Great Expectations.</li> <li>Work with senior team members to test and deploy new pipeline features and optimizations.</li> <li>Contribute to the creation and maintenance of technical documentation for data pipelines and processes.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Must have: </strong></p> <ul> <li>2+ years of experience in a data-focused role (e.g., data engineering, backend development, database administration).</li> <li>Experience with Python and SQL for data manipulation and scripting.</li> <li>Familiarity with data engineering concepts, including ETL processes and data warehousing.</li> <li>Exposure to cloud environments (e.g., AWS, Azure) and data platforms like Databricks or Snowflake.</li> <li>Basic understanding of Agile/Scrum methodologies.</li> <li>A strong desire to learn and grow in the data engineering field.</li> <li>US Citizenship</li> </ul> <p><strong>Nice to have: </strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience with Spark/PySpark.</li> <li>Familiarity with Infrastructure-as-Code tools like Terraform.</li> <li>Exposure to data orchestration tools (e.g., Airflow) or CI/CD pipelines.</li> <li>Experience working in a DoD or government environment.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Security Clearance: </strong></p> <ul> <li>Active TS or TS/SCI clearance</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span class="TextRun SCXW225111203 title: Data Engineer Team Lead
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>At Accenture Federal Services, nothing matters more than helping the US federal government make the nation stronger and safer and life better for people. Our 13,000+ people are united in a shared purpose to pursue the limitless potential of technology and ingenuity for clients across defense, national security, public safety, civilian, and military health organizations.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join Accenture Federal Services, a technology company within global Accenture. Recognized as a Glassdoor Top 100 Best Place to Work, we offer a collaborative and caring community where you feel like you belong and are empowered to grow, learn and thrive through hands-on experience, certifications, industry training and more.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join us to drive positive, lasting change that moves missions and the government forward!</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> </div></div><p>As the Data Engineer Team Lead, you will lead a team of talented engineers responsible for building and maintaining the data lifeblood.&nbsp; You will provide the technical vision and hands-on leadership for the design, development, and sustainment of all data pipelines. This senior role requires you to champion innovation through governance, driving the adoption of reusable templates, automation, and modern data engineering practices to deliver resilient, scalable, and cost-efficient data solutions for the DoD.</p> <p><strong>Responsibilities: </strong></p> <ul> <li>Lead, mentor, and manage a team of data engineers working on new pipeline development and operations &amp; maintenance (O&amp;M).</li> <li>Drive the technical strategy for the data pipeline ecosystem, ensuring stability, scalability, and efficiency.</li> <li>Enforce the use of reusable pipeline templates, automated monitoring patterns, and Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) deployment standards established by the architecture team.</li> <li>Oversee the development of new data pipelines using modern, modular patterns like Databricks Delta Live Tables.</li> <li>Direct the optimization of existing pipelines through the implementation of automated monitoring, alerting, and proactive schema drift detection.</li> <li>Facilitate code reviews, enforce documentation standards, and ensure the team adheres to agile best practices.</li> <li>Collaborate with the Solution Architect to identify and implement technical improvements, such as leveraging GPUs for large-scale transformations.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Must have:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>10+ years of experience in data engineering or software engineering</li> <li>Expert-level proficiency with Python, SQL, Spark, or PySpark</li> <li>Deep experience with cloud data platforms (e.g., AWS or Azure) and data engineering platforms like Databricks, Palantir, or Snowflake</li> <li>Demonstrated experience leading projects</li> <li>US Citizenship (No Dual Citizenship)</li> </ul> <p><strong>Nice to have:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience working in high-security DoD environments (e.g., SIPR, JWICS)</li> <li>Hands-on experience with Databricks Delta Live Tables, Terraform for IaC, and CI/CD pipelines</li> <li>Familiarity with data orchestration tools (e.g., Airflow) and data quality frameworks (e.g., Great Expectations)</li> <li>Experience with streaming data technologies (e.g., Kafka) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes)</li> <li>Extensive experience with the development and maintenance of scalable ETL/ELT tools and services</li> </ul> <p><strong>Security Clearance:</strong></p> full_description: <div class="content-intro"><div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>At Accenture Federal Services, nothing matters more than helping the US federal government make the nation stronger and safer and life better for people. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in data engineering and a deep understanding of ETL processes.</p> <p><strong>The work you'll do</strong>:</p> <ul> <li>Write robust and efficient&nbsp;<strong>Python </strong>and <strong>SQL</strong> scripts to automate data processing tasks.</li> <li>Integrate data from diverse sources, such as databases, APIs, and flat files, into centralized systems.</li> <li>Implement data transformations, enrichment, and modeling workflows to ensure data quality and usability.</li> <li>Ensure data structures are optimized for performance and scalability.</li> <li>Provide technical guidance and support to ensure effective use of Palantir tools across teams.</li> <li>Implement data quality checks, validation, and monitoring mechanisms to transformation and curation to meet business and analytics requirements.</li> <li>Maintain and improve data quality, consistency, and accuracy through validation and cleansing processes.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Here's what you'll need</strong>:</p> <ul> <li><strong>3+ years of experience</strong> in data engineering.</li> <li>Strong proficiency in scripting and programming with&nbsp;<strong>Python</strong>.</li> <li>Expertise in working with&nbsp;<strong>SQL</strong> for data querying, transformation, and optimization.</li> <li>Experience with&nbsp;<strong>data integration</strong> from diverse sources such as APIs, relational databases, and file systems.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Bonus points if you have</strong>:</p> <ul> <li><strong>Bachelor’s degree</strong> in <strong>Computer Science</strong>, <strong>Data Engineering</strong>, or a related field.</li> <li>Hands-on experience with&nbsp;<strong>Palantir</strong>.</li> <li>Experience with&nbsp;<strong>cloud platforms</strong> (e.g., AWS, Azure, GCP) and <strong>big data technologies</strong> (e.g., Apache Spark, Hadoop).</li> <li>Familiarity with&nbsp;<strong>data orchestration tools</strong> such as <strong>Apache Airflow</strong>, <strong>Prefect</strong>, or similar.</li> <li>Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to detail.</li> <li>Excellent communication and teamwork skills to collaborate with technical and business teams.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Security clearance</strong>:</p> <ul> <li>Active TS/SCI with Poly clearance is required.</li> CI/CD pipelines and production deployment workflows</li> <li>Ability to obtain Databricks Data Engineer Professional certification&nbsp;</li> <li>Ability to travel, dependent on client and team</li> title: Forward Deployed Engineer, Palantir Foundry - Honolulu, HI
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>At Accenture Federal Services, nothing matters more than helping the US federal government make the nation stronger and safer and life better for people. Our 13,000+ people are united in a shared purpose to pursue the limitless potential of technology and ingenuity for clients across defense, national security, public safety, civilian, and military health organizations.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join Accenture Federal Services, a technology company within global Accenture. Recognized as a Glassdoor Top 100 Best Place to Work, we offer a collaborative and caring community where you feel like you belong and are empowered to grow, learn and thrive through hands-on experience, certifications, industry training and more.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join us to drive positive, lasting change that moves missions and the government forward!</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> </div></div><p class="css-n33ttv"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">As a Forward Deployed Engineer at AFS, you will be responsible for helping our clients solve their most pressing challenges, from the battlefield to supply chains, benefits programs, and broader government operations. You will work as part of a small team of engineers, domain experts, and other Deployment Strategists to turn a client’s vision into reality by deploying Palantir software and building tailored solutions that make a measurable impact on their operations.</span></p> <h2 class="chakra-heading css-17hyekh">&nbsp;</h2> <h2 class="chakra-heading css-17hyekh"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Day-to-Day Responsibilities</span></h2> <ul class="chakra-list__root css-192by25"> <li class="chakra-list__item css-7nbze4" style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Collaborative Teamwork</strong>: Partner with engineers, program managers, and domain specialists to conceive, architect, build, and maintain applications that meet AFS clients’ needs.</span></li> <li class="chakra-list__item css-7nbze4" style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Data Synthesis</strong>: Understand a client’s most critical objectives and synthesize disparate information into a cohesive vision and actionable roadmap, interpreting what the data signifies and outlining an impact-based plan to rapidly go from use case to prototype to scaled deployment.</span></li> <li class="chakra-list__item css-7nbze4" style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Rapid Iteration</strong>: Quickly iterate, build from scratch, and help transform clients' operations at uncommon speed. You won’t just deploy software—you’ll help reshape how entire organizations work by putting powerful tools in the hands of executives and real operators.</span></li> <li class="chakra-list__item css-7nbze4" style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Production-Grade Solutions</strong>: Develop production-grade solutions that make sense of the client’s data and process it through an actionable workflow that can help clients make better decisions.</span></li> <li class="chakra-list__item css-7nbze4" style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Collaboration</strong>: Collaborate with technical and non-technical colleagues to define solution requirements, iterate on the solution, and ship code.</span></li> </ul> <h2 class="chakra-heading css-17hyekh">&nbsp;</h2> <h2 class="chakra-heading css-17hyekh"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">What We Look For</span></h2> <ul class="chakra-list__root css-192by25"> <li class="chakra-list__item css-7nbze4" style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Client Success Obsession</strong>: A deep commitment to helping clients succeed, even beyond the original scope. You thrive on solving hard customer problems and take pride in delivering solutions that drive real value.</span></li> <li class="chakra-list__item css-7nbze4" style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Analytical &amp; Problem-Solving Skills</strong>: Strong abilities in breaking down complex problems and constructing end-to-end solutions that work.</span></li> <li class="chakra-list__item css-7nbze4" style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Technical Proficiency</strong>: Proficiency in relevant programming languages (e.g., Python, TypeScript) and the ability to build applications that utilize large structured and unstructured datasets in production environments.</span></li> <li class="chakra-list__item css-7nbze4" style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Independent Ownership</strong>: Capability to work autonomously while owning outcomes, with support available but a desire to take the driver’s seat.</span></li> <li class="chakra-list__item css-7nbze4" style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Real-World Impact Delivery</strong>: A proven track record of delivering meaningful outcomes through software and analytical products.</span></li> <li class="chakra-list__item css-7nbze4" style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Collaborative Skills</strong>: Strong ability to collaborate with teammates and clients of varying technical proficiency, embedding with clients and joining their teams.</span></li> <li class="chakra-list__item css-7nbze4" style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Willingness to Travel</strong>: Flexibility to travel as needed for client implementation work.</span></li> </ul> <p class="css-n33ttv"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">In this role, you’ll iterate quickly, build from scratch, and help organizations transform their operations at uncommon speed. You won’t just deploy software—you’ll help reshape how entire organizations function by providing powerful tools to those who can drive change.</span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span style="font-size: title: Google Cloud Platform (GCP) Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>At Accenture Federal Services, nothing matters more than helping the US federal government make the nation stronger and safer and life better for people. Our 13,000+ people are united in a shared purpose to pursue the limitless potential of technology and ingenuity for clients across defense, national security, public safety, civilian, and military health organizations.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join Accenture Federal Services, a technology company within global Accenture. Recognized as a Glassdoor Top 100 Best Place to Work, we offer a collaborative and caring community where you feel like you belong and are empowered to grow, learn and thrive through hands-on experience, certifications, industry training and more.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join us to drive positive, lasting change that moves missions and the government forward!</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> </div></div><p><strong>Job Description</strong>:</p> <p>Accenture Federal Services is looking for a specialized Google Cloud Platform (GCP) Data Engineer to support strategic data and workload migrations. In this role, you will be responsible for designing and building robust, secure data architectures and pipelines on GCP. You will help modernize federal data landscapes, enabling advanced analytics and data-driven decision-making for critical mission objectives.</p> <p><strong>The work you'll do</strong>:</p> <ul> <li>Design, develop, and maintain robust data pipelines and ETL processes that enable the seamless integration, cleansing, harmonization, and transformations in large-scale data processing systems and data lakes/data warehouses using GCP native services (BigQuery, Cloud Storage, Dataflow, Dataproc, Pub/Sub).</li> <li>Implement performance tuning (partitioning, broadcast joins, caching, shuffle optimization).</li> <li>Integrate data from multiple sources (databases, APIs, cloud storage, potentially streaming).</li> <li>Migrate legacy data stores and ETL pipelines to modernized, cloud-native architectures on GCP.</li> <li>Develop scalable batch and real-time streaming data pipelines using Python, SQL, and <strong>Apache Beam</strong>.</li> <li>Implement data governance, data quality checks, and secure data access controls in alignment with strict federal security requirements.</li> <li>Collaborate with data scientists, cloud infrastructure engineers, and mission stakeholders to optimize data models and query performance.</li> <li>Design and Implement <strong>CI/CD Pipelines</strong>: Architect and build robust, automated CI/CD pipelines to streamline the build, test, and deployment processes from development through to production environments.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Here's what you'll need</strong>:</p> <ul> <li>3 to 5+ years of experience with <strong>data engineering</strong>, data warehousing, and/or big data processing.</li> <li>2+ years of hands-on experience building data pipelines and/or data solutions on <strong>Google Cloud Platform</strong> (BigQuery, Dataflow, and/or Cloud Composer).</li> <li>Strong programming skills in <strong>Python</strong> and advanced proficiency in SQL.</li> <li>Experience with <strong>ETL/ELT</strong> concepts and tools.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Bonus points if you have</strong>:</p> <ul> <li>Google Cloud Professional Data Engineer Certification.</li> <li>Experience with migrating legacy relational databases (e.g., Oracle, SQL Server) to cloud-native databases (e.g., Cloud SQL, AlloyDB, Spanner).</li> <li>Familiarity with federal data strategies, RMF, and Impact Level 4/5 (IL4/IL5) security and compliance standards.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Security clearance</strong>:</p> <ul> <li>Active Top Secret (TS) or Interim TS security clearance is required.</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span class="TextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8">As required by title: Palantir Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>At Accenture Federal Services, nothing matters more than helping the US federal government make the nation stronger and safer and life better for people. Our 13,000+ people are united in a shared purpose to pursue the limitless potential of technology and ingenuity for clients across defense, national security, public safety, civilian, and military health organizations.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join Accenture Federal Services, a technology company within global Accenture. Recognized as a Glassdoor Top 100 Best Place to Work, we offer a collaborative and caring community where you feel like you belong and are empowered to grow, learn and thrive through hands-on experience, certifications, industry training and more.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join us to drive positive, lasting change that moves missions and the government forward!</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> </div></div><p><strong>Job Description</strong>:</p> <p>The Palantir Data Engineer leverages advanced Python skills within a small team to develop and implement data transformation pipelines in Palantir's environment. The Data Engineer will also integrate with external systems via API, parse API responses into usable data objects, design user interfaces, and develop custom functions with TypeScript. Data Engineer will conduct code reviews, solution brainstorming, and define UI designs and functionalities.</p> <p><strong>Work you'll do</strong>:</p> <ul> <li>Movement of structure and unstructured data using approved methods.</li> <li>Execute data ingestion activities for storing data in a local or enterprise level location.</li> <li>Develop code to format data that supports exploration.</li> <li>Analyze source data formats and work with Data Scientists and partners to determine the formats and transforms that best meet mission objectives.</li> <li>Develop code and tools to provide one-time and on-going data extraction from various repositories, formatting and transformations into enterprise or standalone data models.</li> <li>Develop new ETL and perform O&amp;M and enhancements on existing ETL code using best practices/standards.</li> <li>Develop and deliver documentation for each project including ETL mappings, code use guide, code location, and access instructions.</li> <li>Perform tier 2 level triage with customers and translate concerns into specific requirements.</li> <li>Develop new tools, code, and services to execute data engineering activities involving data of varying types and in varying conditions.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><strong>Here’s what you’ll need:</strong></p> <ul> <li>4 to 7+ years of experience with all of the following: <ul> <li>Python</li> and other data engineering programming</li> <li>COTS and open-source data engineering tools such as ElasticSearch and NiFi Agile / Scrum</li> </ul> </li> </ul> <p><strong>Bonus points if you title: Palantir Forward Deployed Engineer, Washington DC
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>At Accenture Federal Services, nothing matters more than helping the US federal government make the nation stronger and safer and life better for people. Our 13,000+ people are united in a shared purpose to pursue the limitless potential of technology and ingenuity for clients across defense, national security, public safety, civilian, and military health organizations.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join Accenture Federal Services, a technology company within global Accenture. Recognized as a Glassdoor Top 100 Best Place to Work, we offer a collaborative and caring community where you feel like you belong and are empowered to grow, learn and thrive through hands-on experience, certifications, industry training and more.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join us to drive positive, lasting change that moves missions and the government forward!</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> </div></div><p><strong>What We Look For:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>Client Success Obsession: A deep commitment to helping clients succeed, even beyond the original scope. You thrive on solving hard customer problems and take pride in delivering solutions that drive real value</li> <li>Analytical &amp; Problem-Solving Skills: Strong abilities in breaking down complex problems and constructing end-to-end solutions that work</li> <li>Technical Proficiency: Proficiency in relevant programming languages (e.g., Python, TypeScript) and the ability to build applications that utilize large structured and unstructured datasets in production environments</li> <li>Independent Ownership: Capability to work autonomously while owning outcomes, with support available but a desire to take the driver’s seat</li> <li>Real-World Impact Delivery: A proven track record of delivering meaningful outcomes through software and analytical products</li> <li>Collaborative Skills: Strong ability to collaborate with teammates and clients of varying technical proficiency, embedding with clients and joining their teams</li> <li>Willingness to Travel: Flexibility to travel as needed for client implementation work</li> </ul> <p><strong>What you’ll be doing: </strong></p> <ul> <li>Collaborative Teamwork: Partner with engineers, program managers, and domain specialists to conceive, architect, build, and maintain applications that meet AFS clients’ needs</li> <li>Data Synthesis: Understand a client’s most critical objectives and synthesize disparate information into a cohesive vision and actionable roadmap, interpreting what the data signifies and outlining an impact-based plan to rapidly go from use case to prototype to scaled deployment</li> <li>Rapid Iteration: Quickly iterate, build from scratch, and help transform clients' operations at uncommon speed. You won’t just deploy software—you’ll help reshape how entire organizations work by putting powerful tools in the hands of executives and real operators</li> <li>Production-Grade Solutions: Develop production-grade solutions that make sense of the client’s data and process it through an actionable workflow that can help clients make better decisions</li> <li>Collaboration: Collaborate with technical and non-technical colleagues to define solution requirements, iterate on the solution, and ship code</li> </ul> <p><strong>Here is what you need: </strong></p> <ul> <li>TS clearance with SCI maintain production-grade data pipelines, data connections, and ontologies</li> <li>Ability to develop transforms on structured (tabular) and unstructured datasets in Foundry</li> <li>Data pipeline maintenance in Foundry</li> <li>Experience with investigating and fixing common issues in data pipelines</li> </ul> </li> </ul> <p><strong>Preferred experience: </strong></p> <ul> <li>Knowledge of platform capabilities and specific applications within the Foundry suite that are useful for performing the job of data engineer</li> <li>Ability to contribute to logic changes and performance improvements to transform pipelines feeding mission critical workflows</li> <li>Familiarity with recommended support structures</li> <li>Familiarity with architecture and capabilities of Data Connections</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span class="TextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8" lang="EN-US" Required Skills &amp; Technical</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Here’s what you need:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Core Knowledge: A solid understanding of the data science toolkit, including the difference between prediction and inference, various modeling techniques, and their tradeoffs. title: Senior AI/ML & Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>At Accenture Federal Services, nothing matters more than helping the US federal government make the nation stronger and safer and life better for people. Our 13,000+ people are united in a shared purpose to pursue the limitless potential of technology and ingenuity for clients across defense, national security, public safety, civilian, and military health organizations.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join Accenture Federal Services, a technology company within global Accenture. Recognized as a Glassdoor Top 100 Best Place to Work, we offer a collaborative and caring community where you feel like you belong and are empowered to grow, learn and thrive through hands-on experience, certifications, industry training and more.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join us to drive positive, lasting change that moves missions and the government forward!</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> </div></div><p><strong>Job Description</strong>:</p> <p>We are looking for an experienced Senior AI/ML and Data Engineer to develop, implement, and maintain sophisticated machine learning, LLM, and enterprise AI solutions for our federal client. The ideal candidate combines strong hands on engineering talent with architectural leadership—capable of shaping mission aligned AI strategy, designing scalable pipelines, and delivering production-grade ML and Generative AI capabilities in secure environments. This role will partner with cross functional teams - including data engineering, cloud engineering, cybersecurity, and mission SMEs - to architect end-to-end AI systems that are reliable, compliant, and impactful.</p> <p><strong>The work you'll do</strong>:</p> <ul> <li><strong>AI/ML Engineering</strong>: <ul> <li>Design, develop, and deploy machine learning models, LLM applications, retrieval augmented generation (RAG) pipelines, and agentic AI systems.</li> <li>Build data preprocessing, training, fine tuning, inference, and evaluation workflows.</li> <li>Develop scalable ML pipelines using modern toolchains (SageMaker, Bedrock, Azure ML, Databricks, Ray, HuggingFace).</li> <li>Implement MLOps solutions including CI/CD for ML, model versioning, monitoring, logging, and drift detection.</li> <li>Shape AI system design decisions including vector DB selection, embedding strategies, prompt architecture, and model selection.</li> <li>Define target state architectures for LLM enabled applications, AI microservices, RAG pipelines, and knowledge retrieval systems.</li> </ul> </li> <li><strong>Data &amp; Cloud Engineering</strong>: <ul> <li>Design, build, and maintain scalable automated data pipelines (ETL/ELT) to support both batch and real-time data processing.</li> <li>Architect data lakes and warehouses (e.g., Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery) to ensure high availability and performance for ML workflows.</li> <li>Implement rigorous data quality checks and validation frameworks to ensure "garbage-in, garbage-out" never applies to our models.</li> </ul> </li> <li><strong>Delivery &amp; Stakeholder Engagement</strong>: <ul> <li>Work closely with program leadership, technical SMEs, and mission stakeholders to define requirements and AI roadmaps.</li> <li>Translate business problems into technical AI solutions and communicate tradeoffs to mixed audiences.</li> <li>Produce architecture diagrams, interface specifications, deployment patterns, and integration plans.</li> </ul> </li> </ul> <p><strong>Here's what you'll need</strong>:</p> <ul> <li>Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Applied Mathematics, or related field.</li> <li>5+ years of experience in one or more of the following areas: <ul> <li>AI/ML engineering, cloud-native development, or data engineering.</li> <li>Strong proficiency in Python and ML frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn).</li> <li>Hands on experience with LLM development (OpenAI, Anthropic, Bedrock, Azure OpenAI, HuggingFace Transformers).</li> <li>Experience architecting ML pipelines using AWS, Azure, or GCP.</li> <li>Familiarity with DevSecOps and IaC tools (Terraform, CloudFormation, Jenkins, GitLab, etc.).</li> <li>Experience implementing microservices, APIs, and containerized workloads (Docker, Kubernetes, ECS/EKS/AKS).</li> </ul> </li> </ul> <p><strong>Bonus points if you have</strong>:</p> <ul> <li>Experience building RAG pipelines with vector databases (Pinecone, FAISS, Weaviate, Milvus).</li> <li>Experience designing agentic workflows and multi agent AI systems.</li> <li>Experience with graph databases, knowledge graphs, or semantic search.</li> <li>Certifications such as AWS Architect, AWS ML Specialty, Azure AI Engineer, Security+.</li> <li>Ability to translate complex technical concepts for non-technical audiences.</li> <li>Strong problem-solving abilities with a product focused mindset.</li> <li>Strong communication and client facing consulting skills.</li> <li>Ability to work across cross-functional teams in a fast-paced environment.</li> <li>Understanding of security frameworks (FedRAMP, NIST 800 53, Zero Trust) for ML systems.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Security clearance</strong>:</p> <ul> <li>Active Top Secret (TS) security clearance is required; and must be able and willing to upgrade to TS/SCI with Poly.<br></li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div title: Senior Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>At Accenture Federal Services, nothing matters more than helping the US federal government make the nation stronger and safer and life better for people. The engineer will collaborate with data scientists and analysts to understand data requirements, work with security teams to implement data protection measures, and stay current with data engineering technologies and best practices. title: Sr. Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>At Accenture Federal Services, nothing matters more than helping the US federal government make the nation stronger and safer and life better for people. Our 13,000+ people are united in a shared purpose to pursue the limitless potential of technology and ingenuity for clients across defense, national security, public safety, civilian, and military health organizations.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join Accenture Federal Services, a technology company within global Accenture. Recognized as a Glassdoor Top 100 Best Place to Work, we offer a collaborative and caring community where you feel like you belong and are empowered to grow, learn and thrive through hands-on experience, certifications, industry training and more.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Join us to drive positive, lasting change that moves missions and the government forward!</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> </div></div><p><strong>The work:</strong></p> <p>If you’ve ever wanted to bring true product thinking and commercial data engineering practices into government, this is the role. We’re hiring for a Sr. Data Engineer to join our Civilian portfolio at Accenture Federal Services, where our teams are building modern digital products that directly improve everyday experiences for the public.<br>&nbsp;<br>As a Sr. Data Engineer, you will play a pivotal role in building a robust data platform (in Databricks) to be used by skilled data professionals analyzing and improving a highly visible online product. What makes this opportunity stand out is the client: mission-driven, product-oriented, and moving with a speed and mindset you’d expect from a Silicon Valley product company.<br>&nbsp;<br>Note: The role can be remote or in-person in D.C., but U.S. citizenship is required. Databricks experience is ++</p> <p>Key Responsibilities:</p> <ul> <li>Architecting and building scalable data platforms in AWS and Databricks</li> <li>Designing and implementing robust data pipelines, optimizing data infrastructure, and enhancing data feeds to improve quality, availability, and scalability</li> <li>Collaborating in a small, interactive scrum team of highly skilled data professionals to deliver in agile environment</li> </ul> <p><strong>Here's what you need:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>5+ years designing and implementing robust data pipelines, optimizing data infrastructure, and enhancing data feeds</li> <li>Experience with ETL and API data interfaces</li> <li>Experience with Open-source technologies and data streaming in Apache Kafka</li> <li>Prior design and implementation of Medallian Data Architecture</li> <li>Strong communication skills and ability to work in fast-paced, collaborative team</li> <li>Must be a US Citizen, eligible for Public Trust clearance</li> </ul> <p><strong>Preferred experience:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Extensive engineering experience in Databricks Platforms</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span class="TextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8">As required by local law, Accenture Federal Services provides reasonable ranges of compensation for hired roles based on labor costs in the states of <strong>California, Colorado, Hawaii, Illinois, Maine, Maryland, Massachusetts, Minnesota, New Jersey, New York, Vermont, Virginia, Washington, and the District of Columbia, and the city of Cleveland</strong></span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8">. The base pay range for this position in these locations is shown below. Compensation for roles at Accenture Federal Services varies depending on a wide array of factors, including but not limited to office location, role, skill set, and level of experience. Accenture Federal Services offers a wide variety of benefits. </span></span><a class="Hyperlink SCXW225111203 BCX8" href="https://www.accenture.com/us-en/careers/your-future-rewards-benefits" target="_blank"><span class="TextRun Underlined SCXW225111203 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="none"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8" data-ccp-charstyle="Hyperlink">You can find more information on benefits here.</span></span></a><span class="TextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW225111203 BCX8"> We accept applications on an on-going basis and there is no fixed deadline to apply.</span></span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p></div><div class="title">The pay range for the states of California, Colorado, Hawaii, Illinois, Maine, Maryland, Massachusetts, Minnesota, New Jersey, New York, Vermont, Virginia, Washington, and the District of Columbia, and the city of Cleveland is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$116,900</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$243,100 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><div> <div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><em><strong><span data-contrast="none">What We Believe</span> </strong></em></div> <div><em>As a company wholly dedicated to serving the US federal government, we bring together the best talent to help reinvent how federal agencies operate and deliver greater value for their mission and the American people. We have an unwavering commitment to creating a culture in which all our people are respected, feel a sense of belonging, and have equal opportunity. As a business imperative, every person at Accenture Federal Services has the responsibility to create and sustain a culture where everyone feels welcomed and included. This is grounded in our core values and our experience that hiring and developing great people who reflect different perspectives, experiences, and backgrounds is key to driving innovation and delivering the results that our clients and the country count on.</em></div> </div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><em><strong><span data-contrast="none">Equal Employment Opportunity Statement</span></strong></em></div> <div><em>We believe that no one should be discriminated against because of their differences. All employment decisions shall be made without regard to age, race, creed, color, religion, sex, national origin, ancestry, disability status, veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, citizenship status or any other basis as protected by federal, state, or local law. Our rich diversity makes us more innovative, more competitive, and more creative, which helps us better serve our clients and our communities. For details, view a copy of the<a href="https://afscommunities.force.com/careers/s/equal-opportunity-annual-policy" target="_blank"> Accenture Federal Services Equal Opportunity Policy Statement.</a></em></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><em>Accenture Federal Services is an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. Additionally, as an Affirmative Action Employer for Veterans and Individuals with Disabilities, Accenture Federal Services is committed to providing veteran employment opportunities to our service men and women.</em></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><strong><em><span data-contrast="none">Requesting An Accommodation</span></em></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></div> <div><em><span data-contrast="none">Accenture Federal Services is committed to providing equal employment opportunities for persons with disabilities or religious observances, including reasonable accommodation when needed.
